name: LAST CHANCE: [DOTL]
subject: Add your name to the Thank You Biden letter! >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
Peter, MAGA Republicans have NO respect for the peaceful transition of power or Democracy – they’re already ATTACKING President Biden!

We’re sending a letter to Biden to thank him for his service to our nation and to encourage him to keep fighting for Americans in these final days!

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q12025_ltr_thankbiden?amount=7 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q12025_ltr_thankbiden?amount=7]With Trump’s inauguration in 12 days, spots are going FAST so don’t lose out on this exclusive opportunity – sign the “Thank You Biden” letter before midnight! » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q12025_ltr_thankbiden?amount=7]

CHIP IN $7 TO SIGN THE THANK YOU PRESIDENT BIDEN LETTER » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q12025_ltr_thankbiden?amount=7]

TO: President Biden
FROM: Peter Willis
Subject: Thank you for your service to the American people
Dear President Biden,
Thank you for your extraordinary leadership over the past four years.
When you took office, our nation was reeling from division, a global pandemic, and an economy in crisis. You immediately set to work cleaning up the chaos left behind and put the needs of everyday Americans first.
You didn’t just promise change—you delivered:
✅ You signed the Social Security Fairness Act this week, expanding Social Security benefits to MILLIONS!
✅ You took bold action to LOWER prescription drug prices, making life-saving medications more accessible to millions of families.
✅ You passed the BIGGEST climate solutions investment bill in history, laying the foundation for a cleaner, more sustainable future.
✅ You created MILLIONS of good-paying jobs, providing opportunity to workers across the country.
In just four years, you’ve transformed our nation – but I know our work isn’t done. That’s why I’m contributing $7 to Democracy On the Line to ensure that we can build on the progress you’ve made and elect Democrats that will protect our Democracy from Trump’s agenda. » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q12025_ltr_thankbiden?amount=7]
CHIP IN $7 TO SIGN THE THANK YOU PRESIDENT BIDEN LETTER » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q12025_ltr_thankbiden?amount=7]
X Peter Willis

Democracy on the Line

--------------------------------------
Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
(www.democracyonthelinepac.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Peter, it’s Ritchie.

Trump has made it crystal clear that he has _big plans_ for the first actions he’ll take as President, and we’re only beginning to see what that might look like: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100076501/521685036/-864556716?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250108_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzg4NjFiZi0xY2NlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ItkDKRRbmJJ0QMZppL6XGRKChYPudR7hl8ZcbBRHa0c=) **This is their infamous Project 2025 in action.** We know the GOP is going to come after things our movement has fought so hard for, from LGBTQ+ rights to affordable housing to Social Security and more.

But Peter, we’re not powerless — and we have to be prepared for whatever they throw at us.

[That’s why I’m asking you today: Will you chip in $3 or $7 towards my $5,000 weekly goal to defend our Democracy before Trump’s MAGA trifecta begins? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100076502/521685037/-864556716?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250108_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzg4NjFiZi0xY2NlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ItkDKRRbmJJ0QMZppL6XGRKChYPudR7hl8ZcbBRHa0c=) | [$5,000 WEEKLY GOAL: RUSH $3 TO DEFEND OUR DEMOCRACY FROM PROJECT 2025 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100076503/521685038/-864556716?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250108_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzg4NjFiZi0xY2NlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ItkDKRRbmJJ0QMZppL6XGRKChYPudR7hl8ZcbBRHa0c=)

**But we can’t wait to take action: Protecting our Democracy means being proactive _now_ — _not when the damage is already done._**

With Project 2025 looming over us, there is too much on the line to sit this one out, Peter. Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: DLCC Membership Team
subject: Here is how we fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers. | | |
---
| |
---|---

| 🛑**There’s no sugarcoating it: Our party faced major setbacks on Election Day. But if you want to keep fighting for our democracy, our rights, our freedoms, and our future, please keep reading.** 👇
---
When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers.

Without Congress, these majorities will provide a much-needed check to oppose the worst of the incoming administration.

**Expanding Democratic power in statehouses across the country is the best way to counteract the damage of a second Trump presidency.**
---
We’re committed to building our largest membership team in DLCC history to fight back against the dangerous extremism of Trump and his allies.

As one of our most dedicated supporters, we need you on this team standing alongside us.

Donations from our members each year directly fuel our work to:

✅ Compete in majority-making special elections
✅ Chip away at Republican supermajorities
✅ Identify and flip vulnerable GOP-held seats
_And so much more..._
---
[Will you chip in a gift of $10 right now to claim your 2025 membership, join our people-powered movement, and stand up to Republican extremism? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquD37PtIk9GhRAB5og_YtPfBWbVijREBzh7AVmTpWy3nMz174EAGjmJ7syLoV0MSmueh5yDysmGIZOLRKpeBcgTDn6iRXw_VdvK8e21nq8h8qI26JBGoJkU2JO5m-p2uB4YR3Bkh5gE4bySJ_TSLFLEAbNojlHE0UOzZJtKMu1KFq3Oo5tcxOmRmRPpJOpBZo4GD4mED6f7XPdnO8_sVJaeDm_B_NAE6Y6WfY9RfY7xQcZHhVQ8PaCUHBCLLSDIrOTXBR0FEPFQNnEOu8zTooSVjjdjTuCXGehDBRA1XI8MFchiDl2fVSMxZCeXBBoIJd-DwpCt4Ec7eGtPsvE3k-HA1s3cT5i1omYmoMKZiDHyjLVXaQDroRUlhGFACHp8MtZKnbiBtk_E2jGn0c7I6FNz/4d0/hRBOO7wmQXG4VvIsAkjp9Q/h0/h001.3Rcl_-m9HqGMMRBxXuxkZkaN_XAE8BwEFO4zNuPxmPU)

clean_body: When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers. | | | | | ---|--- | 🛑There’s no sugarcoating it: Our party faced major setbacks on Election Day. But if you want to keep fighting for our democracy, our rights, our freedoms, and our future, please keep reading. 👇 When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers. Without Congress, these majorities will provide a much-needed check to oppose the worst of the incoming administration. Expanding Democratic power in statehouses across the country is the best way to counteract the damage of a second Trump presidency. We’re committed to building our largest membership team in DLCC history to fight back against the dangerous extremism of Trump and his allies. As one of our most dedicated supporters, we need you on this team standing alongside us. Donations from our members each year directly fuel our work to: ✅ Compete in majority-making special elections ✅ Chip away at Republican supermajorities ✅ Identify and flip vulnerable GOP-held seats And so much more... | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Let’s hit the ground running. body:
Newsweek: Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst
| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2762a7d30b5149c1904c910543403106&_e=naX9ydFz0KkgwSNmJllyydG4Ol6C1uDA1Eg93bnnIQK4xDTvevx8tfi8Gqw2U5N5z0f_kFLga6I7bAxBPo6rE1ESlcDcWX_z_bMfZUn4_CqrnkjCQqylSrSRSjkl9mVgt0KAAYR7owXG-Q_cVjNdzfu7Y-vioDKVZXo6jRkVq79g0QrnizoHbRAOqrX00gRbvIymz1Ygoc-xp0-TPnkR9t1JbI47lQrEPFLKKH7NBaPpSBlMUaYq6762OyUXU1_w4rtbbkcJg9HK9NvlVUk38nxowZX-BNK3AQUKp7bW1DcMBkvveEDKnJCNyKPdcx82dVnRkWO9FAplA3DkaIYi-gx4ZUxhc-YuoDV2qtPz0r6pc7kByuzJIqf94e3pcUx-KHQ2lSt-6Gei6kePsuKKGg%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Even as the Deep State continues its efforts to rob me of EVERYTHING – _my home, my possessions, my credit cards, my car_ – _I will never surrender the fight for my freedom and justice._
---
And even with headlines like these popping up, I refuse to roll over like a dog and give up my rights:
---
**_Newsweek_ : Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst**
---
Outside the New York City Courthouse, I was asked, _“Do you think Mr. Trump can help you get out of this?”_
---
Here’s what I said: _**“Mr. Trump doesn’t have to help me get out of it. All Mr. Trump has to do is straighten out the legal system and we’ll find out who the real criminals are.”**_
---
Anyone with common sense knows this case was a complete abuse of power. _They want me to pay _$148 MILLION!__
---
It’s punitive! It’s ridiculous! This was done solely because I’m a Republican living in the Democrat Dictatorship of New York.
---
But now that President Trump is headed back to the White House, I have hope that our broken, corrupt, and predatory judicial system will be fixed – and justice for ALL Americans will be restored.
---
Don’t forget: President Trump refused to surrender to the tyrannical Democrats even after four wrongful arrests, a felony conviction, and an assassin’s bullet. And he just won the White House!
---
_**That’s why I will _KEEP_ _FIGHTING_ for my God-given freedoms and rights.**_
---
If you can support me in my fight, I’d be eternally grateful. But if you cannot, please do not even think twice. Take care of yourself and your family!
---
[**If you can, and, seriously, only if you can, please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – as I keep fighting for my freedom and justice as the Democrats’ Deep State tries to JAIL me for life.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2762a7d30b5149c1904c910543403106&_e=naX9ydFz0KkgwSNmJllyydG4Ol6C1uDA1Eg93bnnIQK4xDTvevx8tfi8Gqw2U5N5z0f_kFLga6I7bAxBPo6rE1ESlcDcWX_z_bMfZUn4_CqrnkjCQqylSrSRSjkl9mVgt0KAAYR7owXG-Q_cVjNdzfu7Y-vioDKVZXo6jRkVq79g0QrnizoHbRAOqrX00gRbvIymz1Ygoc-xp0-TPnkR9t1JbI47lQrEPFLKKH7NBaO37pd3yXXVG5t_Se7fY9d2AiApG9AB1WNmZYgEvdNGjAiXnX0dRBWoDOP22_c3e83KDthoyWNvjTFbiUp4htbakLuJproe0Lqy9i1ZXNdthX2G9X8HiVfO65cIaXwdQLzv1JL_Xsa2Axt0em0FGuRuuj0NHKR0AWHqX9Wh5hMURQ%3D%3D)

But now that the GOP will control Congress and the White House, Patty needs at least 20,000 pro-choice advocates to commit to having her back before 11:59 p.m. | | TEAM MURRAY MEMBER: Peter DEADLINE: January 8 @ 11:59 P.M. PRO-CHOICE DEFENDER STATUS: ## UNKNOWN ## | | Urgently awaiting your signature, – Team Murray | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. People for Patty Murray PO BOX 3662 Seattle, WA 98124 United States | | PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

---
Hi Peter, The Biden Administration recently released its long-awaited analysis of the environmental, economic, and public health impacts of liquified natural gas (LNG) exports, and now we have just over 40 days left to act. This analysis makes it clear that LNG exports are not in the public interest, and could be a game-changer in protecting our climate and communities. Now it is time to push the Biden Administration to reject pending LNG permits! [**Submit your comment now and tell the Department of Energy (DOE) LNG exports are not in the public interest and urge the Biden Administration to reject new permits to protect our future!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100077923/521717852/2087600797?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3ZDViZmQzLTI1Y2UtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bFfu1QQld-A8j7Zz__yZamrV0grqQWNWDaFUGISBAh8=&emci=1d56561e-10ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=47d5bfd3-25ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230)
---
[**SUBMIT YOUR COMMENT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100077924/521717857/2087600797?contactdata=UO6cQL3XIRwE5KwC/CKnt/j6UcH2IWTwwc7GZXE21yXyEKduh5Zy/J4T37Z2GUSZuTh2Z6FmbfhJufcAw1limP3kUI8P7BZgsUunMK07+Jmd8HJLKU8tIuZT+hLBW2nS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3ZDViZmQzLTI1Y2UtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bFfu1QQld-A8j7Zz__yZamrV0grqQWNWDaFUGISBAh8=&emci=1d56561e-10ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=47d5bfd3-25ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230)
---
Earlier this year, the Biden Administration paused new LNG export approvals to update outdated data and analysis. With the 60 day comment period that started Dec. 17th, we need to send a resounding message: LNG exports are a climate disaster that drive up energy costs, endanger vulnerable communities, and put our national security at risk.****[**President Biden should act on this analysis and reject all pending LNG export permits.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100077925/521717858/2087600797?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3ZDViZmQzLTI1Y2UtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bFfu1QQld-A8j7Zz__yZamrV0grqQWNWDaFUGISBAh8=&emci=1d56561e-10ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=47d5bfd3-25ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230) Here’s why your voice is urgently needed:
---
* **Climate devastation:** Projects like CP2 LNG in Louisiana could emit 190 million tonnes of CO2e (carbon dioxide equivalent) per year—equivalent to the pollution from 51 coal-fired power plants. We can’t let these carbon bombs move forward.
* **Health impacts in vulnerable communities:** LNG facilities are concentrated in areas already suffering from pollution and climate change. This leads to higher rates of cancer, asthma, and heart disease for people who’ve suffered enough.
* **Environmental destruction:** Heavy dredging and construction for LNG facilities damage ecosystems, devastate local economies reliant on fishing and tourism, and threaten biodiversity.
* **Higher costs for families:** LNG exports raise energy bills for Americans while padding the profits of oil and gas CEOs. We need policies that protect people, not corporate profits.
* **National security risks** : With LNG demand in Europe declining, U.S. rivals like China are increasingly buying up American LNG, using our resources to strengthen their power.

---
| | [**TAKE ACTION**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100077926/521717859/2087600797?contactdata=UO6cQL3XIRwE5KwC/CKnt/j6UcH2IWTwwc7GZXE21yXyEKduh5Zy/J4T37Z2GUSZuTh2Z6FmbfhJufcAw1limP3kUI8P7BZgsUunMK07+Jmd8HJLKU8tIuZT+hLBW2nS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3ZDViZmQzLTI1Y2UtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bFfu1QQld-A8j7Zz__yZamrV0grqQWNWDaFUGISBAh8=&emci=1d56561e-10ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=47d5bfd3-25ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230)
---
This analysis from DOE can solidify President Biden’s climate and environmental justice legacy, make it legally difficult for a future Trump Administration to advance more LNG export projects, and provide a solid foundation for bold action now. This is a critical moment. Hundreds of thousands of Americans—including consumer advocates, national security experts, frontline community leaders, and healthcare professionals—have already spoken out and were a critical piece of winning the initial pause on LNG export approvals. President Biden has shown he is willing to listen and lead. Now, it’s up to us to ensure the final analysis is utilized and empowers the Biden Administration to take decisive action to stop LNG exports. [**Make your voice heard by submitting your comment today and demand that the DOE stand up to Big Oil and Gas!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100077927/521717860/2087600797?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3ZDViZmQzLTI1Y2UtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bFfu1QQld-A8j7Zz__yZamrV0grqQWNWDaFUGISBAh8=&emci=1d56561e-10ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=47d5bfd3-25ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230)
---
[**SUBMIT YOUR COMMENT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100077928/521717861/2087600797?contactdata=UO6cQL3XIRwE5KwC/CKnt/j6UcH2IWTwwc7GZXE21yXyEKduh5Zy/J4T37Z2GUSZuTh2Z6FmbfhJufcAw1limP3kUI8P7BZgsUunMK07+Jmd8HJLKU8tIuZT+hLBW2nS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3ZDViZmQzLTI1Y2UtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bFfu1QQld-A8j7Zz__yZamrV0grqQWNWDaFUGISBAh8=&emci=1d56561e-10ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=47d5bfd3-25ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Patriot,
---
I’ve officially been sworn in to our new House majority.
---
That means YOUR House majority is ready to get to work _right now_ – weeks before President Donald J. Trump is inaugurated as our 47th President.
---
After four years of damage brought on by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, we’ve certainly got our work cut out for ourselves.
---
**_These next couple of weeks leading up to President Trump’s inauguration are mission critical for laying the groundwork to truly Make America Great Again._**
---
_But most importantly, citizens like YOU need to be front and center in our new government, which is why I’m asking you to set the 2025 Agenda now that I’ve been sworn in to our 119th House of Representatives._

The media has been saying that Republicans now have control of the “federal trifecta” – the House, the Senate, and the presidency.
---
But that somewhat misses the mark...
---
It’s not that _Republicans_ now have control of the federal government, it’s that the __PEOPLE__ are back in control.
---
As President Trump said back in 2017, his Inauguration was not about transferring power from one political party to another – but rather, from the ruling class to the _people_.
---
And that’s even truer today.
---
Unelected bureaucrats, D.C. special interests, Deep State warmongers, and every other bad actor in the Washington Swamp is now forced to surrender their power to the one group whose rights and interests have been neglected for far too long – the American People.
---
And now that our 119th Congress is officially in session, I’m asking the people of our country to help set _YOUR_ agenda so that we can truly make America great again for ALL Americans.
---

That means YOUR House majority is ready to get to work right now – weeks before President Donald J. Trump is inaugurated as our 47th President. These next couple of weeks leading up to President Trump’s inauguration are mission critical for laying the groundwork to truly Make America Great Again. But most importantly, citizens like YOU need to be front and center in our new government, which is why I’m asking you to set the 2025 Agenda now that I’ve been sworn in to our 119th House of Representatives. The media has been saying that Republicans now have control of the “federal trifecta” – the House, the Senate, and the presidency. But that somewhat misses the mark... name: Roger Lau (via Democrats.org)
subject: The right moment
body:
---
Hi Derek, If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to make your first contribution to the DNC this year, I’m here to tell you this is it. If that’s all you need to hear, you can use this link to help us build the strongest possible Democratic Party: [**https://democrats.org/go/Donate**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250108_2502_fr&refcode2=2525_22930333_n26NkH&akid=2525%2E22930333%2En26NkH) Otherwise, I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why we’re counting on your support today. As Deputy Executive Director of the Party, I work with our team to help guide our long-term strategy. As we look ahead to Trump’s inauguration and beyond, it’s clear there’s a _lot_ of work ahead of us: Preventing the worst impulses of Trump and his allies from becoming our reality; continuing the historic investments we’ve made in state parties; ensuring Democrats in states like Virginia and New Jersey have the resources they’ll need to win big races this year. The list goes on... I know you might be feeling burnt out and disappointed that we’re facing another Trump presidency. Trust me: You’re certainly not alone. But there are millions of us who care deeply about this country and about our friends and neighbors. We care enough to pour our time, energy, and hard-earned money into building the future we want to see. And that’s exactly what we need to do in this moment. [**So if you can, I hope you’ll pitch in $3 to help us build the strongest possible Democratic Party. You can use these links to chip in:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?refcode=em_20250108_2502_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2525_22930333_n26NkH&akid=2525%2E22930333%2En26NkH) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250108_2502_fr&refcode2=2525_22930333_n26NkH&akid=2525%2E22930333%2En26NkH)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?refcode=em_20250108_2502_fr&refcode2=2525_22930333_n26NkH&akid=2525%2E22930333%2En26NkH)**
---
****
None of us can do this work alone. It’s going to take all of us working together to move our country forward. With your help, that’s exactly what we’ll do.
Thank you for everything,
Roger
Roger Lau
Deputy Executive Director
Democratic National Committee

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

On Monday, we sent you an urgent petition asking you to support the _No Kings Act_ to revoke Trump’s immunity.

Please, we can’t abandon the fight to revoke Trump’s immunity. From: signature pending [FFR]

To: TOP DEMOCRATS

**AND WE KNOW:** Trump has already been accused of inciting an insurrection, mishandling classified documents and paying hush money – **_what will he do with immunity?!_**

**SO WE KNOW:** We have to fight back against this horrific ruling – _and Chuck Schumer did just that by introducing the _No Kings Act_!_ [**We need a MASSIVE wave of public support for this crucial legislation, team! name: Adam Schiff
subject: Here’s how you can help those being devastated by the wildfires
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8258%2E5257348%2EI4ZGak ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

Southern Californians are grappling with horrific Palisades, Eaton, and
Hurst wildfires. The damage from these fires is far-reaching — several
individuals have died, thousands of people and their animals have been
told to evacuate, and thousands of homes, businesses, places of worship,
and schools have been destroyed.

First responders and firefighters are working tirelessly to save lives and
contain these fires.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.0L4IZA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250108_PM1_V2_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=8258%2E5257348%2EI4ZGak ]Right now, there are some incredible organizations on the ground
supporting the efforts — including the Los Angeles Fire Department
Foundation, United Way of Greater Los Angeles, and the Los Angeles
Regional Food Bank. If you can spare, please split a direct donation to
these organizations today:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1040?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.H44oL1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250108_PM1_V2_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=8258%2E5257348%2EI4ZGak ]EXPRESS DONATE $5

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.SnM8Ml&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250108_PM1_V2_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=8258%2E5257348%2EI4ZGak ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.0S_64z&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250108_PM1_V2_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=8258%2E5257348%2EI4ZGak ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

The sudden wildfires have completely upended access to basic necessities
and thousands of homes.

The Los Angeles Fire Department Foundation is actively working to contain
these fires and keep Angelenos safe. Your donations will help local LAFD
firefighters get emergency equipment and supplies to save as many lives as
possible.

Meanwhile, United Way of Greater Los Angeles and the Los Angeles Regional
Food Bank are on the ground, helping connect residents in need with food,
water, sanitary items, and other critical supplies during this emergency.

Your support for these three great organizations would be greatly
appreciated. And it will make a real difference in the lives of so many.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3361?c0=q12025_abs_em_palisades.NHDIuS&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250108_PM1_V2_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=8258%2E5257348%2EI4ZGak ]Even $15 split between these organizations will make an impact. Chip in
today.

The damage from these fires is far-reaching — several individuals have died, thousands of people and their animals have been told to evacuate, and thousands of homes, businesses, places of worship, and schools have been destroyed. First responders and firefighters are working tirelessly to save lives and contain these fires. [ ]Right now, there are some incredible organizations on the ground supporting the efforts — including the Los Angeles Fire Department Foundation, United Way of Greater Los Angeles, and the Los Angeles Regional Food Bank. If you can spare, please split a direct donation to these organizations today: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $5 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $15 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT The sudden wildfires have completely upended access to basic necessities and thousands of homes. The Los Angeles Fire Department Foundation is actively working to contain these fires and keep Angelenos safe. Your donations will help local LAFD firefighters get emergency equipment and supplies to save as many lives as possible. Meanwhile, United Way of Greater Los Angeles and the Los Angeles Regional Food Bank are on the ground, helping connect residents in need with food, water, sanitary items, and other critical supplies during this emergency. Your support for these three great organizations would be greatly appreciated. And it will make a real difference in the lives of so many. [ ]Even $15 split between these organizations will make an impact. Chip in today. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $5 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $15 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT My office and I are closely monitoring these developments and will share information as we find out more. Thank you, and stay safe. — Adam [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433 [ ]DONATE 135 E. name: Texas Organizing Project
subject: Back at it and ready to go / De vuelta a la acción y listo para partir
body:
Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español]
And the work begins...
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Sean%20Teare%20with%20TOP.jpg]
From knocking doors to making history: TOP Right2Justice Policy Coordinator Laquita Garcia and Houston TOP members gathered last week at a swearing-in ceremony where they once again congratulated TOP-endorsed Harris County candidates on their election, including new District Attorney Sean Teare.
TOP was built on the belief that communities too often ignored by those in power deserve a voice and a seat at the table. Over the past 15 years, we’ve brought thousands of Texans into the movement, electing community champions and changing policies that impact everyday lives.
Now comes the REAL work, as these elected leaders will be tasked and held accountable for serving with integrity, all while delivering tangible, transformative results for our communities.
For more information on our Right2Justice campaign work, contact Laquita at lgarcia@organizetexas.org [lgarcia@organizetexas.org] .
Preparing for the winter storm ahead
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Snow%20winter%20Dallas.png]
The polar vortex sweeping through Texas this week is further proof how climate change is REAL and causing more extreme fluctuations in our weather. We still have WEEKS of winter left, and if you've lived in Texas for a while, you know how quickly weather can change from one moment to the next. You also know Gov. Abbott's ERCOT has a lousy track record at best. (Remember the mess that was Winter Storm Uri?)
It's never a bad time to stock up on the essentials for your home as we prepare for this winter storm and others.
Check out this winter weather preparedness guide and stay warm out there! [https://www.wunderground.com/prepare/winter-weather]
January 6th:
Forever condemning Trump's fascist coup attempt
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Jan%206%20violence.jpg]
No court decision or amount of gaslighting will erase what is undeniable fact – that on January 6, 2021, Donald Trump incited white nationalist violence at the U.S. Capitol in an attempt to overturn the results of the 2020 presidential election.
Four years after this deadly attack, it remains an infuriating national travesty of accountability and justice that this twice-impeached grifter has yet to feel the full legal weight of his actions that day, and thanks to his ultra-conservative Supreme Court, he likely never will. It is disgusting, though in no way shocking, to see today’s Republican Party – which Trump controls in the palm of his hand – continue to downplay the horrific display of white supremacy we witnessed.
January 6, 2021, wasn’t the start of Trump’s dangerous attacks on our democracy, and it won’t be his last. Now back in the Oval Office, there is no doubt Trump will wield every bit of his power to dismantle democratic processes for his own benefit, while weaponizing the rule of law to attack any communities who he and his MAGA loyalists deem as threats to their divisive agenda – particularly Black and Latino communities.
TOP’s commitment to building real political power in Texas remains steadfast. Donald Trump’s return to power only strengthens our resolve to fight even harder for the Black and Latino Texans who fuel our state.
Regardless of race, income, gender, preferred language, or ZIP Code, all who call our country home deserve representation from elected leaders who will fight to fulfill the promise of our democracy, not destroy it.
TOP Tip: Stay up-to-date with happenings in the Texas Legislature
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Texas%20Capitol%20Austin%20building.jpg]
A new state legislative session starts next week. The 89th Texas Legislature kicks off January 14 in Austin, and as with every legislative session, there will be no shortage of political fireworks. Needing a quick refresher on how our legislature operates? Use this article as a resource! [https://www.texastribune.org/2023/01/10/texas-legislature-2023-bills-laws-governor-speaker-lieutenant-governor/] Also, follow TOP's Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/OrganizeTexas] , X [https://x.com/OrganizeTexas] , Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/organizetexas/] , and TikTok [https://www.tiktok.com/@organizetexas] accounts for legislative updates as they relate to our organizing work.
Español
Y comienza el trabajo...
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Sean%20Teare%20with%20TOP.jpg]
De tocar puertas a hacer historia: La coordinadora de políticas de TOP Right2Justice, Laquita García, y los miembros de TOP en Houston se reunieron la semana pasada en una ceremonia de juramentación en la que una vez más felicitaron a los candidatos del condado de Harris respaldados por TOP por su elección, incluido el nuevo fiscal de distrito Sean Teare.
TOP se construyó sobre la creencia de que las comunidades. que con demasiada frecuencia son ignoradas por quienes están en el poder, merecen una voz y un lugar en la mesa. Durante los últimos 15 años, hemos incorporado a miles de Texanos al movimiento, eligiendo campeones comunitarios y cambiando políticas que afectan la vida cotidiana.
Ahora viene el trabajo REAL, ya que estos líderes electos tendrán la tarea y la responsabilidad de servir con integridad, y todos ellos entregarán resultados tangibles y transformadores para nuestras comunidades.
Para obtener más información sobre nuestro trabajo de campaña Right2Justice, comuníquese con Laquita en lgarcia@organizetexas.org [lgarcia@organizetexas.org] .
Preparándose para la tormenta invernal que se avecina
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Snow%20winter%20Dallas.png]
El vórtice polar que azota Texas esta semana es una prueba más de que el cambio climático es REAL y provoca fluctuaciones más extremas en nuestro clima. Todavía nos quedan SEMANAS de invierno y, si ha vivido en Texas durante un tiempo, sabe lo rápido que puede cambiar el clima de un momento a otro. También sabe que el ERCOT del gobernador Abbott tiene un historial pésimo en el mejor de los casos. (¿Recuerda el desastre que fue la tormenta invernal Uri?)
Nunca es un mal momento para abastecerse de los elementos esenciales para su hogar mientras nos preparamos para esta tormenta invernal y otras.
¡Consulte esta guía de preparación para el clima invernal y manténgase abrigado! [https://www.wunderground.com/prepare/winter-weather]
6 de enero:
Condenando para siempre el intento de golpe fascista de Trump
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Jan%206%20violence.jpg]
Ninguna decisión judicial ni ninguna manipulación psicológica borrarán lo que es un hecho innegable: que el 6 de enero del 2021, Donald Trump incitó a la violencia nacionalista blanca en el Capitolio de Estados Unidos en un intento de anular los resultados de las elecciones presidenciales de 2020.
Cuatro años después de este ataque mortal, sigue siendo una indignante parodia nacional de rendición de cuentas y justicia que este estafador dos veces enjuiciado aún no haya sentido todo el peso legal de sus acciones ese día, y gracias a su Corte Suprema ultraconservadora, probablemente nunca lo sienta. Es repugnante, aunque de ninguna manera sorprendente, ver al Partido Republicano de hoy, que Trump controla en la palma de su mano, seguir minimizando la horrible exhibición de supremacía blanca que presenciamos.
El 6 de enero de 2021 no fue el comienzo de los peligrosos ataques de Trump a nuestra democracia, y no será el último. Ahora que ha vuelto a la Oficina Oval, no hay duda de que Trump utilizará todo su poder para desmantelar los procesos democráticos en su propio beneficio, al tiempo que utiliza el estado arma para atacar a cualquier comunidad que él y sus partidarios de MAGA consideren una amenaza para su agenda divisiva, en particular las comunidades negras y latinas.
El compromiso de TOP de construir un poder político real en Texas sigue siendo firme. El regreso de Donald Trump al poder solo fortalece nuestra determinación de luchar aún más por los Texanos negros y latinos que impulsan nuestro estado.
Independientemente de la raza, los ingresos, el género, el idioma preferido o el código postal, todos los que consideran nuestro país como su hogar merecen la representación de líderes electos que lucharán por cumplir la promesa de nuestra democracia, no por destruirla.
Consejos de TOP: Manténgase actualizado con los acontecimientos en la Legislatura de Texas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Texas%20Capitol%20Austin%20building.jpg]
La semana que viene comienza una nueva sesión legislativa estatal . La 89a Legislatura de Texas arranca el 14 de enero en Austin y, como en todas las sesiones legislativas, no faltarán los fuegos artificiales políticos. ¿Necesita un repaso rápido de cómo funciona nuestra legislatura? ¡Use este artículo como recurso! [https://www.texastribune.org/2023/01/10/texas-legislature-2023-bills-laws-governor-speaker-lieutenant-governor/] Además, siga las cuentas de Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/OrganizeTexas] , X [https://x.com/OrganizeTexas] , Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/organizetexas/] y TikTok [https://www.tiktok.com/@organizetexas] de TOP para obtener actualizaciones legislativas relacionadas con nuestro trabajo de organizar.
Copyright (C) 2024 Texas Organizing Project. All rights reserved.

Texas Organizing Project
700 S. Zarzamora, Suite 212
San Antonio, TX 78207
United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=de%2F5z9RXO%2FHtTGQL5VxwGlxWRh6FmspIb0%2F9YjQYJPrqqcdVK%2BX6Z%2Fa%2FwzIsHoHyZAKZsl5iqXpKBV00ffz%2FBp0fA1kA74bs3pwPFk8hvnyQbhunEy7OFUiHGOaX49%2FzLMFVSPTgTXOTh4WxQ%2BsOUV%2B5X7TgWlyDk9pUw55lnagkCxr8ZyK2O8jOks2fsF4covkoRlrr0PrCaPWGRVidQ3AWsP9uGwFjYDKlHNSU0DiUKFH5D9gj2I93zgr3L4GxZiPNLi3G%2F%2Ffa3wQxfuQNux2RykJRsGI8QxqCSY8PtmwMcw%2BrFKQTW9EXaxw8iL8SVoY1B8nw7JceGin8u9tvgsQB21dSrfUCKByiiqaD0eALUfYkMOeTZ0Or1P8Dp5W4l9RrIYfWtSUiFzNfgaJTo9obu3FVOvGJbeJzX9fTngg%3D .

name: Erika, 1776 Club
subject: We’re not waiting around for the Left to destroy everything we’ve worked so hard for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It’s time to take action

|
---
| | |
Friend,

You're part of a special group of Americans who still believe in the spirit of 1776. You know that our country was founded on timeless principles that are worth fighting for. We believe that too.

**[That's why we created the 1776 Club - a community of patriots who are committed to defending our nation's values and way of life.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znjml9539di4rk2kgeudedklssamf5p1e3n526n8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i62p32cjh2bs "That's why we created the 1776 Club - a community of patriots who are committed to defending our nation's values and way of life.")**

It's the beginning of the year, which means your 2024 membership has expired. But don't worry **we have a 24 hour open-enrollment period for you to RENEW your membership and rejoin our prestigious ranks.**

We're not just talking about politics; we're talking about the kind of country we want to leave for our children and grandchildren. **_We want to preserve the freedom, liberty, and opportunity that have always made America great._**

---

name: Trump Updates (via Senate GOP)
subject: Missing your name
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We’re giving you one last chance to sign Trump’s card before Inauguration Day.

Friend,

There are just a few days left until Inauguration Day!

**[Once President Trump is finished taking the oath of office, we plan to present him with our Inaugural Congratulatory Card signed by his top supporters.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zcjodjospbheqrajdmmgnko0uu07kscjm7sbd6h8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i66o74cph2bs)**

There's just one problem...

_**[The last time we checked, YOUR NAME wasn't on the card! ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zhqbccgci12duugt2gaih992grh2jms5e5sc3ts0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i66o74cph2bs)**_

******************************************************[SIGN THE CARD](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z3uc0e9kqqnddi107gird069vb6it84dqq2lgtd0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i66o74cph2bs)******************************************************

The window to sign the card technically ended on December 31st.

**[But since you're among President Trump's biggest grassroots supporters, we've granted YOU a special extension until midnight tonight!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z86jouaopj4u7tgf2jfe4svg5he5rul5bscqpeh8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i66o74cph2bs)**

This is your **[LAST CHANCE](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zcrpqilftb1t8eb80cmatisi68ntnbmofm01cnbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i66o74cph2bs)** to sign the card and stand with President Trump on this historic day for our country.

**[So please, sign our Inaugural Congratulatory Card for President Trump before 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to ensure your name is on it before inauguration Day.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7aegmrlmu5q1hep7d7n8a43v3h65t5knemtjo20_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i66o74cph2bs)**

******************************************************[SIGN THE CARD](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zima5d2d9c1330tuma0gj0inkff0f311tqb0udo0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i66o74cph2bs)******************************************************

Thank you,

Senate GOP HQ

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: We’ve never offered this before...
body:
On January 20, President DONALD TRUMP will take the oath of office...

| | | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z2aiqdn17nvj7pub2utel3rm2ja3e36hud6471ko_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i66o74cdh2bs)
---
Friend, On January 20, President DONALD TRUMP will take the oath of office... **_...and Friend, YOU could be there!_**
---
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z8lrr0fbrq33694qk5b7r5jha6732vfh3kr4p1mo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i66o74cdh2bs)
---
**Turning Point USA is offering one special supporter (and their guest) an ALL-EXPENSES-PAID trip for inauguration weekend** - a ONCE-IN-A-LIFETIME opportunity to be part of one of the most significant moments in modern American history. **[Friend, will you make a generous gift of $25, $50, $100, or more to support Turning Point USA before January 10th? We'll choose the supporter for this special giveaway on January 11th!](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zivij9ua4u19o8huv39lir6dblarrd6urttf68co_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i66o74cdh2bs)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA now**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2za54el0uptr3a860av9j978v28ncje7rll7veevo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i66o74cdh2bs)
---
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zdhj5es73huats3dngh4e004rfeci3cc70n4c2t0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i66o74cdh2bs)
---
At Turning Point's AMERICAFEST in December, President Trump stood before thousands of young patriots and declared that a new era of AMERICAN GREATNESS was beginning. **[**Now YOU and your guest have the opportunity to potentially join Turning Point USA to celebrate INAUGURATION WEEKEND:**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zj3nfqre57acm86umc7u5s9pv23oc388vdtp9jmo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i66o74cdh2bs)**
* On SUNDAY midday, join President Trump's pre-inauguration event,

* On SUNDAY evening, enjoy VIP tickets to the Turning Point Inaugural Ball, and

* On MONDAY midday, attend the INAUGURATION of the 47th President in Washington, DC!

Plus, you'll receive round-trip flights to Washington, DC and luxury hotel accommodations for inauguration weekend. **Don't miss this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to be part of history, Friend.** **[Make your gift of $25, $50, $100, $250, or more by 11:59 PM ET on January 10th-- and you could be the special Turning Point USA supporter who wins this inauguration weekend celebration!](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zfhrdsdmbgo9cj16mc0vo08kiru742plvlmu44s8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i66o74cdh2bs)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA now**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zu1fs5799fojhr1qotfrsthd2ug6o9ijuq1tpge8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i66o74cdh2bs)
---
Thank YOU for your patriotism and your generous support. In 2024, we worked together to inspire MILLIONS MORE kids to LOVE AMERICA again -- and won back an ENTIRE GENERATION in favor of FREEDOM and PATRIOTISM. Now, in 2025, you can help Turning Point USA do more than ever before, starting with this massive celebration of AMERICA'S GOLDEN AGE. **[Please, Friend, don't miss your chance: make your gift right away to secure your chance to join me and Turning Point USA for inauguration weekend.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zhsbe71cig7nk5j593emled6m7brg6uk7fd8oico_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i66o74cdh2bs)**
---
For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zjttbojbuftl82i52tfa5pdjr7538e3k59nv9p98_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i66o74cdh2bs)
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z2c92d67vpo90cemt9i3pltealup0ehr9gfa8ihg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i66o74cdh2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zphuhkehnda88e4ha7nhr862r4nb5ad43lb5k09g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i66o72cph2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8uugajpr1mmman1fiisrc3sn7ru4kuvruiu7680_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i66o72cph2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq4r14k6sobc1s7a26bru739k8r38bhvspu69nk8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i66o72cph2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1n8fdjogojnrenp1tilhql7u5hb9v42192nc5ho_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i66o72cph2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| 1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgnhnpgj0kjgdj8hi2rh37om46lj0dgn7k72gvuo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj0sdg64or246h22sh2s8i6epj3c5i66o72cph2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1b0nk72oec3o5844c9mtcsidlrltnm3l1qleb60_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i66o72cph2bs)_

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5b94c1sqblol34n5a940c0vlj2r1na9tfb3cjsg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i69pb2cdh2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5hhmp1ve5dt8aeo8amcahd4ujrjk39o37tgp79g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i69pb2cdh2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6t585g3fqfkndhqjpeqpu2qchbo8g0vq48di9k0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i69pb2cdh2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvat3389rqo5ud07if09a2e2et4fgc5qfshvv2ko_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i69pb2cdh2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztit5d0oouquc4denafj1pirbn6d952g0ng7ifk8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i69pb2cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq6d5iepon3dtnmqpq7d9neprqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshj61or0cphm49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5oh3jgq7kkb8lkgqthjfdjdllli5umi94554km0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5i69pb2cdh2bs)_

subject: RE: Your FREE tickets to Trump’s inauguration!

body:
Don’t miss this once in a lifetime opportunity.

Friend,

In just a few short days, President Trump will be sworn in as the 47th President of the United States...

_**[...And we want _YOU_ to be there standing by his side as we usher in a new golden age for America!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zo36mabl24dqm0hm861b2mmgr2tpopckhqkg7r58_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5h60ob4c5h2bs)**_

We'll also cover your hotel for the night!

body:

**Turning Point USA is offering one special supporter (and their guest) an ALL-EXPENSES-PAID trip for inauguration weekend** - a ONCE-IN-A-LIFETIME opportunity to be part of one of the most significant moments in modern American history. **[Friend, will you make a generous gift of $25, $50, $100, or more to support Turning Point USA before January 10th? We'll choose the supporter for this special giveaway on January 11th!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z40so50lsjpo5f1695plq3akdutateth3kg2rn30_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5h60ob4chh2bs)**

At Turning Point's AMERICAFEST in December, President Trump stood before thousands of young patriots and declared that a new era of AMERICAN GREATNESS was beginning. **[**Now YOU and your guest have the opportunity to potentially join Turning Point USA to celebrate INAUGURATION WEEKEND:**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7s9lcmbnm3eanitrv7vha2at3aou6u4dlmirv88_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5h60ob4chh2bs)**
* On SUNDAY midday, join President Trump's pre-inauguration event,

* On SUNDAY evening, enjoy VIP tickets to the Turning Point Inaugural Ball, and

* On MONDAY midday, attend the INAUGURATION of the 47th President in Washington, DC!

Plus, you'll receive round-trip flights to Washington, DC and luxury hotel accommodations for inauguration weekend. **Don't miss this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to be part of history, Friend.** **[Make your gift of $25, $50, $100, $250, or more by 11:59 PM ET on January 10th-- and you could be the special Turning Point USA supporter who wins this inauguration weekend celebration!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjfdk5oedn023mnh3jnh45an47339v4s8qno1lfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5h60ob4chh2bs)**

[ **Support Turning Point USA now**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqeilkv5smnn22gp6dsba1ms4mlpam80041uf1d8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5h60ob4chh2bs)
---
Thank YOU for your patriotism and your generous support. In 2024, we worked together to inspire MILLIONS MORE kids to LOVE AMERICA again -- and won back an ENTIRE GENERATION in favor of FREEDOM and PATRIOTISM. Now, in 2025, you can help Turning Point USA do more than ever before, starting with this massive celebration of AMERICA'S GOLDEN AGE. **[Please, Friend, don't miss your chance: make your gift right away to secure your chance to join me and Turning Point USA for inauguration weekend.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr18mlm9fmp1ru9lvfrlacd42d0hm8275ua4ej58_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5h60ob4chh2bs)**

For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Updates for Great Americans is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ztb0vskpe4lthej0krv14p5bh0s3otaaah8l6re0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5h60ob1clh2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zgpru5m7hmogoa7v3gk7vks0fsc73botb22htl3g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5h60ob1clh2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2za3bb47le7cnd4pn6nfnkuo5vcgrto8hc3kgcb6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5h60ob1clh2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zuarmjpn6c3h3asgeonolaa0pm30i4tlvsleeekg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5h60ob1clh2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvf2uvetmhlmqoe1i142ckse02hppgftrge5mgh0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjklo72d1hekr76dtiesp7ad1hegqracjkmoq37djjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj0sdg62pb246h22sh2s8i6epj3c5h60ob1clh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7poc7mmalb858jugetl64ojlqmvfu1nd0v3vrgg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5h60ob1clh2bs)_

[](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8ugdriaftglmtjbn9t7rd8vc9qc7ie4062d8rf0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5h60ob1clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Erika, 1776 Club
subject: We’re not waiting around for the Left to destroy everything we’ve worked so hard for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It’s time to take action

|
---
| | |
Friend,

You're part of a special group of Americans who still believe in the spirit of 1776. You know that our country was founded on timeless principles that are worth fighting for. We believe that too.

**[That's why we created the 1776 Club - a community of patriots who are committed to defending our nation's values and way of life.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc5u6uec1u3ujtkj0vcao1kd9tcclpo5a085f8o0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5h60ob1cph2bs "That's why we created the 1776 Club - a community of patriots who are committed to defending our nation's values and way of life.")**

It's the beginning of the year, which means your 2024 membership has expired. But don't worry **we have a 24 hour open-enrollment period for you to RENEW your membership and rejoin our prestigious ranks.**

We're not just talking about politics; we're talking about the kind of country we want to leave for our children and grandchildren. **_We want to preserve the freedom, liberty, and opportunity that have always made America great._**

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvrv0rmo66cr04f3dbar4krm0jqg416nlkv41g6o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5h60ob1cph2bs)
---
| | | [JOIN THE 1776 CLUB NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za0qq4tnr018mh2lb1ehu29g0lmu3ifj0q8jh0eo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5h60ob1cph2bs "Generic Button")
---

But we can't do it alone. **_We need people like you who are willing to stand up for what they believe in._** By joining the 1776 Club, you'll be part of a movement that's dedicated to protecting our country's heritage and promoting the values that have always made us strong.

So why not stay on the team? For just $17.76, you can renew your membership of the 1776 Club and start making a difference today. **You have to accept your renewal offer within 24 hours so please don 't dilly-dally on this. **

---
| | | [JOIN THE 1776 CLUB NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrrbc897lk8e6euj961ilc37p71bhtg9mq9om6go_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5h60ob1cph2bs "Generic Button")
---

Let's work together to build a brighter future for America.

Erika,
1776 Club
House GOP Headquarters

name: Trump Updates (via Senate GOP)
subject: Missing your name?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We’re giving you one last chance to sign Trump’s card before Inauguration Day.

Friend,

There are just a few days left until Inauguration Day!

**[Once President Trump is finished taking the oath of office, we plan to present him with our Inaugural Congratulatory Card signed by his top supporters.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd98s8i0gkvp2gjfbc4gtmpi06m1kik5q9v1jf7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5h62o34clh2bs)**

There's just one problem...

_**[The last time we checked, YOUR NAME wasn't on the card! ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl99kj3lgm74no4k596v2fggohsghu17ecv5jg80_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5h62o34clh2bs)**_

******************************************************[SIGN THE CARD](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmkkpk21sk4sor1oegkbj339q8fr97ck32p6hn5o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5h62o34clh2bs)******************************************************

The window to sign the card technically ended on December 31st.

**[But since you're among President Trump's biggest grassroots supporters, we've granted YOU a special extension until midnight tonight!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0vj12japm3upp7i16edf8k17puopr30srajdedg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5h62o34clh2bs)**

This is your **[LAST CHANCE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhf7qphfu76o2mes2vs83p555neov9us10r57f10_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5h62o34clh2bs)** to sign the card and stand with President Trump on this historic day for our country.

**[So please, sign our Inaugural Congratulatory Card for President Trump before 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to ensure your name is on it before inauguration Day.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z43iomcj2dm37jctitetq21uo7goi3ab7stph36g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5h62o34clh2bs)**

******************************************************[SIGN THE CARD](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp06t3chhn0412sbmralbr7qoq5vur4bf5ovb4f8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c5h62o34clh2bs)******************************************************

Thank you,

Senate GOP HQ

body:
Criminal referral to US atty..
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LSKZ-fcfA_BRgUTTfVVjLvDBUUbnO2qop2WhnrQpZA7-CviaIzsnVDjHPUBeKPJ-AvJ0OoTtZnV50ycTZlHjsAGCx82oUmfJ9xv8OK_PLpZnrJItWDnXBLvpEX3k91YQ5ayLQcBGC1KVPY_GiaIoLQ==&c=B-bt8Ms7-o9ev5s8hp6Bh8eTGJvXLtTGtmFZX5v_Khr852RzHEcpWA==&ch=Hn8CWaeplGdEiyFKaN3I55Rlb32fUPIYx5-TtLR3iHL2VfeCClf98w==)
---
| Dear Friends,
📣 MassGOP is calling for State Representative Chris Flanagan of the 1st Barnstable District to resign following his criminal referral to the U.S. Attorney's office for illegal campaign activities. 📣
From misleading voters into believing he had Republican support, to documented campaign finance violations, and now reports of tens of thousands allegedly being stolen - it's clear that trust has been lost and laws have most likely been broken by Rep. Flanagan.
Now, his pattern of illegal activity has escalated to the point of federal scrutiny. The jig is up, Flanagan!
---
| | [HELP US FIND HIS REPLACEMENT FUND CANDIDATE RECRUITMENT EFFORTS](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LSKZ-fcfA_BRgUTTfVVjLvDBUUbnO2qop2WhnrQpZA7-CviaIzsnVM49j9oDFHaIGLafP7pP9dD75U2amh865SnCSPA7QXKbtCxSb4Ksl29r-4FWo47wD7NNQ6Y3yt0vHS1chJrRaFygloXTEn8NdSdHQLaz1jkB70ICkvsWddEvfWEFviLRrQCTlz71iJdw&c=B-bt8Ms7-o9ev5s8hp6Bh8eTGJvXLtTGtmFZX5v_Khr852RzHEcpWA==&ch=Hn8CWaeplGdEiyFKaN3I55Rlb32fUPIYx5-TtLR3iHL2VfeCClf98w==)
---
| Rep. Flanagan epitomizes everything wrong with Democratic politics in Massachusetts. Rules for thee, but not for me...
Flanagan must resign immediately to uphold the integrity of the office he holds.
This is not a partisan issue; it's about restoring trust in our elected officials. But our call to action doesn't stop there. We must find and support Republican candidates committed to transparency, accountability, and doing the right thing, even when no one is looking. Especially then.
---
| | [FUND CANDIDATE RECRUITMENT EFFORTS](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LSKZ-fcfA_BRgUTTfVVjLvDBUUbnO2qop2WhnrQpZA7-CviaIzsnVM49j9oDFHaIGLafP7pP9dD75U2amh865SnCSPA7QXKbtCxSb4Ksl29r-4FWo47wD7NNQ6Y3yt0vHS1chJrRaFygloXTEn8NdSdHQLaz1jkB70ICkvsWddEvfWEFviLRrQCTlz71iJdw&c=B-bt8Ms7-o9ev5s8hp6Bh8eTGJvXLtTGtmFZX5v_Khr852RzHEcpWA==&ch=Hn8CWaeplGdEiyFKaN3I55Rlb32fUPIYx5-TtLR3iHL2VfeCClf98w==)
---
| Sincerely,
---
| | |
---

Amy Carnevale
Chair, MassGOP

P.S. - We aren't stopping on the Cape. Our comprehensive candidate recruitment events across the state in places like Fall River, Holyoke, Lawrence, and Worcester, will cover critical areas such as political strategy, data analysis, fundraising, and communications, equipping the best & the brightest in our communities with the tools and knowledge needed to run and to win. These trainings are FREE to attend thanks to the generous support of folks like you. Dear Peter,

We Americans are heirs to one of history's greatest legacies, and it is our duty to restore the foundations of liberty, justice, and self-governance—not just for ourselves, but for future generations and all who seek freedom. We face a bloated bureaucracy and a population increasingly dependent on public handouts. Read this [**article**](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VW6_yt2WwnF9W7DJ_mx4BxqxkW3_3yVc5qCdx-N70Sktd3m2ndW7lCdLW6lZ3n4W6Qntvk4mmyhTW5yzNrl3kTSK6V-wgWD6Wc3PrW4f29c23XT_P8W8cF4MX1hdjkKW3dDBqb1s0xqWW17zKm22dT3VNW4b-4DQ2QsDQRW28lXvg7VyX-xW6Y539f56PxrgW6wKVkv81TthfW5QrL2k6x-_2PN7zchRzkGTw-W20qrXr4rpXVTW5qPfHW3Q3GZZW5sHxxj57lTTkW1MMmz37KyKG_W2Jc6YQ6jhJ8LW2pDMR76RkYrLW63sNGN7lbpvKW7d8fgF1s3bgGVxnNQ93LFctpW4dqfLf5mY1q5W2TQGHz53rQtgf14ptvM04) to discover how our government has undermined our natural needs for meaning, connection, and mutual support. United Sovereign Americans' ultimate goal is to reclaim our liberty, curb unchecked power, and halt this march toward tyranny. The time to renew America’s promise as a beacon of hope and a fortress of liberty is now.
---

United Sovereign Americans is filing additional lawsuits based on the Constitution and the law, with top civil rights attorneys pursuing patterns of election corruption uncovered in multiple states. We will demand accountability—and we will prevail. You can view our Election Validity Score Card graphs, our 2022 Election Fraud Report and our Vote Washing Report summaries for 2020 and 2022 [here](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VW6_yt2WwnF9W7DJ_mx4BxqxkW3_3yVc5qCdx-N70SksY3m2ndW6N1vHY6lZ3p_W4JM0SR4x_jxjW3DsT4t7LMbRzN3nXBlwJ4bXVW3FwFZG5ygV7HVvQmdN3wyM44W97GcSt96bWGlVJ8wmg5FLyD7W31rcyn1J6Lg_W9llVn65K3_gYN8TG-ZL711hQW7RYwlp2yTFxfW7js4YN8qqdFhN2z902NDQJ9qN3_TpGXHvgkHW9d1Ttp919HKLW1VJlbV3rlWmXW51_y-v66zDDQW3JxNXY19tZ0zW55d2Rj63cW2GN4wdL23kyhmLW1HM2q93M61btW5KXwtw6c0rcwdYNgjW04).

Check out these media highlights.
* Marly Hornik, CEO of United Sovereign Americans, delivers a clear message in this [interview](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VW6_yt2WwnF9W7DJ_mx4BxqxkW3_3yVc5qCdx-N70Sks25kBVqW50kH_H6lZ3mVN5fHjLPfjk1SW1RLB4h3XVV-8W2gDpwW8Vw5GNMmsS1R2KL2DW79c0Wk1jx9l_W1TcGMW7s2PFtVWyp932ScgF7W2JG-zs47B4qjN706c6TWR8Z3W25nHNm8VXg2QV3YJzF5VRDJKW1ZHfs572X81gW70kMWx2Kpsh3VMHXrG7gLR0YN5xRFSkgQMb7W9lL0VN39B2ykW48Tw-W6dzmH1W5c5Nzd7PctH-W7P8glQ75RCtJN2WByCNJL771W3pY5CB6DMvMYW8JLCNr153lSBW7gDR7H2J2y8kW6j3Rt47C9J8vW1cpGqp4dc5V8W8D7q8D7kH9zWW3p41dW8YWVKWW2Z_wVd2lVB3BVCzzHy7hBCq5W6pYhG67mrs-pW5YVGv32Gp99lVwvmW37ZDRRNf5xqGq004) from January 8, 2025: Protecting the sanctity of our vote requires vigilance, and bold, proactive steps to secure the future of our nation.

* Listen to the urgent message from Harry Haury, Chairman of United Sovereign Americans, in this [interview](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VW6_yt2WwnF9W7DJ_mx4BxqxkW3_3yVc5qCdx-N70Sks25kBVqW50kH_H6lZ3mgW5l5r9r3fvJfwW2lLK_x6dW_9hW1xS8VJ1NZFx0W28-CCX9dRgXVW9fPmxP49wylfW6sll8X2fP28WW54T7qz83qv1NW7r8n2H3V-xQTW8_z7wJ18WSDWW7HrNQM1KqvmxW2gMCmj8hC730W7Y1jFv5QyR_gW5tF8Xm14ddrYW2zdxKJ8jslV0W520kWD4pMPXfW3w0FKP3GPD19W70BWDW6Jy-pcW5bByd41ycXxcW8CfGmM63wRBwW49x8WL5gZQLvW8TKksH1j07RjN1k4MWWw8ZP2W8VN9zF57N-8PW4Z6P-83ShWNVW2L-8LH96-WJ8W3_LRGJ2F9Xg4W21yyCC696TDwN1S8qvwTmr-xW54n5n65XzT1MV9tBSh7YHWYCW1rNmz_21dqtyW8r1bNj3_mWLcdhc-T404) from January 8: Sweeping election reform is required to restore the public trust.
