# "How The Tariff Wars Could Impact Your Retirement Savings"

---
|
---
My Fellow American, As a retiree, you've spent a lifetime building your nest egg. But what if it’s more vulnerable than you think? Economic changes, like tariffs proposed by President-elect Donald Trump, could disrupt the financial stability you've worked so hard to achieve. Here’s how tariffs might jeopardize your retirement:
---
* **Stock Market Chaos:** Trade wars could send stock markets tumbling, wiping out years of growth in a matter of days.
* **Skyrocketing Prices:** Inflation caused by tariffs could drain your savings faster than you expect, leaving you unprepared for future expenses.
* **Shrinking Bond Values:** If interest rates spike, the value of your bond investments could plummet, eroding your safety net.
* **Recession Risks:** Economic slowdowns caused by tariffs may slash your income streams, making it harder to sustain your lifestyle.
* **Portfolio Pitfalls:** Without diversification, entire sectors of your investments could collapse, leaving you exposed to devastating losses.

---
**The Reality:**
Without preparation, your hard-earned savings could face serious threats. [Complimentary Guide](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19675/6374453/d7c82fb47abd54861c6e5f64af38270c1f734103/6c257b64bfd40f69939b39bfcdfc2fcabe9cb47f) explains how to move assets into Gold and shield wealth from market volatility. Imagine watching your nest egg shrink while the cost of everyday necessities continues to rise. **What You Can Do:**
Don’t wait for the worst to happen. Here’s how you can protect your savings:
---
* **Diversify Your Investments:** Reduce stakes in stocks, bonds, ETF's and own **precious metals like gold** , which often retain value during economic downturns.
* **Maintain a Cash Reserve:** Keep a portion of your savings in cash or cash-equivalents for liquidity and stability (like Gold) in volatile markets.
* **Hedge Against Inflation:** Gold and Silver can help shield your savings from the damaging effects of rising prices.
* **Rebalance Regularly:** Consistently review your portfolio and adjust as necessary to ensure it matches your goals and risk tolerance.

---
**Why Choose Monetary Gold For Your Precious Metals:** With over 100 years of expertise, **Monetary Gold** offers retirees a trusted way to safeguard their savings. Grab this [Complimentary Guide.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19675/6374453/ab5040cdb28ab884813ab863e60e5ffa99b43adf/6c257b64bfd40f69939b39bfcdfc2fcabe9cb47f) It explains how to move assets into Gold and shield wealth from market volatility. Time is running out. Don’t wait until your savings are gone. Call **[(888) 411-GOLD(4653)](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19675/6374453/15c81fb1b243cab619e8c5e48b46956e45c5f82e/6c257b64bfd40f69939b39bfcdfc2fcabe9cb47f)** today to secure your guide and take control of your financial future. Time may not be on your side—take action now to shield your retirement from the unexpected.

|
# AMANDA CHASE
---
|
# VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER
---
| Dear Hello
As of today, the General Assembly will now gavel in on Monday, January 13 at 9:30am for a Joint Assembly to hear the Governor's State of the Union address. You can watch by clicking [this link](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oqawRacNVx2bjVfrc3nGn-BTPax5vS_DiKnyf5eLvbNdHV_7OS9m6qqtOxGDGzhPhCipyat27pzrjUIVWKODzucKcNl-pHc-oeqlyC7qv_RbzOpI8O6F1XrdjlbRk5oCiJfBjEZ531gcXjBc39gaj5PQVykFZkeH5FyrMoz6D0BPVqfIzUnUSxEeI_hu4YgGjLscNnmokGAn7uBGWp08Fg==&c=QgfOohY3ltCbKE4dd_swqJYSkUV5QgttxaFIa_sj2jEnBmChdykA9w==&ch=kSZHPZNomzj2zF8BcX3V093WHCpxBx5f-Y4MQkjw40nyCWhojVTtUg==).
The number of authoritarian bills that are coming before the General Assembly on Monday are both sobering and frightening. We need to resist making Virginia like California.
Together, we can do that one committee and one bill at a time.
My goal is to raise awareness so you can organize your network of influence to push back and defeat these bills. I'll give you the tools to do just that.
Did you know that you can watch your Virginia General Assembly in action again on Monday?
Just click the links below to watch a committee meeting or session.
Reading over the bills will leave you with a sense of urgency to "do something." We have to stop a number of these bills, which are mind blowing mandates that make no sense. I've listed a few of those for you.
I've also included a reasonable bill sponsored by Republican Senator Richard Stuart to give you hope that there are some freedom loving legislators working hard for us.
You can actually call in while the committee is meeting and state whether you support or oppose each of the bills on the docket and briefly explain your position.
Some people prefer to go in person.
Due to the thousands of bills that will come before the House and the Senate, I will be following the Senate calendar. If a bill passes the House, it will be reviewed by the Senate after crossover.
Most activities that take place on the first day of session will be postponed until Monday, including Governor Youngkin's State of the Commonwealth address.
If you would like to tune to Monday's committee meetings or session, you can do so using the links below.
---
| |
---
|
---
While this publication is free, your contributions are greatly appreciated.
While this is a labor of love, I do have hundreds of dollars in expense each month to bring this service to you.
Any contribution is greatly appreciated to offset the cost of providing it. Thank you in advance.
We must now save Virginia. Let's do this.
---
| 2025 Session: Continued to Monday, January 13, 2025 at 9:30am
---
| | | |
---
|
# LOCAL GOVERNMENTS COMMITTEE
---
|
# Raises for the Board of Supervisors QUADRUPLED?!!
---
|
### SB762 Supervisors, boards of; increases statutory salary caps for certain counties.
Introduced by: [Tammy Brankley Mulchi (Chief Patron)](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oqawRacNVx2bjVfrc3nGn-BTPax5vS_DiKnyf5eLvbNdHV_7OS9m6uuDXuLznPL-6EdTx97cID6_9D0Mc6ZF6iuQgwwdUflkfpfFtKlbkoxkMlJko7WkX-TZqm216AZL60NVpAsHaBVvfgArHIQSeT0-EZqZSXfv0CkvOCT4lLf35HTjhEfAfV_NNAtxMD4vAWi5Q2uT7TjyqfuZkRPMrs-RHQx2DR_XipQSjgjklK1WxC4FvOsFuQ==&c=QgfOohY3ltCbKE4dd_swqJYSkUV5QgttxaFIa_sj2jEnBmChdykA9w==&ch=kSZHPZNomzj2zF8BcX3V093WHCpxBx5f-Y4MQkjw40nyCWhojVTtUg==)
Salaries of boards of supervisors for certain counties. Increases the statutory salary caps for boards of supervisors of counties that have adopted salary limits consistent with provisions in the Code of Virginia relating to alternative procedures for establishing salaries of boards of supervisors.
1.Alternative procedure for establishing salaries of boards of supervisors; limits; fringe benefits. In lieu of other provisions of law, the boards of supervisors of the several counties may establish annually, by ordinance, and pay in monthly installments each of their members an annual salary pursuant to the following procedure and schedule:
1\. On a date determined by the board of supervisors, not earlier than May 1 nor later than June 30 each year, the board, after public hearing pursuant to notice in the manner and form provided in §§ 15.2-1426 and 15.2-1427, shall establish by ordinance the salary of its members for the ensuing fiscal year not to exceed the maximums herein set out.
2\. Counties within the following population brackets shall be allowed to set salaries for board members not to exceed the following amounts:
Population Annual Salary 200,000 and over $15,000 to $52,000
105,000 to 199,999 $13,000 to $47,000
80,000 to 104,999 $11,000 to $43,000
50,000 to 79,999 $9,000 $34,000
25,000 to 49,999 $7,000 to $22,000
15,000 to 24,999 $5,500 to $21,000
14,999 and under 4,000 $20,000
The maximum annual salaries herein provided may be adjusted in any year or years, by ordinance as above provided, by an inflation factor not to exceed five percent.
3\. Any board of supervisors may fix, by ordinance as above provided, annually an additional sum to be paid as hereinabove provided to the chairman and vice-chairman of the board not to exceed $1,800 and $1,200, respectively, without regard to the maximum salary limits.
4\. In addition to and without regard for the salary limits herein set out, any board of supervisors by resolution may grant to its members any or all of the fringe benefits in the manner and form as such benefits are provided for county employees or any of them.

---
|
# Preferential Treatment for Minority Owned and Women Owned Businesses
---
|
### SB872 Charter; City of Portsmouth.
Introduced by: [L. Louise Lucas (Chief Patron)](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oqawRacNVx2bjVfrc3nGn-BTPax5vS_DiKnyf5eLvbNdHV_7OS9m6uuDXuLznPL-85UOBZr9mNKhuREJ0gNItR2VY7VpM5XY9c4H95TTAWMVW_P2K30HHQgnMMY0GA-3XnZV0SxnvNueiyPtdPYGMmhKq7LbO3E9L-CqGGphSpKZYEicIbwhm3JPtz2w6qJP4Uwgxd9LHUiIGP9ru3dH8BDePHtcZcIEm1Y8fitRS4fisGRyt13sSQ==&c=QgfOohY3ltCbKE4dd_swqJYSkUV5QgttxaFIa_sj2jEnBmChdykA9w==&ch=kSZHPZNomzj2zF8BcX3V093WHCpxBx5f-Y4MQkjw40nyCWhojVTtUg==) Charter; City of Portsmouth. Amends the charter for the City of Portsmouth by authorizing the City Manager to require city departments to implement appropriate enhancement or remedial measures consistent with prevailing law wherever there exists (i) a compelling government interest, (ii) an analysis that documents a statistically significant disparity between the availability and utilization of minority-owned and women-owned businesses, or (iii) direct evidence by minority-owned businesses or women-owned businesses of the impact of race by discrimination.

---
|
# Preferential Treatment Based on Income?
---
|
### SB839 Zoning; by-right multifamily development in areas zoned for commercial use.
Introduced by: [Schuyler T. VanValkenburg (Chief Patron)](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oqawRacNVx2bjVfrc3nGn-BTPax5vS_DiKnyf5eLvbNdHV_7OS9m6uuDXuLznPL-pjzMgxKKrGe4qUO7sc1hFePcP0EJ9bTw5krQLWu2xkPKwIFM9tM9sdRUU4fXASFZQWX-0JqbHNX0ya_FKWWVzWadf5VPIYMU75aHVU8grDpHoEoFadX2j19UeUZxR7So1ZxNWSFcvnhQOTruZivuMbNIkq90JGt4oftqmLWSUvNX3n4B5AcD5g==&c=QgfOohY3ltCbKE4dd_swqJYSkUV5QgttxaFIa_sj2jEnBmChdykA9w==&ch=kSZHPZNomzj2zF8BcX3V093WHCpxBx5f-Y4MQkjw40nyCWhojVTtUg==) Zoning; by-right multifamily development in areas zoned for commercial use. Requires a locality to provide in its zoning ordinance provisions allowing for the by-right development and construction of multifamily residential uses on all land contained in commercial or business zoning district classifications.
The bill provides that the review and approval of such development shall be done administratively by the locality's staff and that any residential development that dedicates a minimum of 10 percent of the total number of housing units to households with a household income at or below 80 percent of the area median income shall be granted an accelerated plan review and permit approval process by the locality's staff.

---
|
# Want to Harvest Your Own Rainwater? Beware

# Local Government Mandating Connection to Water Supply
---
|
### SB851 Local ordinances for the use of certain rainwater harvesting systems.
Introduced by: [J.D. "Danny" Diggs (Chief Patron)](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oqawRacNVx2bjVfrc3nGn-BTPax5vS_DiKnyf5eLvbNdHV_7OS9m6uuDXuLznPL-OGARdZ8LrgBzGvtxRFxLblUMFV-x8hNziFD9kR7tkATyy4pY-wspO7AdyjZyRtAH3yDn0KjYu9_24yxM18lqCWK0aaAQ0-g5Xqa5XzYiVZykkpicIau4ap5cup_ymJcldjuRAhuEabJl9sjPmumNgAxAvvyqz9JDdpJEEh6lVqLdW3KSbZh9gA==&c=QgfOohY3ltCbKE4dd_swqJYSkUV5QgttxaFIa_sj2jEnBmChdykA9w==&ch=kSZHPZNomzj2zF8BcX3V093WHCpxBx5f-Y4MQkjw40nyCWhojVTtUg==) Local ordinances for the use of certain rainwater harvesting systems. Provides that existing local ordinances adopted prior to July 1, 2025, governing rainwater harvesting systems, shall continue in force; however, in the event of a conflict between a Board of Health regulation and a local ordinance adopted prior to July 1, 2025, the Board regulation shall govern, except when the conflicting local ordinance is more stringent. The bill prohibits a locality from adopting any local ordinance requiring owners of Tier 4 rainwater harvesting systems to connect to any municipal water supply or impose any penalty, including condemnation proceedings, on such owner for failing to connect to a municipal water supply.

---
|
# Statewide Mandate of 7.5%
# Housing Growth?!?!
---
|
### SB975 Statewide housing targets for localities.
Introduced by: [Schuyler T. VanValkenburg (Chief Patron)](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oqawRacNVx2bjVfrc3nGn-BTPax5vS_DiKnyf5eLvbNdHV_7OS9m6uuDXuLznPL-pjzMgxKKrGe4qUO7sc1hFePcP0EJ9bTw5krQLWu2xkPKwIFM9tM9sdRUU4fXASFZQWX-0JqbHNX0ya_FKWWVzWadf5VPIYMU75aHVU8grDpHoEoFadX2j19UeUZxR7So1ZxNWSFcvnhQOTruZivuMbNIkq90JGt4oftqmLWSUvNX3n4B5AcD5g==&c=QgfOohY3ltCbKE4dd_swqJYSkUV5QgttxaFIa_sj2jEnBmChdykA9w==&ch=kSZHPZNomzj2zF8BcX3V093WHCpxBx5f-Y4MQkjw40nyCWhojVTtUg==)
Statewide housing targets for localities. Requires localities to increase their total housing stock by at least 7.5 percent over the five-year period beginning January 1, 2026.
The bill provides that, in order to meet the 7.5 percent growth target, a locality shall develop a housing growth plan that best meets the needs of the locality and may include any of various listed housing growth strategies.
The bill further provides that, after January 1, 2031, an applicant who seeks local government approval for a residential development that will have the effect of increasing the supply of housing in a locality and has that application rejected may, in addition to other remedies, appeal such decision to the Housing Approval Board, which shall be established by the Director of the Department of Housing and Community Development.
The bill authorizes the Housing Approval Board to overturn local decisions and approve applications under certain circumstances. However, if the Housing Approval Board determines that a locality has in good faith implemented at least three of the housing growth strategies listed in the bill and has not rejected more than 25 percent of new housing development proposals over the previous five years, the Housing Approval Board shall allow the local decision to stand.
Finally, the bill provides that the Housing Approval Board shall give extra weight for increases in affordable housing and for the rehabilitation of current, underutilized housing stock.

---
|
# COURTS OF JUSTICE COMMITTEE
---
|
# GUN BILLS COMING UP MONDAY
---
|
### SB744 Firearm transfers to another person from a prohibited person.
Introduced by: [Barbara A. Favola (Chief Patron)](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oqawRacNVx2bjVfrc3nGn-BTPax5vS_DiKnyf5eLvbNdHV_7OS9m6uuDXuLznPL-aECpAy3uQY3p33F3GPlFARNSUyvLNAEHaDPtwUijVDpRkWhlWNjB8FIb0yWWNXuYgXxiUIm9HM1EXYgOnjFsCgkesdRMkcXRIvDJ3Zs-U9MEDINouvGZPjUcQiTNz_vGInLQfOo2DKxV0wQubi7JCVQPSHJwEvhsCqjNP_7gGye14ph0hXYzdA==&c=QgfOohY3ltCbKE4dd_swqJYSkUV5QgttxaFIa_sj2jEnBmChdykA9w==&ch=kSZHPZNomzj2zF8BcX3V093WHCpxBx5f-Y4MQkjw40nyCWhojVTtUg==)
Firearm transfers to another person from a prohibited person. Provides that a person who is prohibited from possessing a firearm because such person is subject to a protective order or has been convicted of an assault and battery of a family or household member may transfer a firearm owned by such prohibited person to any person who is not otherwise prohibited
The bill also provides that such prohibited person who transfers, sells, or surrenders a firearm pursuant to the provisions of the bill shall inform the clerk of the court of the name and address of the transferee, the federally licensed firearms dealer, or the law-enforcement agency in possession of the firearm and shall provide a copy of such form to the transferee.
The bill also provides that a person who is prohibited from possessing a firearm because such person is subject to a protective order or has been convicted of an assault and battery of a family or household member shall be advised that a law-enforcement officer may obtain a search warrant to search for any firearms from such person if such law-enforcement officer has reason to believe that such person has not relinquished all firearms in his possession.

### SB837 Concealed handgun permits; minimum age requirement.
Introduced by: [Glen H. Sturtevant, Jr. (Chief Patron)](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oqawRacNVx2bjVfrc3nGn-BTPax5vS_DiKnyf5eLvbNdHV_7OS9m6uuDXuLznPL-2XgIvRwMGnTw3MefB4gYv1zOFBpC84XUEuAMaKVFcvblPIbkQ8oxoVA8f83q3Ztp53iTAxiTfJpWDhICUy7Q7F-RGfwodflneerjr3SXJMHZ8RJhSjWzYQFIVe3vreXxt0k_DaRkjQO1H4vM2gles8PnCK57lP8V1jNCijKaAVEyBj2tjxzqXw==&c=QgfOohY3ltCbKE4dd_swqJYSkUV5QgttxaFIa_sj2jEnBmChdykA9w==&ch=kSZHPZNomzj2zF8BcX3V093WHCpxBx5f-Y4MQkjw40nyCWhojVTtUg==) Concealed handgun permits; minimum age requirement. Reduces from 21 years of age to 18 years of age the minimum age requirement for resident and nonresident concealed handgun permits.

### SB848 Purchase of certain firearms; age requirement; penalty.
Introduced by: [Saddam Azlan Salim (Chief Patron)](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oqawRacNVx2bjVfrc3nGn-BTPax5vS_DiKnyf5eLvbNdHV_7OS9m6uuDXuLznPL-nCa5S-muVqCHCBXYFThnOYC8xZSSTLwxUbHdINR6kAA2-kfQ7BWqEdeMM-AzVJmjY3PgPNa2Kx4zkuPOPvvVwvXmgH6TDVgs3SqyDmc0xEOaBu7GHo5CKiKgnd1KdGdZ6Iv3qFCBF3EFpcTp8yaFY1MZpt8qOO58woYX8pEYvCA9HlrS3uu0JA==&c=QgfOohY3ltCbKE4dd_swqJYSkUV5QgttxaFIa_sj2jEnBmChdykA9w==&ch=kSZHPZNomzj2zF8BcX3V093WHCpxBx5f-Y4MQkjw40nyCWhojVTtUg==) Purchase of certain firearms; age requirement; penalty. Prohibits any person under 21 years of age from purchasing a handgun or assault firearm, with exceptions for the purchase of an assault firearm by a law-enforcement officer, correctional officer, jail officer, or member of the Armed Forces of the United States, the Virginia National Guard, or the National Guard of any other state. Accordingly, the bill prohibits a licensed dealer from selling, renting, trading, or transferring from his inventory a handgun or assault firearm to any person under 21 years of age. A violation of either prohibition is a Class 6 felony. The bill also expands the definition of "assault firearm" as the term applies to criminal history record information checks.

### SB849 Nonresident concealed handgun permits.
Introduced by: [J.D. "Danny" Diggs (Chief Patron)](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oqawRacNVx2bjVfrc3nGn-BTPax5vS_DiKnyf5eLvbNdHV_7OS9m6uuDXuLznPL-OGARdZ8LrgBzGvtxRFxLblUMFV-x8hNziFD9kR7tkATyy4pY-wspO7AdyjZyRtAH3yDn0KjYu9_24yxM18lqCWK0aaAQ0-g5Xqa5XzYiVZykkpicIau4ap5cup_ymJcldjuRAhuEabJl9sjPmumNgAxAvvyqz9JDdpJEEh6lVqLdW3KSbZh9gA==&c=QgfOohY3ltCbKE4dd_swqJYSkUV5QgttxaFIa_sj2jEnBmChdykA9w==&ch=kSZHPZNomzj2zF8BcX3V093WHCpxBx5f-Y4MQkjw40nyCWhojVTtUg==) Nonresident concealed handgun permits. Requires the Department of State Police to immediately issue a nonresident concealed handgun permit after 90 days from the receipt of the application for such permit if, within that 90-day period, the Department has not issued such permit or determined that the applicant is disqualified from receiving such permit. The bill further requires the Department to revoke such permit if the applicant is later found by the Department to be disqualified from receiving such permit.

# Making Sure Data Centers
# Estimate Water Need
---

### SB899 Zoning; data centers; water use.
Introduced by: [Richard H. Stuart (Chief Patron)](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oqawRacNVx2bjVfrc3nGn-BTPax5vS_DiKnyf5eLvbNdHV_7OS9m6uuDXuLznPL-5M0xhK20BKhNrq9AvgqHQSM5PBH6IiUYEIOUT4VTlfzS5v-nJNpJbwYz7vLShV4xD8U98_Oi48Yy8CXzVwhLE6mDDyVOStD4L-sSWUx3i1pPMBl7tgGJA2roUeajeD1rXHxYcuZvYE6JQ1GLZOls6ryCehxT9qf6_4KxAdoc9Z40teqx27LrjA==&c=QgfOohY3ltCbKE4dd_swqJYSkUV5QgttxaFIa_sj2jEnBmChdykA9w==&ch=kSZHPZNomzj2zF8BcX3V093WHCpxBx5f-Y4MQkjw40nyCWhojVTtUg==) Zoning; data centers; water use. Authorizes a locality to include in its zoning ordinance provisions for (i) requiring proposed data center developments to submit water use estimates and (ii) considering water use when making rezoning and special use permit decisions related to data center development

Bills that say "failed" are bills that are continued from last year. Focus on bills that say "in committee." | == | == | == | AMANDA CHASE | VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER | Dear Hello As of today, the General Assembly will now gavel in on Monday, January 13 at 9:30am for a Joint Assembly to hear the Governor's State of the Union address. You can watch by clicking ==. The number of authoritarian bills that are coming before the General Assembly on Monday are both sobering and frightening. We need to resist making Virginia like California. Together, we can do that one committee and one bill at a time. My goal is to raise awareness so you can organize your network of influence to push back and defeat these bills. I'll give you the tools to do just that. Did you know that you can watch your Virginia General Assembly in action again on Monday? Just click the links below to watch a committee meeting or session. Reading over the bills will leave you with a sense of urgency to "do something." We have to stop a number of these bills, which are mind blowing mandates that make no sense. I've listed a few of those for you. I've also included a reasonable bill sponsored by Republican Senator Richard Stuart to give you hope that there are some freedom loving legislators working hard for us. You can actually call in while the committee is meeting and state whether you support or oppose each of the bills on the docket and briefly explain your position. Some people prefer to go in person. Due to the thousands of bills that will come before the House and the Senate, I will be following the Senate calendar. If a bill passes the House, it will be reviewed by the Senate after crossover. Most activities that take place on the first day of session will be postponed until Monday, including Governor Youngkin's State of the Commonwealth address. If you would like to tune to Monday's committee meetings or session, you can do so using the links below. | | | While this publication is free, your contributions are greatly appreciated. While this is a labor of love, I do have hundreds of dollars in expense each month to bring this service to you. Any contribution is greatly appreciated to offset the cost of providing it. Thank you in advance. We must now save Virginia. Let's do this. | 2025 Session: Continued to Monday, January 13, 2025 at 9:30am | | | | | LOCAL GOVERNMENTS COMMITTEE | Raises for the Board of Supervisors QUADRUPLED?!! | SB762 Supervisors, boards of; increases statutory salary caps for certain counties. Introduced by: == Salaries of boards of supervisors for certain counties. Increases the statutory salary caps for boards of supervisors of counties that have adopted salary limits consistent with provisions in the Code of Virginia relating to alternative procedures for establishing salaries of boards of supervisors. 1.Alternative procedure for establishing salaries of boards of supervisors; limits; fringe benefits. In lieu of other provisions of law, the boards of supervisors of the several counties may establish annually, by ordinance, and pay in monthly installments each of their members an annual salary pursuant to the following procedure and schedule: 1\. On a date determined by the board of supervisors, not earlier than May 1 nor later than June 30 each year, the board, after public hearing pursuant to notice in the manner and form provided in §§ 15.2-1426 and 15.2-1427, shall establish by ordinance the salary of its members for the ensuing fiscal year not to exceed the maximums herein set out. 2\. Counties within the following population brackets shall be allowed to set salaries for board members not to exceed the following amounts: Population Annual Salary 200,000 and over $15,000 to $52,000 105,000 to 199,999 $13,000 to $47,000 80,000 to 104,999 $11,000 to $43,000 50,000 to 79,999 $9,000 $34,000 25,000 to 49,999 $7,000 to $22,000 15,000 to 24,999 $5,500 to $21,000 14,999 and under 4,000 $20,000 The maximum annual salaries herein provided may be adjusted in any year or years, by ordinance as above provided, by an inflation factor not to exceed five percent. 3\. Any board of supervisors may fix, by ordinance as above provided, annually an additional sum to be paid as hereinabove provided to the chairman and vice-chairman of the board not to exceed $1,800 and $1,200, respectively, without regard to the maximum salary limits. 4\. In addition to and without regard for the salary limits herein set out, any board of supervisors by resolution may grant to its members any or all of the fringe benefits in the manner and form as such benefits are provided for county employees or any of them. | Preferential Treatment for Minority Owned and Women Owned Businesses | SB872 Charter; City of Portsmouth. Introduced by: == Charter; City of Portsmouth. Amends the charter for the City of Portsmouth by authorizing the City Manager to require city departments to implement appropriate enhancement or remedial measures consistent with prevailing law wherever there exists (i) a compelling government interest, (ii) an analysis that documents a statistically significant disparity between the availability and utilization of minority-owned and women-owned businesses, or (iii) direct evidence by minority-owned businesses or women-owned businesses of the impact of race by discrimination. | Preferential Treatment Based on Income? | SB839 Zoning; by-right multifamily development in areas zoned for commercial use. Introduced by: == Zoning; by-right multifamily development in areas zoned for commercial use. Requires a locality to provide in its zoning ordinance provisions allowing for the by-right development and construction of multifamily residential uses on all land contained in commercial or business zoning district classifications. The bill provides that the review and approval of such development shall be done administratively by the locality's staff and that any residential development that dedicates a minimum of 10 percent of the total number of housing units to households with a household income at or below 80 percent of the area median income shall be granted an accelerated plan review and permit approval process by the locality's staff. | Want to Harvest Your Own Rainwater? Beware Local Government Mandating Connection to Water Supply | SB851 Local ordinances for the use of certain rainwater harvesting systems. Introduced by: == Local ordinances for the use of certain rainwater harvesting systems. Provides that existing local ordinances adopted prior to July 1, 2025, governing rainwater harvesting systems, shall continue in force; however, in the event of a conflict between a Board of Health regulation and a local ordinance adopted prior to July 1, 2025, the Board regulation shall govern, except when the conflicting local ordinance is more stringent. The bill prohibits a locality from adopting any local ordinance requiring owners of Tier 4 rainwater harvesting systems to connect to any municipal water supply or impose any penalty, including condemnation proceedings, on such owner for failing to connect to a municipal water supply. | Statewide Mandate of 7.5% Housing Growth?!?! | SB975 Statewide housing targets for localities. Introduced by: == Statewide housing targets for localities. Requires localities to increase their total housing stock by at least 7.5 percent over the five-year period beginning January 1, 2026. The bill provides that, in order to meet the 7.5 percent growth target, a locality shall develop a housing growth plan that best meets the needs of the locality and may include any of various listed housing growth strategies. The bill authorizes the Housing Approval Board to overturn local decisions and approve applications under certain circumstances. However, if the Housing Approval Board determines that a locality has in good faith implemented at least three of the housing growth strategies listed in the bill and has not rejected more than 25 percent of new housing development proposals over the previous five years, the Housing Approval Board shall allow the local decision to stand. Finally, the bill provides that the Housing Approval Board shall give extra weight for increases in affordable housing and for the rehabilitation of current, underutilized housing stock. | COURTS OF JUSTICE COMMITTEE | GUN BILLS COMING UP MONDAY | SB744 Firearm transfers to another person from a prohibited person. Provides that a person who is prohibited from possessing a firearm because such person is subject to a protective order or has been convicted of an assault and battery of a family or household member may transfer a firearm owned by such prohibited person to any person who is not otherwise prohibited The bill also provides that such prohibited person who transfers, sells, or surrenders a firearm pursuant to the provisions of the bill shall inform the clerk of the court of the name and address of the transferee, the federally licensed firearms dealer, or the law-enforcement agency in possession of the firearm and shall provide a copy of such form to the transferee. The bill also provides that a person who is prohibited from possessing a firearm because such person is subject to a protective order or has been convicted of an assault and battery of a family or household member shall be advised that a law-enforcement officer may obtain a search warrant to search for any firearms from such person if such law-enforcement officer has reason to believe that such person has not relinquished all firearms in his possession. SB837 Concealed handgun permits; minimum age requirement. Introduced by: == Concealed handgun permits; minimum age requirement. Reduces from 21 years of age to 18 years of age the minimum age requirement for resident and nonresident concealed handgun permits. SB848 Purchase of certain firearms; age requirement; penalty. Introduced by: == Purchase of certain firearms; age requirement; penalty. Prohibits any person under 21 years of age from purchasing a handgun or assault firearm, with exceptions for the purchase of an assault firearm by a law-enforcement officer, correctional officer, jail officer, or member of the Armed Forces of the United States, the Virginia National Guard, or the National Guard of any other state. Accordingly, the bill prohibits a licensed dealer from selling, renting, trading, or transferring from his inventory a handgun or assault firearm to any person under 21 years of age. A violation of either prohibition is a Class 6 felony. The bill also expands the definition of "assault firearm" as the term applies to criminal history record information checks. SB849 Nonresident concealed handgun permits. Introduced by: == Nonresident concealed handgun permits. Requires the Department of State Police to immediately issue a nonresident concealed handgun permit after 90 days from the receipt of the application for such permit if, within that 90-day period, the Department has not issued such permit or determined that the applicant is disqualified from receiving such permit. The bill further requires the Department to revoke such permit if the applicant is later found by the Department to be disqualified from receiving such permit. | Making Sure Data Centers Estimate Water Need | SB899 Zoning; data centers; water use. body:
I set an ambitious goal

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Peter, I set an ambitious goal for our January mid-month deadline. It’s my first goal as a Congressman, and I want to start on a high note.

Unfortunately, we’re pacing to finish thousands short of this crucial goal. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter. I know I can count on a supporter like you to chip in and help us dig out of this hole. **[**Will you chip in now to help me crush the first goal of 2025?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-v4RvPDc1Lj5YxPMPw)**
---
[ CHIP IN NOW](https://trk.emails.troydowning._C65V5HtA)
---
If we can reach this goal, we will send a message to the Washington Establishment that we are ready for change.

Thank you,
Troy Downing
---

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Trump's Response to California Wildfires: Drill Baby, Drill
body:
Short terms profits in exchange for the health of our planet. This is the MAGA way.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w0u5p-s8la6f-kyd76rh6/)
---
# **Trump's Response to California Wildfires: Drill Baby, Drill**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w0u5p-s8la6g-kyd76rh7/)
---
| | | | Hey friend, it is up to us to call this out. The Palisades Fire, which is expected to become the _costliest wildfire in U.S. history_ , has already destroyed 1,000 homes, leaving families devastated and entire communities in ruins. This disaster — fueled by extreme weather and record-breaking drought conditions made worse by climate change — is yet another wake-up call. But Donald Trump? He’s hitting snooze. While families in Los Angeles County flee for their lives, Trump is doubling down on his dangerous “Drill Baby, Drill” agenda, pandering to the MAGA elites who care more about profits than protecting our planet. They ignore the science, the devastation, and the lives lost, all to line their pockets with oil money. Make no mistake: this crisis isn’t a fluke. Climate experts warn that these wildfires are becoming more frequent, more destructive, and more deadly — direct consequences of ignoring the climate crisis. Trump and his allies have fought to slash environmental protections and expand drilling, putting short-term profits ahead of the long-term health of our planet and its people. We can’t afford this reckless approach. It’s time to fight back against Trump’s disastrous agenda and demand real climate leadership. [**_We need to use our microphone to promote leadership that will prioritize renewable energy, address the climate crisis head-on, and call out leaders who would rather put profits over people and the environment. Let’s rebuild, protect our planet, and send a clear message to the MAGA elites: America’s future is not for sale._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w0u5p-s8la6h-kyd76rh8/)
---

At Turning Point's AMERICAFEST in December, President Trump stood before thousands of young patriots and declared that a new era of AMERICAN GREATNESS was beginning. **[**Now YOU and your guest have the opportunity to potentially join Turning Point USA to celebrate INAUGURATION WEEKEND:**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f81535c410742428921828140c52bd5&_e=e9tYURf2mP5SvneJY9Rv9pKWhHECZJk2Bv5aFxf1hiQXY_12J-ayIyWhQ3X_KifYJRp0P8W-L0K0WT83MlxeqOZ-JlU5uXSY9jp1-jcf0wlCHde5fQB049PS9OVL2NtuU24BTUHluJ86sDWOzm_gqeleRCBxpzfUEgGpYOgB2Nnmp4iw-1cCZT2LG_eqV6Q-tPhklgFwCeBsu15ccMrOds10Jb6-0RT5Q-KnhL8qyv7P1dXsqhj3gCW39Upxcf2FReQaFcOqlAR-fR0z5xGS_hAvbdpdjIVTE9FZp3r6g1iaGmfjt8Ezd0VZHrIreTmd)**
* On SUNDAY midday, join President Trump's pre-inauguration event,

* On SUNDAY evening, enjoy VIP tickets to the Turning Point Inaugural Ball, and

* On MONDAY midday, attend the INAUGURATION of the 47th President in Washington, DC!

Plus, you'll receive round-trip flights to Washington, DC and luxury hotel accommodations for inauguration weekend. **Don't miss this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to be part of history, friend.** **[Make your gift of $25, $50, $100, $250, or more by 11:59 PM ET on January 10th-- and you could be the special Turning Point USA supporter who wins this inauguration weekend celebration!](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f81535c410742428921828140c52bd5&_e=e9tYURf2mP5SvneJY9Rv9pKWhHECZJk2Bv5aFxf1hiQXY_12J-ayIyWhQ3X_KifYJRp0P8W-L0K0WT83MlxeqOZ-JlU5uXSY9jp1-jcf0wlCHde5fQB049PS9OVL2NtuU24BTUHluJ86sDWOzm_gqSLgN7DWGrluOfxI_f4tAzzSW52MEVBmodcO_dmD1fn4f2vm8OX5RMYd_lzviNbuanhrAxj1MIbcpKvYIAwt-4vJhoSuX0kfjnMcvMR0HLVF6QsI9MTbQJdn_8ulerzU9VMDm2Q71P0mXc8XP90LpIraLji1HNjAVwcReD8_CrK8)**

Thank YOU for your patriotism and your generous support. In 2024, we worked together to inspire MILLIONS MORE kids to LOVE AMERICA again -- and won back an ENTIRE GENERATION in favor of FREEDOM and PATRIOTISM. Now, in 2025, you can help Turning Point USA do more than ever before, starting with this massive celebration of AMERICA'S GOLDEN AGE. **[Please, friend, don't miss your chance: make your gift right away to secure your chance to join me and Turning Point USA for inauguration weekend.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f81535c410742428921828140c52bd5&_e=e9tYURf2mP5SvneJY9Rv9pKWhHECZJk2Bv5aFxf1hiQXY_12J-ayIyWhQ3X_KifYJRp0P8W-L0K0WT83MlxeqOZ-JlU5uXSY9jp1-jcf0wlCHde5fQB049PS9OVL2NtuU24BTUHluJ86sDWOzm_gqc6khHzbabCHrDArlLbJfBwLZY7o-Uxr_wVM_w5v1p7ZzIo9ccyKuGzkenH4E4Zb0ZkbXv6sVVOir7e1ZGZf-37hGe1O2jj-DF9lrmr8oG5y146gRuwoJ-W6GBW6RSuJ10k-HWU6FNXNZ7ENwAAM0p3bIkAz8_DI6CsZV3-WSkX1)**

name: DOGE Survey via House GOP
subject: GONE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We need your help to shrink the size of the government! Complete the DOGE Survey today >>

|
---
| | |
Friend,

Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy have been handpicked for a monumental task: **To shrink the size of the federal government and reduce wasteful spending and excess.**

But House Republicans are on board, but we can't do it without you. **[Will you answer a few quick questions and help us get ready for 2025 today, Friend?](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68436cc53f8945b5b44a2fda307f0a14&_e=FsL_UgQXwhqTE72Ok9b2IIRRtD6dR7kY69xlBtTFlCm_LXmdFfx0aK-qpmx9AgmU5qtZSYJaC4mPhg2I8Uq2vmk1Q3QvaknaPMyYKgkztR1VZRSI-7V_pd3-A5UYNqz3cSBHK9jk5rn8RE2ps9GTtlIn9v537ThN_kHnDVVDKfkg1o0oEahP3oR0NQ25RFrf2I12tgGgSkNGqDigUet2dxbP0BcKvCpk-irYRjcWYe6VtFaKut-uwKS8xUOdGbQWHQ_ewz32llEwyYCOaYH_JYzR4xEQSPBpbbONV7HJ8mGjh1nih7R1Yi9kKu1rVyvUsh-EenU_-hGzyUmwMLRjnH-ksTsrSjENiljNKqHj2V4GQUQCZB2UPbWuG0_ubtUJKExYyB3ODPta6JxbwCV-Avp0Lk8cgWIHvHFEZqLnLpRhCA7n5LLORd4sG6Z02OYp_4YfalkatzDys7AFU5p-fA%3D%3D "Will you answer a few quick questions and help us get ready for 2025 today, Friend?")**

---
| |
---
| | **DEPARTMENT OF GOVERNMENT EFFICIENCY (DOGE) SURVEY**

body:
We’re giving you one last chance to sign Trump’s card before Inauguration Day.

Friend,

There are just a few days left until Inauguration Day!

**[Once President Trump is finished taking the oath of office, we plan to present him with our Inaugural Congratulatory Card signed by his top supporters.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f7ac6eccfe7245f09990b69c5a94148f&_e=1-A1b8-96iO0DYLiSguMJBlNQOnjiDBquPsVt_4pb1NdFBm_1RwW3EIFfEAMwaPJhgIg09JEJ-TnNceTQRuyXeCjRj0P-J5G8QYtY8042O5kAPxlCEHTba3Df5tvyglUS0n3qerNWUeq8AwBwhJTBg4TpXgq6JvIjXfvZmxWDrC1GjAajy-IHUhqa376AGIlKEmEb-5jsUuKa2onmnKc73ZMNFzG40d73boOP_l_2z-zCIDbfAaeEJmoV0Kv1xGQEpvbilUhEca_1YyRU6oovTpQs9uQdQZ6QrF6F6yD9MHOAWCVj4KA-iNoJBNZmhTmxWHMb6stViABHvX8TFwTtxdFThxI-UIRh9TO5BmRLr1X6_2D4lktYwLywQom2HAGRm_tkpiOHrJek_a-_Jh5OQnPzOGzzcrUfQM-pijgE8rkuL6w5yEGl30sSn2zN4eeEe1FybDAxfRq9k5QJy04J-tL0rOC9MvTUKegPOuMjE4%3D)**

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9573196882c402baff0df917dc3bf53&_e=nIz0bQWN0rZ0SHWktOHbI4SYIm_GG4xprA2j2WerseqVDrHDii5iw6LCPfBkLLPccn-LHv5jV0IqJYrHaf5lMrW7Cwcpukq2NvB7vETXNwT-Bp7oYvgFxWbska-sTeKL0hNIL4DHC1ZkepQqG1oCgaI3i-pmIvgipKY_qVHHviuIOXL61f76dztmCG0ZTvaCWyZFd8zfw022UHbD6WYjGI_v_SveFiKK9a6hfZeIXRG_QT8god0ODeW7cjYAqaabAYGBTaMPNwY1FzhBJelISkIxsWgLD3HaFkPrQGSvuRzvo9CfjarbEzqWXSeRP9uDXRjZ3s-SiyyUL1oHkSkBZQn28as1WxgG4phfzHfd13zVxxiBx3Po0CceaMqGD5ETZYNKFAozul-LiQoKmw4bLaw7MfO4DejCuVkFEjeXnOk%3D) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9573196882c402baff0df917dc3bf53&_e=nIz0bQWN0rZ0SHWktOHbI4SYIm_GG4xprA2j2WerseqVDrHDii5iw6LCPfBkLLPccn-LHv5jV0IqJYrHaf5lMrW7Cwcpukq2NvB7vETXNwT-Bp7oYvgFxWbska-sTeKL0hNIL4DHC1ZkepQqG1oCgaI3i-pmIvgipKY_qVHHviuIOXL61f76dztmCG0ZTvaCWyZFd8zfw022UHbD6WYjGI_v_SveFiKK9a6hfZeIXRG_QT8god0ODeW7cjYAqaabGy6jofnSzm19PbK6KGH8K6ZZzzkR8WmrBYEoOhNT1M_ygLM7V9dVA3HeKymzvRPeexAUJb_bhIGzoOqrIbmzRCewPvrI14ZyUUaov-Uqrb1zO6Ff-EWAn07-di7LXnuVaHMPlcr3KrSqbMi6LPYgQquA00vxODTam4yLdjjfSgo%3D) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9573196882c402baff0df917dc3bf53&_e=nIz0bQWN0rZ0SHWktOHbI4SYIm_GG4xprA2j2WerseqVDrHDii5iw6LCPfBkLLPccn-LHv5jV0IqJYrHaf5lMrW7Cwcpukq2NvB7vETXNwT-Bp7oYvgFxWbska-sTeKL0hNIL4DHC1ZkepQqG1oCgaI3i-pmIvgipKY_qVHHviuIOXL61f76dztmCG0ZTvaCWyZFd8zfw022UHbD6WYjGI_v_SveFiKK9a6hfZeIXRG_QT8god0ODeW7cjYAqaabv3NSQO1mEHHPY-ddXNg-julzmKv_TqzioVx54YzIVZhlxhvqSnJHRV1ccJltpMdU77_8Znmftl-ZmmrFFUIC52awEeEBuOU_TMwOPn_kJIkfULi9hnyoEvHdiaiOLbAUXUxN17qCm2KP6F2QLiHwaEXAuoRErOhugpEYSA033PM%3D) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9573196882c402baff0df917dc3bf53&_e=nIz0bQWN0rZ0SHWktOHbI4SYIm_GG4xprA2j2WerseqVDrHDii5iw6LCPfBkLLPccn-LHv5jV0IqJYrHaf5lMrW7Cwcpukq2NvB7vETXNwT-Bp7oYvgFxWbska-sTeKL0hNIL4DHC1ZkepQqG1oCgaI3i-pmIvgipKY_qVHHviuIOXL61f76dztmCG0ZTvaCWyZFd8zfw022UHbD6WYjGI_v_SveFiKK9a6hfZeIXRG_QT8god0ODeW7cjYAqaabupzleY43n1qSTYwq-XHe7fEmJu5pRrJ0gJl9mpevVREDAQaGbGB2KCdxJ-c41LpWFs0-kIiq1OgZLmlQPG-bNynTGBu28RSIbOGrr1VhnRV6ue-8AomSilBwYnQMUvgFYR2c9SEeF_yE0EBPFvpeqRXJ7aFQBCJp8GCUz4DxinY%3D) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=c9573196882c402baff0df917dc3bf53&_t=IR4_zQdwdxl694uzy6QYeEVaLkuJyypXEL6dZH54MBST9cgX_EJJd7UmQdC-EJ-xOhHG8I8M1gZffiL8uvvIlIDuqOLlY2PtLVtyLmiLNg_Ba6XCFiTjluEbwXrjziRu_zbtyOHekAD5LSjcL95cFUvEa-QOMGZsbrvrcAxeM_o%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9573196882c402baff0df917dc3bf53&_e=PEuECmBOfx3NWA_v6s25Sl4dJOv8h3o8VvfGJeSHXCaopi84IYL1v2JM9cZTKtOL_Gtz9aeOMVD_QcY0_m9miYCd7GhVADDz5sCq_Umf7-MB5xivVt-6zlhbmajVIsVR-OcQs_ZlERkh8lDSkFcD-lQFMx7doWcBnqcG0qNSgz8S7uXjbvktC-HHXnSTv0OX9UTawbliqn_Wl85Ca3NsPCZJvv55OhNTVSoGNo2rc0dCRORHeAI0N5gR4UUxudX55aodTTR_tOMDyYtdQBNQLN9hljP8PAAgb5NyuU913eU%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9573196882c402baff0df917dc3bf53&_e=nIz0bQWN0rZ0SHWktOHbI5IRxSoKB8evOD-oU3XooYbUNb1xEYiQiJyHMGEyn6tPn7SUXicB3IyWgFfrfjBOSG-r58Mc3z2FlVEeW6vvefUw4ZKuiCnyWM4Mw5sRf65EMH57H0CIQ_evTpKRai9YiEmWDAbTpQRkGpYGqaAIFUB48zrD7X8zQfnp5TX3j87WoFMddnfaINXCbB5imsZk9Jk3YBP7FsilBIl9NHFfZ1g%3D)_

name: Congressman Rob Bresnahan
subject: I never thought I’d be in this position
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Yet here I am – fresh off of my first campaign and the newly sworn-in Congressman for PA-08.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=17e1c97d1886475ba7c2b2a81f9ceed9&_e=RFPnblplyYJNYsi5qPS8gcaPMt_TiHSCySVWJHcBiKZuDY5NrWhuaLZyjGOBjvI7IvcOAsUuFWMC2n4G7uJEjbfdaJfwedLDKxDo55vnBKQE5oHpRBpopk0kMqzSXfiYUj_4vSlI0sOerMi0JYgLmlot4TH2QXee_ZSq5L2uoRmUeG6o3YAWoH3Wo48oARcHEH5Iyfw-aXJ8nfubrfqSVLc5C43iN4fipj9JV6AFFPCGRsvgbFRoh0qo-t5cZnW1CZ8TKK-Wj88p_3kUwTlWNz3hGuxNQbdsl5E-dB061HcCXOPBNg2cQClRgRPOHpfdLj__VzrSEQcuu0vhMAAFrugSfQENwMVonHOlSpC2aScKQGS2aNQGjUIes5DwOrxEI3wYwZfPU9NI8KWXeI42BBUddNzg-2AbOrDqfIbuLhcD-cx_e_CEWaM2B0R5kfAwSPwmvklA5syZOzlWjqhOvg%3D%3D "Rob Bresnahan")
---

I never ran for public office before.

I never even thought I'd be in that position. Yet here I am - fresh off of my first campaign and the newly sworn-in Congressman for PA-08.

_My name is Rob Bresnahan._ I'd like to share how I went from a political outsider to the person who flipped a blue district in Northeastern Pennsylvania. _In just one year, my team and I:_
* Spoke with scores of veterans and seniors
* Knocked tens of thousands of doors
* Drove 50,000+ miles
* Received endorsements from President Trump and Majority Leader Scalise
* Flipped battleground PA-08 by just 6,266 votes

**It wasn 't easy. But it was worth it.**

I was tired of watching American families suffer, our Anthem and Flag desecrated, our fracking businesses obliterated, criminals running rampant in our cities, and good Americans being cast aside in favor of illegal immigrants.

I stepped into the arena to save Pennsylvania (and our country). Now I'm asking you to do the same.

**I 'm working with Leader Scalise to get this urgent message out before the FIRST mid-month deadline of the 119th Congress. [BOTH of us are asking you for a few bucks to help keep my seat red and send badly needed resources to cash-strapped campaigns nationwide.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=17e1c97d1886475ba7c2b2a81f9ceed9&_e=RFPnblplyYJNYsi5qPS8gcaPMt_TiHSCySVWJHcBiKZuDY5NrWhuaLZyjGOBjvI7IvcOAsUuFWMC2n4G7uJEjbfdaJfwedLDKxDo55vnBKQE5oHpRBpopk0kMqzSXfiYUj_4vSlI0sOerMi0JYgLmlot4TH2QXee_ZSq5L2uoRmUeG6o3YAWoH3Wo48oARcHEH5Iyfw-aXJ8nfubrfqSVLc5C43iN4fipj9JV6AFFPCGRsvgbFRoh0qo-t5cZnW1CZ8TKK-Wj88p_3kUwTlWNz3hGuxNQbdsl5E-dB061HcCXOPBNg2cQClRgRPOHpfdezL0INdxUBK7KIIcfg_0EbAcSlgrqakPFSIage3KsuMe9l8zmT7qv7V0ShcCYUBmun6JCseZI8UXrTGn03niVm_Lcmc0kKP5mKuIRj_0imhXqCEu2EhWXv8VeOGXtFuMu0AAbNkWV9duyQf7rlFTEA%3D%3D "BOTH of us are asking you for a few bucks to help keep my seat red and send badly needed resources to cash-strapped campaigns nationwide.")**
| | [FIRST MID-MONTH DEADLINE >>
SPLIT A DONATION HERE](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=17e1c97d1886475ba7c2b2a81f9ceed9&_e=RFPnblplyYJNYsi5qPS8gcaPMt_TiHSCySVWJHcBiKZuDY5NrWhuaLZyjGOBjvI7IvcOAsUuFWMC2n4G7uJEjbfdaJfwedLDKxDo55vnBKQE5oHpRBpopk0kMqzSXfiYUj_4vSlI0sOerMi0JYgLmlot4TH2QXee_ZSq5L2uoRmUeG6o3YAWoH3Wo48oARcHEH5Iyfw-aXJ8nfubrfqSVLc5C43iN4fipj9JV6AFFPCGRsvgbFRoh0qo-t5cZnW1CZ8TKK-Wj88p_3kUwTlWNz3hGuxNQbdsl5E-dB061HcCXOPBNg2cQClRgRPOHpfdlcFlOC5dzg1U0P1xajp3vRDOUBIbSf4KTfT0Vstj4C_NanLj4PAR-yozBochvGBLIstd3xO3wBTCBNhzOluCfgEeie-Ubbhmf9oMpW5p7nKvVpgPqhmCH8DlBjnpG9rE_8_DiUzPKlQNx-kwgEl7Ow%3D%3D "FIRST MID-MONTH/MONTHLY DEADLINE >> SPLIT A DONATION HERE")

THAT is how we save our slim House Majority.

THAT is how we defend our Republican Trifecta.

THAT is how we Make America Great Again.

Our FIRST mid-month deadline of the new Congress is here and the pressure is on!

The bottom line is this: _Without your help, I 'm afraid we could lose our Republican Trifecta - and the consequences of that would be unthinkable. _

clean_body: Yet here I am – fresh off of my first campaign and the newly sworn-in Congressman for PA-08. | | | | | | "Rob Bresnahan" I never ran for public office before. I never even thought I'd be in that position. Yet here I am - fresh off of my first campaign and the newly sworn-in Congressman for PA-08. My name is Rob Bresnahan. I'd like to share how I went from a political outsider to the person who flipped a blue district in Northeastern Pennsylvania. In just one year, my team and I: Spoke with scores of veterans and seniors Knocked tens of thousands of doors Drove 50,000+ miles Received endorsements from President Trump and Majority Leader Scalise Flipped battleground PA-08 by just 6,266 votes It wasn 't easy. But it was worth it. I was tired of watching American families suffer, our Anthem and Flag desecrated, our fracking businesses obliterated, criminals running rampant in our cities, and good Americans being cast aside in favor of illegal immigrants. I stepped into the arena to save Pennsylvania (and our country). Now I'm asking you to do the same. I 'm working with Leader Scalise to get this urgent message out before the FIRST mid-month deadline of the 119th Congress. "BOTH of us are asking you for a few bucks to help keep my seat red and send badly needed resources to cash-strapped campaigns nationwide." | | "FIRST MID-MONTH/MONTHLY DEADLINE >> SPLIT A DONATION HERE" THAT is how we save our slim House Majority. THAT is how we defend our Republican Trifecta. THAT is how we Make America Great Again. Our FIRST mid-month deadline of the new Congress is here and the pressure is on! The bottom line is this: Without your help, I 'm afraid we could lose our Republican Trifecta - and the consequences of that would be unthinkable. | "FIRST MID-MONTH/MONTHLY DEADLINE >> SPLIT A DONATION HERE" Please help us while there's still time. Sincerely, Rob Bresnahan Congressman, PA-08 | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=68a5c400fc54446996f8c406e1c4c8b4&_e=fZyfvMjv9VB08-FGjbatKOwjtCBFAPuRwIbSK7XrNIafG1mFW9zmN9UuV0qhJ53FrWOpae3OvbYh_Ff0ZXZYVVjEx6b9FHwVeOimmd9QvPjuDZeUPQPXgLFRUUmnxAcTKg2tReOm94NWIeA6mYb9HtLlpQnwUqz0sqA7hsb3DI3Yf7M0TUnac9lad_9hGZm4mcV5XiBHNHe9SsyGKx5vwQw1u5gK7J4Daj2or5YyWDZJUG7RdT7WINirNYphLzaS5u-uarj46wtE57056_n_hhjCF-R_Q6mb9Cf1BrbFzJnDUK_wyc5xJitF2e8EVfKbyfMOGPATYgGb1XQtqnb6RlNZk_BOtcC8uymWQ2ONdJ3o8kb34ZSJr2JuxzT3-pwjPsyAfIaWFyk8OgiektwKP6bX-XL81csLp0uxEjGBzjU%3D) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=68a5c400fc54446996f8c406e1c4c8b4&_e=fZyfvMjv9VB08-FGjbatKOwjtCBFAPuRwIbSK7XrNIafG1mFW9zmN9UuV0qhJ53FrWOpae3OvbYh_Ff0ZXZYVVjEx6b9FHwVeOimmd9QvPjuDZeUPQPXgLFRUUmnxAcTKg2tReOm94NWIeA6mYb9HtLlpQnwUqz0sqA7hsb3DI3Yf7M0TUnac9lad_9hGZm4mcV5XiBHNHe9SsyGKx5vwQw1u5gK7J4Daj2or5YyWDZJUG7RdT7WINirNYphLzaSLVRiEK_iWVBTQvmNrdH3FaZKep0PzKLA1E2bi7Je5r3q_53g_cVIJfFt-4pt81QqYhZMyCXKWyw0cdc4ENZKcjYatryNxui04JeQwLQOF7eMnh8cBtamDcgF7hmyJFfqugisg35fz-FhtVjv1neujrmOkY70TIvekqRGzm5XXyk%3D) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country... Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.
Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.
The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in "extremist ideologies" and having the potential for "domestic terrorism."
Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted. **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=68a5c400fc54446996f8c406e1c4c8b4&_e=fZyfvMjv9VB08-FGjbatKOwjtCBFAPuRwIbSK7XrNIafG1mFW9zmN9UuV0qhJ53FrWOpae3OvbYh_Ff0ZXZYVVjEx6b9FHwVeOimmd9QvPjuDZeUPQPXgLFRUUmnxAcTKg2tReOm94NWIeA6mYb9HtLlpQnwUqz0sqA7hsb3DI3Yf7M0TUnac9lad_9hGZm4mcV5XiBHNHe9SsyGKx5vwQw1u5gK7J4Daj2or5YyWDZJUG7RdT7WINirNYphLzaS-g1koEuHoU-1Ov4tatu3X71Dd-3p-BYLUZ6LUJQ1Sc_HZm9gko_qJbI-Ha8pYpzkLVKAQrLgSraQitEVN_vnboElFcKENHGhggizFSaQBoxwuKdN0h1f9zcnULTaT91BXB6nmP2o8AezxCiz9cTq3TLh6RuVkBxpuq-0LX0WjC4%3D) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include: **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide. After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=68a5c400fc54446996f8c406e1c4c8b4&_e=fZyfvMjv9VB08-FGjbatKOwjtCBFAPuRwIbSK7XrNIafG1mFW9zmN9UuV0qhJ53FrWOpae3OvbYh_Ff0ZXZYVVjEx6b9FHwVeOimmd9QvPjuDZeUPQPXgLFRUUmnxAcTKg2tReOm94NWIeA6mYb9HtLlpQnwUqz0sqA7hsb3DI3Yf7M0TUnac9lad_9hGZm4mcV5XiBHNHe9SsyGKx5vwQw1u5gK7J4Daj2or5YyWDZJUG7RdT7WINirNYphLzaStbkTdBsLHFz7Pnp2D_Mrdp-nfWN_yFKv6YbWP84AhVXFKG4-3JTgEmnQ2GWSpa4Oe_bResI19LbtFo2UCoAToOPfwhYbseb8e_K5QrfWy2Q6HAJAm0YbUPXYnKcL-NRM4BNzsDPkvtbUs9j8Vmw390R8bIzkbRlDhdC4qhtR2bE%3D) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e20f1af3a3a244dd87624565ef6f0fdc&_e=kQai5C_Xso-bOiwWESrDH-mucEPbxzwhvZ7vRvVEwuCjXXqMUP5hqyQzRXLwpbLKRcOSlXZnOvy4qoxjIBMVWgq0CrwS4Fim6vzpk3voXz3QKNv9T2qMBq4q4WiuxqpYQ-k-DEeawx036AY0EiNCjc_mW43-WgnRgQL6V0A8znmJFEJoeh0Mu1kgddNdZUyTjVGDAN55YkBXHkB9x9HWTmdBN83g1ZXcbRwKH98VEsWH1C9XzgnxdRcJUZvvqs_So3JnZjK67Qau6fzMskbug-69X85cC7z7pnJl_wpF2GOvcMb0kckMmQUvj6mR-D9cDq-1za6T98qeK7ITAGPYmoCkoj08j17HAc9fgM-O1pTNE-zg35ttaCkcXY8DaeuRcjmQzXEXVannBDRvbZb1mNFquCFfqDtbQ800x2qBz90%3D) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e20f1af3a3a244dd87624565ef6f0fdc&_e=kQai5C_Xso-bOiwWESrDH-mucEPbxzwhvZ7vRvVEwuCjXXqMUP5hqyQzRXLwpbLKRcOSlXZnOvy4qoxjIBMVWgq0CrwS4Fim6vzpk3voXz3QKNv9T2qMBq4q4WiuxqpYQ-k-DEeawx036AY0EiNCjc_mW43-WgnRgQL6V0A8znmJFEJoeh0Mu1kgddNdZUyTjVGDAN55YkBXHkB9x9HWTmdBN83g1ZXcbRwKH98VEsWH1C9XzgnxdRcJUZvvqs_SiO0L-4lo2bTr8P2peS2iTnFhPZKwk273W4I1vsI8nPPMPEsaXIksTE5K25P_1FkZYT1DJH0LjA3jpCMifuVzhkvYQSRGMRvq8VftHdiOSr2ywmoNNGYG3wrMZ5l2I8UDS2hswWUxe3GZnJ2MEX8hGjSW1TMvGqwI9NwP380KiWI%3D) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e20f1af3a3a244dd87624565ef6f0fdc&_e=kQai5C_Xso-bOiwWESrDH-mucEPbxzwhvZ7vRvVEwuCjXXqMUP5hqyQzRXLwpbLKRcOSlXZnOvy4qoxjIBMVWgq0CrwS4Fim6vzpk3voXz3QKNv9T2qMBq4q4WiuxqpYQ-k-DEeawx036AY0EiNCjc_mW43-WgnRgQL6V0A8znmJFEJoeh0Mu1kgddNdZUyTjVGDAN55YkBXHkB9x9HWTmdBN83g1ZXcbRwKH98VEsWH1C9XzgnxdRcJUZvvqs_SGRB2sM-TvdXS6ePN6o80N_x_rbXM9yaOjUnQqHHol2k51yWT39vn08IArkgOSQ_YB__VeJEWYoSCoqT7BBNo-LOkIN17jK6XpqpLpWdmSyTFn8iWuZ9EjbCpB9wukwg_z5UHkDHga9n8su5HKtiqq8bLLGrt9VJR5UNur3Bl7FI%3D) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e20f1af3a3a244dd87624565ef6f0fdc&_e=kQai5C_Xso-bOiwWESrDH-mucEPbxzwhvZ7vRvVEwuCjXXqMUP5hqyQzRXLwpbLKRcOSlXZnOvy4qoxjIBMVWgq0CrwS4Fim6vzpk3voXz3QKNv9T2qMBq4q4WiuxqpYQ-k-DEeawx036AY0EiNCjc_mW43-WgnRgQL6V0A8znmJFEJoeh0Mu1kgddNdZUyTjVGDAN55YkBXHkB9x9HWTmdBN83g1ZXcbRwKH98VEsWH1C9XzgnxdRcJUZvvqs_SvuWZoUp7j129jq-WqmIAioYyU4bQUpeSJ0hARjQwyqe7GEWvA96P9_3Q6InDpxu34kGgeRGi_1XOdncqevdqDMD67ZrEJuXJIsytzqhBIGnsYVBsGQOrfhyCtOxt3hvzdoZbeTb0BHa-3Zx7WTlO6zmLOovEzEUe2pwdfwF6ZhE%3D) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Conservatives Give
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

body:
Most children know very little about the dangers of socialism.

|
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=75768c3646c24dd09cf419ec60a715ac&_e=Cm6o_8mA5vu1M3gHC5s08_bwDLWLKEmVF-lLLoZxCwv7F-s0W6zVkc_ZFhLHOcutizY-JbIJ8bP55rwZlSmj2_Ab9McH_zsC0jdQSIRjXMQTlKPg7sE1bSvdwLBsW9x9PQ8gwALRBLgYWf6UGwNTUL0PHNalmMAzLJFwLDeOXz_RIU7n7JjmL_9KNnQaBsZ5qRtvKX_5_-7-FvzvHjFa38EJlYmLaBGaaYjTOviD0Zwz0o1gvKjsgFLT_sepPKv2-n18-Y5Xyl8cqqKRV2U3D8XitsK_huAS-_UwnQ-pprc%3D "Tuttle Twins")
Friend,

Most children know very little about the dangers of socialism.

In today’s government schools, preaching socialist propaganda has replaced learning about the values of liberty, American history, free markets, and limited government.

Libertas Institute is dedicated to changing hearts, minds, and laws to build a freer society. But if we are going to build a freer society, the next generation must know about how socialism actually robs them of their liberty.

I wrote _**The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths**_ for this exact purpose.

[If you donate $5 or more to The Tuttle Twins today, then I will send you a copy of _The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths_. Click here to donate >>>](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=75768c3646c24dd09cf419ec60a715ac&_e=Cm6o_8mA5vu1M3gHC5s08_bwDLWLKEmVF-lLLoZxCwv7F-s0W6zVkc_ZFhLHOcutizY-JbIJ8bP55rwZlSmj2_Ab9McH_zsC0jdQSIRjXMQTlKPg7sE1bSvdwLBsW9x9SzzCxv5EYrfro8Rug0OcmpgossSUqWx1E_XK8PNF637Lt5ltRJWvJry4bXxZt8n3vJhQfkmL8gr9yDyCKhpYudokAxAB3G5ZFIAewwiF0FL6VOL-qrgEMF8IqHxwDREwcBf6LoBiVy5-jBxjldsMGsliPsD5MC-boWeOwKttMsc%3D)

Extremism in defense of your kids from radical ideologies is no vice.

We're building a new culture to challenge the many falsehoods making their way through our schools and our society. If you want to combat the forces of socialism — you’ll want to read this book.

This 115-page e-book contains rebuttals to 20 economic myths and 20 political myths. _With each one, we offer a simple analysis of why the particular myth is wrong_.
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=75768c3646c24dd09cf419ec60a715ac&_e=Cm6o_8mA5vu1M3gHC5s08_bwDLWLKEmVF-lLLoZxCwv7F-s0W6zVkc_ZFhLHOcutizY-JbIJ8bP55rwZlSmj2_Ab9McH_zsC0jdQSIRjXMQTlKPg7sE1bSvdwLBsW9x9ZL5zGGZoDkQLED2EbAe5PNIY9eCOFAbuN-cPIllpfn-IcMALVzVnH4kU_LBW3UHt01wEL1cq4fvgCkw99cjOINS0BbeTJ9xfx6Nbe_0l-Jfgy1d-ID1_BcEykY12Ksren2dfP9dex5cXP60ymKUFIyo61ZZ2vbkcCmho0WowQkI%3D)
As an exclusive offer to our generous supporters, I want to provide you with the ideas and arguments that will enable you and your children to better understand the way the world works and combat the many falsehoods that its people cling to.

You can get your copy of _**The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths**_ by clicking any button below.

clean_body: Most children know very little about the dangers of socialism. | | | "Tuttle Twins" Friend, Most children know very little about the dangers of socialism. In today’s government schools, preaching socialist propaganda has replaced learning about the values of liberty, American history, free markets, and limited government. Libertas Institute is dedicated to changing hearts, minds, and laws to build a freer society. But if we are going to build a freer society, the next generation must know about how socialism actually robs them of their liberty. I wrote The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths for this exact purpose. Extremism in defense of your kids from radical ideologies is no vice. We're building a new culture to challenge the many falsehoods making their way through our schools and our society. If you want to combat the forces of socialism — you’ll want to read this book. This 115-page e-book contains rebuttals to 20 economic myths and 20 political myths. With each one, we offer a simple analysis of why the particular myth is wrong. As an exclusive offer to our generous supporters, I want to provide you with the ideas and arguments that will enable you and your children to better understand the way the world works and combat the many falsehoods that its people cling to. You can get your copy of The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths by clicking any button below. Please use the arguments found in this book and other Tuttle Twins books to help young people stand up for their rights and their beliefs. Thank you, Connor Boyack President, Libertas Institute Author, The Tuttle Twins Paid for by Libertas Institute Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _
