name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: Your SCOTUS opinion needed
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e7a5f4eb821843cfb84c332f5a3f5ae4&_e=KJv5uzaxcZsO5cBrgbqUcp16hdC6zdy74hNQMODsnJREZG5ecigYjDG-Rw7jUH1MD3kS7OcoybIzx66QrTW9mjIF4_R0Afg6fSnQiN03LK0KnvaH_QW7iim506h4AFVk0JCnEcH13MmYKEc1AaD4ReHD6kNu6yBoh2cQ8Jp_9aHuHcuxo8G8K8PWZLnmXr-Kx7xZHYrcRdqhkL0m4fPR6dayXqUDGk_IW6HPZsJKzg3lqcIXoXdYpP-PdbaH_EWsVAo7likTkkjBm28cWdK_vZCacyeY4gbKf2jkr3gUf7ms3qO0ujTsMZCP-Hzs2zbO3jwpshFIHmD-hITIGRC2yLdvBCOV1bisKEyNeLce1WxQK2frnGPXa8PKMeaag_OPkmr3avM5tC8nJ5nLRux3mw6_PfY9fpWnSLxVoAe8EfQ%3D) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e7a5f4eb821843cfb84c332f5a3f5ae4&_e=KJv5uzaxcZsO5cBrgbqUcp16hdC6zdy74hNQMODsnJREZG5ecigYjDG-Rw7jUH1MD3kS7OcoybIzx66QrTW9mjIF4_R0Afg6fSnQiN03LK0KnvaH_QW7iim506h4AFVk0JCnEcH13MmYKEc1AaD4ReHD6kNu6yBoh2cQ8Jp_9aHuHcuxo8G8K8PWZLnmXr-Kx7xZHYrcRdqhkL0m4fPR6dayXqUDGk_IW6HPZsJKzg3lqcIXoXdYpP-PdbaH_EWsMOKG1Xk-P-H1_49OYpIH4jpZp2iBGWXlet58gQYmQm7BuCsKAN4RZ6bLobawB5NUHi2gKN6roZ6ZseFBNRyOaaTzhEtm_8hd8Yexy5q1QV6rj--qRzSe6S3fbwnadT3LRXwjAp6ocvmAomvR2x7-lnz6a502avJnC70baXGyyoU%3D) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e7a5f4eb821843cfb84c332f5a3f5ae4&_e=KJv5uzaxcZsO5cBrgbqUcp16hdC6zdy74hNQMODsnJREZG5ecigYjDG-Rw7jUH1MD3kS7OcoybIzx66QrTW9mjIF4_R0Afg6fSnQiN03LK0KnvaH_QW7iim506h4AFVk0JCnEcH13MmYKEc1AaD4ReHD6kNu6yBoh2cQ8Jp_9aHuHcuxo8G8K8PWZLnmXr-Kx7xZHYrcRdqhkL0m4fPR6dayXqUDGk_IW6HPZsJKzg3lqcIXoXdYpP-PdbaH_EWsMB8S4GOOdmwV89zn4iGXJy-HtmzR4TKx5INqn6uvcvMA6Nqe6woJU1wdhafB6wPrFk-5Jzr0qVwBTeruAfOcZW1dojxAvRH2_0y7Z1slRCU_JQodcVHFq8o7w36Y4OAJ_KvnuCMcyRtO_WKdYDGQiQa4xbVT2NJdoKFvyJ10-C0%3D) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e7a5f4eb821843cfb84c332f5a3f5ae4&_e=KJv5uzaxcZsO5cBrgbqUcp16hdC6zdy74hNQMODsnJREZG5ecigYjDG-Rw7jUH1MD3kS7OcoybIzx66QrTW9mjIF4_R0Afg6fSnQiN03LK0KnvaH_QW7iim506h4AFVk0JCnEcH13MmYKEc1AaD4ReHD6kNu6yBoh2cQ8Jp_9aHuHcuxo8G8K8PWZLnmXr-Kx7xZHYrcRdqhkL0m4fPR6dayXqUDGk_IW6HPZsJKzg3lqcIXoXdYpP-PdbaH_EWsvazNG-IKvbfe1v_m9-E9ZzuWXwgvYl_V6Xdxufa-r1ozUJ15IL3vpcRZjNwWpPjbvWmDOj--a29XQAgofSHG47unk4Y29s839VXNqrFmC_WMtKBWEWN_05mPRzvtLaAgT_zfvk_bvBUrUPZuAhLJhiPr2lDztly4yFLQPP7gWy0%3D) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open. Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation. **Good morning!** On this day in 2024, the very first edition of _The Texas Flyover_ was published, landing in just over 11,000 inboxes. You can [read it here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z71u8yAUxvGrgc3W4YDBDAzv4i3v2tE6fMVUOI5sksZ3X6Vzuz569JP-H5f5QqWW2_U_rcm1V95mBBw6EB3YOVKp56x4dB6iFTw5YaRWiEoDXxxlMlmbEChm0HpEY4JNQxYehB898uLeGAiwQkgYZC-V13q0aPVAVvnAFKRY2rb3bUktvejI9dyeae_DtvLqltbuB5P_GE4Mp18-7_WRjkhn90m3B-1nZ9vSIaBiOPHdxftXqbUc2jAF15VK_aHbn61Ph98BAAD___OcVmw).

Some of the stories from our launch day included DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas's visit to the border, Austin's search for a new city manager, and, of course, the prospect of winter weather. ## Homelessness in Texas
The U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development recently released an update on the number of homeless people throughout the country, showing that a [record 771,480 people](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAUBp8Gd7bg8BcKitu4y223tMCcBCQMkWFD8varbL_dV3yakebrul1dyqnc_7sDbX_d6gYU5EzZTM0WXMrvTUzBehoMm9AyzZUAEIpO0RovkXOjdmm0YEF77i9w0YDmxrSUdEr2A6OMGsY4lXzhwit1MWCUdEb4nQiKIfV6Lj1ix5drt_yuTzyXvR5TtrH3RyP8H4GVwDrGWAqOVlxPtZQ6Pi8Ca0SXe_yMemDG1gq2Np-41zPMMd3jnPGJuc3xOxBYp9OGx0g5p6Y0EfR-uJR_hf3PAk8LPwEAAP__PP5eXw)—or about 23 of every 10,000—did not have stable housing last year. While Texas [ranked sixth](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFv8yAUAH8N3mw9HoSYgSEL-pZ8qrp0tLB5xEikWEDs5N9Xzd71hjvpvq7T1cUUv2__3Z1Me4Y8IeCpB96DnryL6TXJzpsZvOYdGX4WSiJKBd1qwuy5DCOncJY0cjkvsCyjEg5mEqMeu2h-ZcBBcy7gJAYhZ6VGjVqdnJbzwiSQjy2Xoa3U6OlqSK-8UxmWfO-SWVvbKhMXhpahPY5jWB_-UakMt7wztFsuzSWGtsZGlaH1FNwjNYY2xPQmmw8MLQLK_vLv8tl_uNJ6Pmw-dMX47YgpxarOTMLt7mJ6h9ufJ3aDPwEAAP__MtxfEA) among states with the most homeless people, its rate of homelessness is among the lowest in the country, affecting 9 of every 10,000 residents. The year-over-year rate of growth in the state’s homeless population (2.2%) is also well below the national average (18.1%). Most of the 27,987 people in Texas without stable housing are in the [state’s large metro areas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGTgyAQBeBfgx3OsiiGguIau1x7pUNkDUwQHOFi8u9vTH_NNjvzvjfv5zpdbYgh3b_tSqa-ljwhYM9BcNCTsyG-p65x5gZOi4aMGKTqEDsFjTdKyQEE9VrKBS_K4UAAQgMNuGA_UBPMGQYCtBASetnK7qbURaNWvdXdbWYdkAs17231VOllyxLf-Ul7O-e1icbXuhUmvxiODMfjONpHsfV8MhwTHYXhGPNsI8PxpBiOIM4zMByLTdymmlPIfLfpUXihOSfHQ-Ifiy955z7cPZXKfV4pUil8y9tvtDXkxBMd3NlqefH5YzW7cdsRYgxFDayD-2pD_HSt_473NPgXAAD__8iHcLk). Dallas has the largest homeless population (3,718), followed by San Antonio (3,398), Houston (3,280), Austin (2,975), and Fort Worth (2,463).
## Cruz Challenges Vance to Cotton Bowl Bet
In a Tuesday social media post, Sen. Ted Cruz challenged Vice President-elect JD Vance, who currently represents Ohio in the U.S. Senate, to a [friendly bet](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtu6zAQBb9G6lbgS7RZsLiNO982pUAuVzYDWhSkjWjn6wOnT3eKgxlgPq7TNeSSl9v_8CDPz7lOSqgRhAThphRyeU2mTz6K5GRPXp60NUoZK_q7TzHNKIUK0ZLSERPOAc9kxvmE2rrQZ_-GCSmclFqMetAmWnt2ytkxOBOxM4JS5roNfCemZ9jn8qoHbQPWR1_8nXndO_2vU5dOXVprw1yfZqG2vw-duuxr3Xh_D1qAKQFuX99wrECFkOEzwREWJFhLQIJIDFiZ6wKxttJvPq0tl5J3e-qMuD1CLr9m_jPF4dVPAAAA__8viWMz) on the outcome of Friday’s College Football Playoff semifinal matchup between UT and Ohio State. “Loser brings beer & food from his home state & delivers it wearing the winning jersey?” he inquired. Vance [quickly agreed](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQgOGngS3WccABA0OlykOldGxHCwyOkXAc2TR13r5K96z_8En_93k4h1LL9fIZluzbMa0DAuoTiBO4IYVSH4PiyUdITvDshZGkEBUBn72N0WgdJ5qitjZENAgjkJ00WJnQ8OKfGAhwQkjQspMqElmHjnRwKo5MQU6lrVvX5tzyEfapPtZ73rpxXXj1c2u3nck3hj3D_nhWhv3H-1e4jplhv7fQfnaGvbCGiCxJ6YwhIKUU33y6_ZZay06GKbgsodR_t70cvXv8CwAA__86Y1EQ), asking his followers, “Which Texas ice cream should I have Ted bring when the Buckeyes win?” Some Aggies fans encouraged Cruz to go to Friday’s game, hoping the [so-called "Cruz Curse"](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2O3CAUxfGnwR0WXDCYgiKNu02b0rp82UiMsTCz3s3TRzOpt_5LPx2dPx_rB-aSj-03PqLtX6muwGCijFNm1oC5fK9yCNaxYPgQLddCSQCp2LDbOQYxi4TIJDilPTceOcxmEtKhYWbI9oUxzgzngk1iFNIpNRswakIjnSeSxZB7bWPfY49feKXyXT9jG319DMXuvZ8XEb8ILASW-77HOyG-IoEFW8--RALLddbWLwLL4REJLD0G6tvzL_0fqH-2K9K3T0s9tr2246Jn7LnnetAt1rZlpO5ZSqjbC4JZU9DSKUiaRqMclQyQGjlpmqKKmquUjBFDs-G8cyn5UppItj0wl_f4_uObnxb-BQAA__8IqHXm)—a pattern of Texas teams losing games the state’s junior senator attends—would lead to a loss for the Longhorns, their hated rival. According to the latest odds, Ohio State is [favored to beat Texas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00Luu6yAQheGnwR3RgDExBcVp3OW0u7S4jGMkkrFglMvbbyX97pc-Lf0_l_USSi336_9wQ8-vjVYNepKgJLg1h1Lfqxmyj5CdGtCr82iN1sbCsPstgVIY42zt2TmXt83meURw1lhncB6K_2CgwCk1wjSeRhOtnZ12dgrOxCQMYC5M7cQ7Mr5C3-qbHthOiW5D9Tvz0cX4T-hF6CVWDGnH1vCgxp-J0EtoXFLFLvSiQE2gtJa0F5KdA6N8dPl1JeXcZaSX7IkayqNhLokL3eVGTSZipruM9KxSgzZD8_l4llpLt2dh4HoLpX5P8Z-VHl7_BgAA__-JcWpN) by 6 points.
## Jimmy Carter Look-Alike Remembered by Texas Family
As the nation mourns the passing of former President Jimmy Carter, a Central Texas family is remembering the legacy of World War II veteran Ed Beheler, who [gained international fame](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOpCAUhZ8Gu2sAFbWg2MZutt3SgFzHuwNikAzj22-crf_mNF_Ol5Pz5zE_DHnan79NQJ0_a5wllx1wAXycnSF_zW3ltOVuFBVq0TeqlbJVvNr0Yqzl67D0KJXrbcdFsw6Kq35RnWusqUjfMi74KETDu6ZuWqvUMMpRdWZs7cJajo5yTHXeMOPHnKu_4htTvcRQeb3lfJys-cXkxORUSqlfJX9uyOR0u5mcuLhjYHLa8IKQ4Eh4ksM9w4J7TsbD1wyrCeQvSBgwWEwnlJi8g2ISEMERC5QtwtPQju4_K-TwriH8pRAuWEzKmMDH-AIDnl7I5FQl7Y5C3tOpetbyZzDkv_vzj4e-tfwXAAD__wEdees) in the 1970s for his uncanny resemblance to the 39th president. Beheler was a resident of Elm Mott and worked at the Veterans Affairs office in Waco when he won a national Jimmy Carter look-alike contest in the 1970s. He quit his job and turned his [newfound fame](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2u4yAUBOCnwR3WMcYQCopt3GXbLS1-TuKjYBMBiuO3X_n2txtppE-j-Xdf7o4S7c-_bkPbvo-8CBATh4GDWaKjdC6yi9ZDNEOHdtCjkkJIBd1qozQOotKTFtrAhMF7kM5p8N4EDY-O7IXBAGYYRpjGfpReqZsRRk3OSB-YBIzUcunbig2_rj7SmT9Y-pC3Ltm1tXdl4x8mZibm4zj6_Wy0Yb16JubB6BsTM8grayZmV8JKH6xMzMGVhoWnnF8u0Qt5pBouu_IVK3c8YEJfqJ285cxLTlg57XzLjfLer21LXbHxfVBKVJVmEp6bo_Qzrf361ceK_wEAAP__yL5sdA) into roles portraying Carter in movies and commercials. His [films](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQxvGngS3WcYazGRi6eEvXjtYRIEaCOLJRnLx95e6dvuGTftL_5zpfOZf8uH9zja690zojoLmAuoCdA-fymbUMzkOwSkanhp40oiaQiwvJIMWR7TAmE9jfYvIDEHLQNFrSMrsTAwVWqR5M3_XaE40WLRm22t-EhhhyW7euLbHFN--pfNZX3LrbWmVxS2vPXfRfAieB03EcXa7Bn6fA6cE1nlMBiCygwEluLjyPXEreaRAa7pVz-bPav3Evh78BAAD__0MYTzQ) include _Hot Shots! Part Deux_ , _The Last Boy Scout_ with Bruce Willis, and _The Lonely Guy_ with Steve Martin. After appearing in a commercial for Chick-fil-A, he was given free meals at their restaurants for the rest of his life. Although Beheler met President Carter several times, he never took a photo with him due to Secret Service restrictions. His grandson recalls Beheler, who [died in 2001](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z71u7CAQQOGngc7W8H8pKG7jbtOmtMCM1yPheIXJsn77aNOnP_qk83mbb5EKfd0_4o6hvdZjliDNAGIAP-dI5Zo1zyFB9oJjEE5ZLaW2wLeA1gJGb3DRyTlrVU7G4aqMQ7PAkjiFNwYCvBAKjBqVTtb-89JbE71OC9OAmdpRx7Zhw1c813IdT6zjcuy8hK21x8nUfyYnJqfe-9i3tMadyvUumJyORO07VsKTyQlzjzUPBXFIuGHBymvIj06l0Gkd03DfI5VfvP15-wzyJwAA__-lA1fm) at the age of 82, saying that Carter told him, “Man, you really do like me!”

On this day in 2024, the very first edition of The Texas Flyover was published, landing in just over 11,000 inboxes. You can . Some of the stories from our launch day included DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas's visit to the border, Austin's search for a new city manager, and, of course, the prospect of winter weather. Today, nearly 250,000 readers start their day with The Texas Flyover to see the top news being reported around the Lone Star State. If you're not yet subscribed, you can . While Texas among states with the most homeless people, its rate of homelessness is among the lowest in the country, affecting 9 of every 10,000 residents. The year-over-year rate of growth in the state’s homeless population (2.2%) is also well below the national average (18.1%). Most of the 27,987 people in Texas without stable housing are in the . Dallas has the largest homeless population (3,718), followed by San Antonio (3,398), Houston (3,280), Austin (2,975), and Fort Worth (2,463). Cruz Challenges Vance to Cotton Bowl Bet In a Tuesday social media post, Sen. Ted Cruz challenged Vice President-elect JD Vance, who currently represents Ohio in the U.S. Senate, to a on the outcome of Friday’s College Football Playoff semifinal matchup between UT and Ohio State. “Loser brings beer & food from his home state & delivers it wearing the winning jersey?” he inquired. Vance , asking his followers, “Which Texas ice cream should I have Ted bring when the Buckeyes win?” Some Aggies fans encouraged Cruz to go to Friday’s game, hoping the —a pattern of Texas teams losing games the state’s junior senator attends—would lead to a loss for the Longhorns, their hated rival. According to the latest odds, Ohio State is by 6 points. Jimmy Carter Look-Alike Remembered by Texas Family As the nation mourns the passing of former President Jimmy Carter, a Central Texas family is remembering the legacy of World War II veteran Ed Beheler, who in the 1970s for his uncanny resemblance to the 39th president. Beheler was a resident of Elm Mott and worked at the Veterans Affairs office in Waco when he won a national Jimmy Carter look-alike contest in the 1970s. He quit his job and turned his into roles portraying Carter in movies and commercials. His include Hot Shots! Part Deux , The Last Boy Scout with Bruce Willis, and The Lonely Guy with Steve Martin. After appearing in a commercial for Chick-fil-A, he was given free meals at their restaurants for the rest of his life. Although Beheler met President Carter several times, he never took a photo with him due to Secret Service restrictions. His grandson recalls Beheler, who at the age of 82, saying that Carter told him, “Man, you really do like me!” | Flying together with our sponsor You could be wasting . ## California Wildfires Spreading Fast
Thousands of firefighters are now battling at least [three major wildfires](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GO6yAQRb8GOiIYwE4Kiteky2u3tCZhSGY1MZZhbeXvV1ltu9UtrnSOzsdluiALz_f_-KTUS53AQjTWGXuaMrK8pqBzKkRAXlNyox8CQHRH_UjRZ3CuDDZcY_RIFnOhMLixHMPNxqw5vWnW2ZNzPrrxcMXsvaXrGAYAgqKCpcy9rofPynN_UJFX3Wg93OpTS3r0vjTl_yk4KzjjMtPe3peCs_BGv2O-loydmtlZcuGVjNRmcL6TUDMLCjfM1PSa8rKzCLdhVMHen8jyI-p_hW8JvgMAAP__O8FbtQ) in the Los Angeles area, where 70,000 residents are under evacuation orders and 1.5 million customers are without power. The Palisades, Eaton, and Hurst fires have burned over 35 square miles, stretching from the Pacific Coast to Pasadena. At least 28,000 structures are at risk, with 1,000 already destroyed. [See the fire map here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuhDAQRL_GdEb22pi7wkUaukubEi14fWxkMMLOofv7iPTpRhpp5ul9PcYHcuLt-Ykr-RrzCAo6qbRU9zEgp_dom-AjEZBpyOveOAvQ6Vuz-BjuziI5B110DidjAkw3Y4MLwQJCw_5aU1rdtTad7tsJgzGKpt46AIIorKLANR_td-atLhTTO7_oaOe8Nskvte5FmA8Bg4DhPM92nspGZ7l6AcMVBQwzJo752Bhl5IPkinuROyYuGKhIwpo3ufwcpcqLR8DQHD7sJ6fExfXCqueKnP5O638SXh5-AwAA___ArF8g). California Gov. Gavin Newsom has proclaimed [a state of emergency](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD3PnDAQhH-N6RbZaw7uLSjS0L1pU54WvIaN_IFs59D9-4j0aWaq55Fmfn2_vkmCpP0nRZ6bzy_U-ABtQH-9HEn4vIbOzZ4Z2XY8m8mOA-LDPLtjtpa3QaP343OyOGpjaNU0jmZbn88H-07m26aN_jLGPszUr-Ss1bxOw4jI6NWg2UnLpf-dJbWDffjkN5d-y7EL89HaWZX9oXBRuFzX1e_53W90l8LllitctLljUrjsN5tygcRXzRHOkrdAEivURo0he-DIZee0fSAytwqXtAO8lNqgcD1zclwqSIKTNvGywUlBKjmuQFEcOEo7l_yn3hDDxdQOLgqXrszuvCQEqeOkBr1HkvBvR_vfr-8Z_wYAAP__GWJ8xg) and visited with state and local fire officials on the scene. The fires are being described as the most destructive in Los Angeles history. Officials have warned residents that dry conditions and [gusting Santa Ana winds](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGvpCAURn-NdtcAomhBsY3dbLulucJF2SBMgNE3__5lXv_KL19ycnL-PdYH-uDj_hdP0tWlVTAxAOPA5tWiD-9VtlY7IkF9S5qrfpRCDHxqD70x3GYzKjkxpEk6NjDjJpROMTnaWbVef2iMs5nzfuCq29D2PaNNyVEIEq6RjKyvKXf_k4_1IBfe6aLcmXS2QR-1PkvT_2nE0ojlvu_Opa9Id_n8jViCvwg-uxGL85kKZNwJ0ORUCoRUAONOgQqY9Ir1DS5l4-MO9UivgtEWqAnoQvPCSlAP8hmOdFJps7bP24fgy6gayfYTffixqr9VurT4DgAA__-zl20s) will result in further destruction as the fires remain 0% contained.
## Justice Department to Release Only Jan. 6 Report
Attorney General Merrick Garland announced Wednesday that [he'll release the part of special counsel Jack Smith's report](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp_G3ojgco1hYOiSLV07WtdwiUnxj2yaKG9fuXvHT590jnS-bsONcsnL_ZNm9jWtA0johFRCuiFSLu8B2-gTM7Bu2ateGwTolG0nj46tTgmksyOwCkQYO3BSAZBxCdvsT5pU0imlO9VfRopaSx57NAAMqUHJMdd1vzzWvNSJU3mvT94vYZ3b4qdat6PRHw1cG7jStvDrOK9z7DWHwg1c6_4zb-JB4Vscc66TeNAijAi9tRTsGDF0IwakGEFrG42DiB3Ldvdxe-VS8mH6BuV9plz-vPW_Dk8PvwEAAP__0UpdcQ) dealing with President-elect Donald Trump's actions around Jan. 6. However, Garland said the DOJ will [withhold the Mar-a-Lago classified documents](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtuwzAMAL9G3hRI9EP2oKGLt3TtaNARbTHVw5DVBPn7It07H3AH3Nd1uSIHTvsnRrJ1ywso6KXSUk2LQw6vpWuc3YiA2oasNu3QAfR6bLyFbegNgIMeSI3raDRtoDdwq74BwdSwfduUVpPWba_NZUXXtopW0w0ABJvoFDmuuVzumVP1tIVXflC53HJsgvW1HqdoPwTMAubqyXMIbyZg9jlSoucpYEYXOfFZC1bOScDcK9OOZpI7loDJyTvevuUZuXp5xyQHWejIpcpafuIhIxaJMuCeBcxNse54cgh8DkZ0ao_If8mm_rfnYeE3AAD__2AVZ1U) portion while two co-defendants still face trial. That part of the report will be made available to House and Senate Judiciary Committee members in private. It was unclear when the Jan. 6 volume of the report would be made public. Experts say the classified documents report would most likely never be released.
## List: Best Waffle Cafe in Each State
A list of the [best waffle restaurants](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFugzAQQL_GbEa-s4EweOjClq4d0SU-B1cOjswVxN9X6d796T3pfV3nK6Wc1scnPdlLLDMa7LQBbcY5UMrn7JrgIzOybdjDYHuH2MGlWbwDE4O50yW6jgnugcKFwYKDMaLD2CT_thkwI4DtYGhvFKw1fBtcj8gYlTMckpTafpe0ysIxn2Xn2t7Ls8l-EXltyn4onBROx3G0uewcSwlvQOH0oJy5njltonACY_thVDjJwvrGm-iDYsysK29CP5VW0WnVvHM99SYk3FQfXkfKOW39oJx5PCnlv7j8N2P3-BsAAP__3DhiZQ) in each state shows that Americans love waffles whether piled high with berries or drenched in syrup with a side of fried chicken. The list ranges from the simple waffle at [Le Peep in Nebraska](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FuwyAQQL8GtlhwYDADQxdv6drRwnAXX4WD5aBU-fsq3Ts_vSe9r-tyTVz5fvtMO8ZObQEF40XpiwpLSVxfi5UlEiKgkRi1N84CjHqSW7Qpkw2rTVN2lEMwExBqTZ4yFAcgOb5rSqugtRm1H9ZUjFG4eusAEEhYhYV7O4fvxve-IdVXe-I55LbLGrfej4cwHwJmAXPFA_Foe9rSmwuY5RnL8cO18sN5YdVtT1z_3P7fyzPCbwAAAP__YLlLFA) to the breakfast cereal-covered waffle from the Moffle Bar food truck in New Jersey. More than 10 restaurants serve fried chicken with their waffles. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: History Facts
subject: The child prodigy who performed for JFK
body:
On November 29, 1962, 7-year-old cello prodigy Yo-Yo Ma performed at the D.C. National Guard Armory in front of President John F. Kennedy and other esteemed dignitaries. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cfrl1cfw2o10ej4y62ujsgtchndqnbnktw92oc7jhn5cr7iwwwsgh8iy96o8pwhat74ptsag2c0c5k11xoz1m0in4lqmvf8ommeo3prxt3rbel5if91iby02wkou56pnoigmq82cwgpulj2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sptlqi&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Yo-Yo Ma played for JFK at just 7 years old.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sptlqi&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Famous Figures](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sptlqi&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sptlqi&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| O n November 29, 1962, 7-year-old cello prodigy Yo-Yo Ma performed at the D.C. National Guard Armory in front of President John F. Kennedy and other esteemed dignitaries. His appearance was part of a televised event called “An American Pageant of the Arts,” which was held to raise money for the National Cultural Center — later renamed the Kennedy Center. This arts organization was founded under Kennedy’s predecessor Dwight D. Eisenhower, who also [attended the event](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sptlqi&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) by remote satellite from Augusta, Georgia.
---
The event featured acts including singer Harry Belafonte, ballerina Maria Tallchief, and Yo-Yo Ma and his 11-year-old sister, Yeou-Cheng Ma, who accompanied her brother on piano. It marked the U.S. and television debut for the cellist, who had been playing for audiences in his home nation of France [since age 5](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sptlqi&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). On this night, the duo was introduced by emcee Leonard Bernstein before playing a rendition of Jean-Baptiste Bréval’s “Concertino No. 3 in A Major.” The talented musical siblings were received quite favorably; both Kennedy and Eisenhower were shown on TV applauding with delight.
While this marked the first time Yo-Yo Ma performed for an American president, it wasn’t the last. The musician has played cello in front of [several U.S. presidents](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=p2t3ayg77q7zlz2k0aqlpdqun084i2hsuevelkjhd26rps18h5kldkij5qmbuv4t42tt3yrk5gkzofpjkewdvpo80e0oohkwxdofxqrd71ipqo5pbxbgns4dwbzsqyrs20zmz7x1zhzl0i4ub0uls5czc1sh5bjqpa1thsfhujn8f08tyjs14ab8hs13ec9t5gwayru2oab4xx23n20k7lnzfrmx50thqwud2p3ivqvxbppvq51pjbfp5ivaihlzpuxirgio9koipcm42g73ylgl59br&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sptlqi&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), including at the White House for Ronald Reagan in 1987 and at a 2018 Armistice ceremony for Donald Trump. He also performed at Barack Obama’s 2009 inauguration — which was attended by Jimmy Carter, George H.W. Bush, Bill Clinton, George W. Bush, and Joe Biden — and he delivered a virtual cello performance at President Biden’s 2021 inauguration.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sptlqi&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sptlqi&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Abraham Lincoln frequently attended the opera.
Despite his own lack of musical skills, Abraham Lincoln was a self-professed lover of music, and attended the opera upwards of 30 times during his presidency. Lincoln attended his first opera on February 20, 1861, two weeks before his first inauguration. That night he enjoyed a performance of Giuseppe Verdi’s _A Masked Ball_ , an ominously portentous story about the assassination of a Swedish king. Though he was sometimes accompanied by his wife, Mary Todd Lincoln, or friends, Lincoln enjoyed attending operas alone, and was especially fond of _Faust_ by Charles Gounod, which he saw at least four times. Lincoln found these performances therapeutic amid the tribulations of his presidency, though according to the White House Historical Association, he was often criticized for spending so much time at the opera instead of focusing his attention on the ongoing Civil War. The 16th president defended his leisurely activities, [saying](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sptlqi&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), “I must have a change or I will die.”

clean_body: On November 29, 1962, 7-year-old cello prodigy Yo-Yo Ma performed at the D.C. National Guard Armory in front of President John F. Kennedy and other esteemed dignitaries. | O n November 29, 1962, 7-year-old cello prodigy Yo-Yo Ma performed at the D.C. National Guard Armory in front of President John F. Kennedy and other esteemed dignitaries. His appearance was part of a televised event called “An American Pageant of the Arts,” which was held to raise money for the National Cultural Center — later renamed the Kennedy Center. This arts organization was founded under Kennedy’s predecessor Dwight D. Eisenhower, who also by remote satellite from Augusta, Georgia. The event featured acts including singer Harry Belafonte, ballerina Maria Tallchief, and Yo-Yo Ma and his 11-year-old sister, Yeou-Cheng Ma, who accompanied her brother on piano. It marked the U.S. and television debut for the cellist, who had been playing for audiences in his home nation of France . On this night, the duo was introduced by emcee Leonard Bernstein before playing a rendition of Jean-Baptiste Bréval’s “Concertino No. 3 in A Major.” The talented musical siblings were received quite favorably; both Kennedy and Eisenhower were shown on TV applauding with delight. While this marked the first time Yo-Yo Ma performed for an American president, it wasn’t the last. The musician has played cello in front of , including at the White House for Ronald Reagan in 1987 and at a 2018 Armistice ceremony for Donald Trump. He also performed at Barack Obama’s 2009 inauguration — which was attended by Jimmy Carter, George H.W. Bush, Bill Clinton, George W. Bush, and Joe Biden — and he delivered a virtual cello performance at President Biden’s 2021 inauguration. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Age Yo-Yo Ma began studying cello 4 | | Grammy Awards won by Yo-Yo Ma 19 | Grammy Awards won by Yo-Yo Ma 19 | | Value of one of Yo-Yo Ma’s personal cellos $2.5 million | | JFK’s reading speed (in words per minute) 1,200 | JFK’s reading speed (in words per minute) 1,200 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Abraham Lincoln frequently attended the opera. Despite his own lack of musical skills, Abraham Lincoln was a self-professed lover of music, and attended the opera upwards of 30 times during his presidency. Lincoln attended his first opera on February 20, 1861, two weeks before his first inauguration. That night he enjoyed a performance of Giuseppe Verdi’s A Masked Ball , an ominously portentous story about the assassination of a Swedish king. Though he was sometimes accompanied by his wife, Mary Todd Lincoln, or friends, Lincoln enjoyed attending operas alone, and was especially fond of Faust by Charles Gounod, which he saw at least four times. Lincoln found these performances therapeutic amid the tribulations of his presidency, though according to the White House Historical Association, he was often criticized for spending so much time at the opera instead of focusing his attention on the ongoing Civil War. The 16th president defended his leisurely activities, , “I must have a change or I will die.” Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | Recommended Reading | | | ---|---|--- | | | ---|---|--- | | | ---|--- | ---|--- A daily digest of history's most fascinating happenings. | Want to unsubscribe? | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- Copyright © 2024 History Facts. Friend, it’s Scott Presler emailing you from New Jersey where I just received some fantastic news.
**I just got the December voter registration numbers for the state and they are amazing. We registered 9 new Republican voters to every 1 new Democratic voter.**
In 2024, President Trump made HUGE gains in New Jersey, and we identified it as our next state to flip Blue to RED.

[FLIP NJ RED](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX-NuQXBjG2yBw7dsrn1sNKmTXtBBg-NGxuQbYj495URynE-ffJ7T1ZutmbYala9M4C70YEBMPzGAJaIP9X1-sNvp8nJ0xOBEmbw_TBXeLljrz6cXPh6HcMfa7_8--3XWr7suM30co_InJwyNtGqyXTNQZVDn1FdVig5CIkiu9cch04SvFVSd4MYOqik4B2cEUBTKbrM1FCAKMrirQSoCpFjAT12A1clouRaM17sQfngieLdjA_yWhm75f3kMlvfY5zDXuzC4BKoXzzlTzN60slgcCHl7XZap0jpWFWrp7GdXEu-DfNp_Nf60B4lzukVvCzRtWFafE8Mm7G3DGRCjrRZHMOm8weJ5NM9RF0ykO1ojWbY0EN8Oi--qtsO90_B5nY7X39_fMrM13p-GmtNkBXjxd99XRqz1vA_AAD__8lWjnw)

The 2025 race for New Jersey Governor has officially begun, and we have an amazing opportunity to flip the Governor’s mansion from Blue to Red.

clean_body: I just got the December voter registration numbers for the state and they are amazing. | | | | | Friend, it’s Scott Presler emailing you from New Jersey where I just received some fantastic news. I just got the December voter registration numbers for the state and they are amazing. We registered 9 new Republican voters to every 1 new Democratic voter. We hit the ground running and the numbers speak for themselves, but we have a long road to November. The 2025 race for New Jersey Governor has officially begun, and we have an amazing opportunity to flip the Governor’s mansion from Blue to Red. . Please chip in whatever you can today to help fund our NJ voter registration efforts. Thank you for all your support, Scott Presler Founder, Early Vote Action | | | |

Friend,

You're part of a special group of Americans who still believe in the spirit of 1776. You know that our country was founded on timeless principles that are worth fighting for. We believe that too.

body:
The future of American healthcare is being decided right now.
| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JH5FVCM936V8HRFQ29TZFVMJ_0)
---
| | | | Dear Friend, The future of American healthcare is being decided right now. Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s nomination as Secretary of Health and Human Services (HHS) has ignited a battle between those who seek transparency and reform—and those desperate to maintain the status quo. Special interests are mobilizing to block RFK Jr.’s confirmation, pouring resources into spreading lies and silencing the voices of everyday Americans. They believe they can win by drowning us out. But they’re wrong. We have something far more powerful: **you.**
---
| | [ JOIN THE FIGHT ](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JH5FVCM936V8HRFQ29TZFVMJ_1)
---
| Your voice, your action, and your commitment to this cause are what will tip the scales in this fight. MAHA (Make America Healthy Again) Alliance is organizing a nationwide movement to ensure every senator hears the will of the people. We’re equipping grassroots advocates with the tools to counter misinformation and make their voices impossible to ignore. This fight isn’t just about confirming RFK Jr. It’s about proving that a unified movement of Americans can overcome even the most entrenched special interests. But we can’t do this alone. **[To win, we need to mobilize immediately—and that’s where you come in.](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JH5FVCM936V8HRFQ29TZFVMJ_2)** Your donation today directly supports this urgent grassroots effort. Every dollar helps us recruit more advocates, reach key decision-makers, and push back against the powerful forces trying to block reform. _Without your support, we risk losing this pivotal moment to transform healthcare._ The clock is ticking. Senators are making their decisions, and the opposition is doubling down. **[Will you stand with us now , when your voice matters most? >>](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JH5FVCM936V8HRFQ29TZFVMJ_3)** Donate Now to send a clear message that Americans demand accountability and reform.
---

| This isn’t just another political battle—it’s a fight for the future of healthcare, and for the trust and transparency every American deserves. Please don’t wait. Your contribution could be the difference between victory and defeat. **[Give Today](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JH5FVCM936V8HRFQ29TZFVMJ_5)** and join the fight to Make America Healthy Again. Thank you for standing with us in this critical hour, MAHA Alliance

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 1/9/2025
body:
Everything you need to know about the first day of the 75th General Assembly
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/sclae4ec9c2)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/s4tab317b5d)**
| | Hi friends,
We have a special edition for you today... everything you need to know from the start of 2025 Legislative Session yesterday. All RMV exclusives! Here's a summary:
🏛️******75th Legislative Session Begins..** The 75th Colorado General Assembly convened, with [Minority Leader Rose Pugliese](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/s1i807a6544) emphasizing Republicans' commitment to addressing issues for all Coloradans, ranging from education to infrastructure. Early in the session, House Republicans [demonstrated unity](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/s9qcbc1dd17) while raising critical questions about [election security](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/sau3561bbb1), underscoring concerns about password leaks affecting certification processes. Senator Byron Pelton called on Governor Jared Polis to [prioritize road repairs](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/s9i9c9c0da9), reminding legislators of promises made to constituents.

🇺🇸**On the National Stage...** The House passed the [Laken Riley Act](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/s8j559686c3), named after a Georgia student killed by a migrant, as its first major border security legislation of 2025. With bipartisan support, this bill aims to mandate detention for migrants arrested for theft. Meanwhile, President-elect Donald Trump criticized Governor Gavin Newsom's resource management during [California's wildfires](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/s8sd7a55dd7), mainly mismanagement in water allocation.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Rep. Gonzalez praised Colorado’s [TABOR Amendment](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/ser221c8666) for its continued role in safeguarding taxpayer interests, stressing its importance amid growing fiscal pressures.
This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, January 9, 2025.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Minority Leader Pugliese pledges Republicans will find solutions for all Coloradans in 75th session](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/sej829a0409)** BY BRIAN PORTER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/s1rc60067da)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/sap99c0ea39)
When Rose Pugliese left behind her children to begin the 75th General Assembly in Denver, as children will do she was asked why she did the job of Colorado House minority leader.
“Because the people trusted me to be there, to be their voice,” she answered. “They didn’t just do that for me, but for everyone there.”
The 75th legislative session officially opened at 10:09 a.m. Wednesday in the Colorado House. Pugliese addressed the House as the minority leader following the Speaker’s election.
“This session, the House Republicans remain steadfast in addressing the issues of importance to Coloradans,” she said. “Affordability remains at the forefront of our discussions. You will see that in our legislation.”
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/sbp491c3b53)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/sfp00c0e244)
|
---
**[One early moment in 75th Legislature demonstrates unity of House Republican caucus](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/s7s49463d2e)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/saife2148bd)
* During the opening session of the 75th Colorado General Assembly, all 19 House Republicans unanimously supported Minority Leader Rose Pugliese for Speaker of the House. While the position ultimately went to Democrat Julie McCluskie in a party-line vote, the gesture symbolized Republican solidarity.
* In her remarks, Pugliese emphasized the importance of transparency, collaboration, and adhering to constitutional principles, stating her commitment to giving Coloradans a strong voice in the legislature. She urged bipartisan cooperation on critical issues like housing, public safety, and education.
* The Republican caucus highlighted concerns about past Democratic practices, such as rushed legislation and limited debate, vowing to restore trust in the legislative process by advocating for thorough and inclusive deliberations.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/sap66cabb4f)**
|
---
**[House opens 75th session with Rep. DeGraaf questioning, if passwords were leaked can election be certified?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/sbh4782cac5)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/s7vb898bb69)
* During the opening session of Colorado’s 75th General Assembly, Rep. Ken DeGraaf raised objections to the House credentials committee report, citing concerns over leaked election system passwords from Secretary of State Jena Griswold’s office.
* DeGraaf criticized Colorado’s election system, questioning how it could still be considered the “gold standard” despite the leaks. He argued that without thorough investigations, potential fraud cannot be ruled out.
* Despite objections from DeGraaf and five other House members, the credentials report was accepted, and the election was certified with a 57-6 vote.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/scl4bc1e03c)**
|
---
**[‘We need our roads fixed’: ‘Peltonia’ Sen. Byron Pelton opens 75th session with reminder for Gov. Polis](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/s2mcb45b515)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/s1r5bd96527)
* Senator Byron Pelton reminded Governor Polis of the dire need for road repairs in rural Colorado, emphasizing the region’s role in generating $47 billion annually for the state through agriculture.
* Pelton pointed out that his district, which includes six of the top 10 agricultural counties in Colorado, faces significant infrastructure issues, with roads riddled with potholes likened to conditions during Westward Expansion.
* Labeling his district “Peltonia,” Pelton stressed the importance of addressing infrastructure to support agricultural communities and ensure their continued contribution to Colorado’s economy.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/s9k1080e700)**
|
---
**[Rep. Gonzalez: Without TABOR, we would have higher taxes, little to no tax refunds, and unlimited government spending](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/s1pa0e6e9d6)** [COMPLETE COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/s5jec1d34b5)
_In 1992, Colorado voters passed the Taxpayer’s Bill of Rights, or TABOR, the nation’s strongest tax limitation law to this day. For those who are unfamiliar what TABOR really does, this amendment to the Colorado Constitution allows government spending to reasonably increase using a formula of population growth plus inflation. Excess revenue, known as the “TABOR surplus,” must be refunded to taxpayers. If state government wants to keep the surplus, or raise taxes, voters must approve. That is exactly why progressives abhor TABOR. But the truth is, a little north of 60% of Colorado voters approve of TABOR._
_Many progressives have made their disdain for TABOR be known, having tried time and time again to chip away at TABOR’s taxpayer protections. And in many ways, they’ve done so; mostly by adding tax credits which pull from the TABOR surplus. They’ve done so by giving everyone equal tax refunds and redistributing wealth; taking from those who paid the most in state taxes and giving more to those who paid little._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._FWg/seu6ac43a34)**
|

**🤔 DID YOU KNOW?** The American Civil War ended in 1865, yet over 150 years later, the Department of Veterans Affairs was **still issuing survivor benefits**. Mose Triplett, who initially fought for the Confederacy before switching to the Union, began receiving his pension two decades after the war. In 1930, at the age of 83, he fathered a daughter, Irene. She was entitled to a monthly pension of $73.13 until her death in 2020 at the age of 90.

body:

---
My heart sinks even writing these words... but I need your help, Friend.
---
**_In just DAYS, reports indicate my trial is set to begin as I fight for the _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
To me, this trial now feels like the culmination of a years-long witch hunt and an assault – not just on my freedom – but on the freedom of every patriotic American.
---
The Democrats’ Deep State has made it their mission to personally, professionally, and financially ruin me all for standing by the TRUTH and by my dear friend, our 45th and 47th president.
---
And because the Left knows there's simply no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of _everything_ I own.
---
But it doesn’t end with them stripping me of my possessions, priceless keepsakes I was given as Mayor that I passed on to my son, or even my home...
---
No, these leftist tyrants' end goal is to see me thrown in jail as an innocent man for the rest of my life.
---
_**In fact, an Obama judge just threatened me with “ _IMPRISONMENT!_ ” **_
---
But no matter what it costs me, I will _never_ _surrender_ this fight for my freedom and justice.
---
**And it’s the generosity of patriots like YOU that gives me the courage to keep fighting.**
---
I understand that so many of you are still struggling from the consequences of Biden and Kamala’s disastrous policies. And if that’s your case, then please know your kind thoughts and prayers are more than enough to help keep my spirits and my head held high.
---
__But if you can support my legal defense trust at this pivotal moment in my legal battle, know that I’ve never needed your help more than right now.__

The student started asking his question to Kirk, who had teamed up with comedian Rob Schneider for the campus debate event.
"Do you actually believe everything that you're saying?" the student asked. Kirk began to engage with him carefully, knowing that he was hostile towards his point of view, but at this point friendly.
"Yes I do believe everything that I say," Kirk answered bluntly. Schneider immediately sniffed out that this student had bad intentions entering into the conversation.
"Yeah, I think that's a bad fait question!" Schneider said. "Because your assumption is that we are insincere in our beliefs,..."

# Joe Rogan WARNED of uncontrollable LA fires - "We just get lucky..."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/674bbca8-772b-4254-ad1c-c372ec00f77e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**[Video from TUPACABRA on X.](https://substack.com/redirect/7a54b815-d58d-403e-a1c1-2f0bd4f6da6b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Clips from Joe Rogan's podcast have resurfaced on X, revealing his warnings about a potential mega-fire devastating Los Angeles.
Rogan shared insights from firefighters he's spoken to about the catastrophic potential if the "right wind" fueled a fire through LA to the ocean. His predictions now seem to have come true with the devastation of **[the Palisades Fire and Eaton Fire,](https://substack.com/redirect/2a0cc0f6-e935-447f-afec-14f142725cda?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** which have led to evacuations, significant property damage and even death.
Rogan, wearing an LAFD shirt in one interview, explained his move from Los Angeles partly due to the looming threat of fires.
"I talked to a fireman once, and he was telling me 'dude, one day, it's just going to be the right wind, and the fire is going to start in the right place and it's going to burn through LA all the way to the ocean. And there's not a f***ing thing we can do about it..."

# _**Resurfaced:**_**Woke school bans student from wearing MAGA hat, so she goes on Fox News & gets her REVENGE**
A brave young Trump supporter decided **[to take a stand against her woke teachers](https://substack.com/redirect/ce75d9f9-6863-4a7c-acbe-2a6ea84b3fa6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who told her to remove her MAGA hat in class.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ce75d9f9-6863-4a7c-acbe-2a6ea84b3fa6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Why would you want to pick this fight?" Fox News' Laura Ingraham asked the young California high school student.
"The school system seems to be trapped under the government's thumb about what they're supposed to teach,.. what's acceptable to force down our throats in a sense," she explained.
"I just felt that someone needed to take a stand!"
Ingraham asked "Are you gonna keep wearing the hat?"
"Yeah!" the girl said with a big smile.
**[Listen to what the school system decided to do to her because of a hat!](https://substack.com/redirect/ce75d9f9-6863-4a7c-acbe-2a6ea84b3fa6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

Now, I'm in the Senate working for you. As I'm getting started in 2025, I've already heard from countless people about the issues that they're focused on, and I want to give you a chance to share your thoughts with me as we ramp up the legislative session. That's why I'm coming to you today with a short priorities survey so I know what issues matter most to you. ## Biden legacy now includes special cash to promote Satan! * WorldNetDaily * by Bob Unruh
Joe Biden’s legacy is going to include 20% plus inflation that has been hugely injurious to Americans. And the ideology of body mutilating transgender “treatments” for children. And abortion. And an open southern border that allowed in millions and millions of illegal aliens. And his fumbling, stumbling, mumbling public behavior that left no doubt about [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=6d62b5e08b4f46d58d2765227fcd6cd8&_e=GYXdmJf0ZhRqyPx9BLUpQJfKv1KCNHr7XSQFMpxBBBLqllayQAHneqeo6QGEnWEzwG4fufuSyur-uEcF8wwv8eVC3xm7w87HIfiOuyrVfl5WV2jpMWFkjqVKvcIOny5_L4upj9e6HOBh3TO_W_uNftJswaQMR9adWLfaJawTkNF1pN5Udm4sI72xdqRPktS55kJV4Ek_qEZpUrLn_jXsEGdC5o9GEVGr9a1LvAAfHYqpqFHSPJ6JBE_cUp9aL4FmV62LNBwW0b6PEuqM11riB9SwdA_PMkUJgItj6N4nu5XXhfaqIWjaOOBKJBCDq6ZU)

## Another Round, Please. – RedState
Plenty of Americans like an adult beverage now and then. Whether it be a martini, a tot of gin, a glass of wine with dinner, a cold beer in the afternoon, or a shot of good sipping whiskey, there are as many choices for imbibing as there are imbibers, likely. ## The Fall of the Censorship Wall at Facebook
Since Donald Trump won reelection, the fiercest Trump-bashers in the press have raged against any sign of media titans softening their approaches before the second term begins. Visits to Mar-a-Lago? Outrageous! Donating to Trump’s inauguration? Unconscionable! Then Facebook founder Mark Zuckerberg announced his Meta sites would be abandoning the censorship of “fact-checkers,” in place since [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=6d62b5e08b4f46d58d2765227fcd6cd8&_e=GYXdmJf0ZhRqyPx9BLUpQJfKv1KCNHr7XSQFMpxBBBJ2udpDwqc6UhcCXpdQpaH_jVdCbYED-647No5ZlWGLqBGqTElXhKMo0dyDQRUcP0JhTYEKCMomebbj0qpjN_QW07lfg60CsIe7LTYgZUO8IraBbsI8ERQp2vdvsrf1H5KuwN8zT67bu95_q5KTQcONdstD4U1bnjIDzrRrNAq1iZr0wpuEIi_eZU8ICdUzm4Mta-_vYm2sEOZ3YiidzjCX-xC0rDlOrnZdsdaR_TtvQA%3D%3D)

Besides being the best thing for the country, the election of Donald Trump also gave conservatives a sort of off-the-record kind of perk -- being able to roll around in the abject floundering and failure of the left. It is glorious to watch and provides numerous instances of comedy gold. You have unlocked this exclusive opportunity due to your incredible Team Marsha record of supporting President Trump. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=2aa258fa0f79d14ce597d0579bd727f7399d96626d9b96427568561e1a8acca2a430ffb70ed34cd062c1867d0cee5a1c402c26e94c4b27ac787bc73ad9d40efb So, Peter, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience: Dear President Trump, I am writing to express my unwavering support for your leadership as the 47th President of the United States. Your vision and values for the future of our country deeply resonate with me and I am eager to work alongside you in advancing the America First Agenda. I firmly believe that your leadership is exactly what our nation needs at this critical time. >From the beginning, I have been a proud supporter of your efforts: 1) Your dedication to securing our borders, lowering taxes, strengthening our economy, and prioritizing national security has proven time and time again that YOU are the right person to lead America. 2) Your commitment to defending our families and restoring common-sense policies has had a lasting impact on our country, and I am confident that YOUR leadership will bring prosperity and safety BACK to our nation for all Americans. Please know that you have my full support as you continue working toward seeing the America First Agenda through to the end and reversing all the radical policies that have been imposed by the Biden-Harris Administration. Thank you for your dedication to preserving the values that make America great. Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: these bad laws went into effect Jan. 1
body:
Peter, We need you to be a member of the Common Sense Club (and if you already are – we see you ☺! – we need you to encourage
|
---
| Peter, We _need_ you to be a [member](https://xtz223.keap-link004.com/v2/click/acaa8f68c571f3a42c6e1d4fce73c12d/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnCVJM2hvIRKieYg6h65DLrkfrGNk4X9v-8BTQTCnmWee4Z07EKpSUVoDgyvdgiAEDyxyYQQqirWikr-mQbSYh3MPWqHOG6t7A-z-dXkCnu0wXC08oMGgQ_a7dZylxeaYp0XmSFNad-NPT7ScPMl2neYwjj_FKAUlF-fugJHt8ZmoFi4VHWzr-IbIdMz3uZZSqw5d8bavZtqefImyQts1wvjOVBqDqv68IcPh7Rsfs31mag==) of the Common Sense Club (and if you already are – we see you ☺! – we need you to encourage a friend or relative to join you). Here’s why. The lunatics in Trenton were busy in 2024, from Governor Phil Murphy on down. A whole slew of new legislation that they passed and signed in 2024 took effect this past week, on January 1. Here are a few of the worst offenders...
* **The minimum wage goes up** – _for the seventh year in a row_. This is thanks to a law passed in 2019 that allows the New Jersey Department of Labor and Workforce Development to set a new minimum wage every year after 2024 based on data from the Consumer Price Index. This is crushing not just to small businesses, but to workers competing for minimum wage jobs as employers cut positions to save.
* **New 2.6 cent/per gallon gas tax hike** – kicking off _five more years_ of hikes. This was done, once again, under the guise of improving transportation. But we’ve been there, done that, starting with the first gas tax hikes Steve Sweeney championed while he was Senate President. And our transportation system couldn’t be much worse. We call BS.
* **The “Freedom to Read AKA Groom” Act gives school employees full immunity** to expose students to sexually explicit materials that would normally constitute a violation of the obscenities statute for minors. Enough said.
* **Basic math, reading, and writing proficiency requirements ELIMINATED** for new NJ teachers seeking certification. Thanks to A1669, the State Board of Education is now _prohibited_ from requiring new teachers seeking certification in New Jersey to complete “a commissioner-approved test of basic reading, writing, and mathematics skills.” Dumbing down standards is a poor way to “solve” the teacher shortage, and our students will be the ones to suffer.

---
| | [Enough! I’m joining now at $10/month.](https://xtz223.keap-link004.com/v2/click/6bd440d08ee8f32576afa9ebfb4a8852/eJyNkMsKglAQht9l1pKoGeROJEQ0F1Hr8DLkIc-F4xiZ-O4dK1wVBLOa-eYb_hmBUBSCkhoCuNPDdT2wQGPFFENBkRRUVK-p668dz7GgZeIaa9krCMavywswtz1v61pAg0KDHA9hlCZ5fM6SPDWkKrS58afH3yye3T5MMpimn2LkjHY34-4gIN3jnKhmJhWddGv4hkh1gW1XknMpOjRVtX25kvpic-Ql6q5hyjamQikU9ecNKQ5v3_QEsdVmaA==)
---
| | [Upgrade my membership to VIP – Annual](https://xtz223.keap-link004.com/v2/click/86e44da0338ec4126be6cb07b50086e2/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnCXLTSFvIhF-JBR1jm0daKnWbR0jE_972weeCrrOPO8zvNMBoeKKkhJCuNHd8xg4YFBILVFRXCni4rX1_OmETRw4SXVcmKrREHZfwwPwHDM2GztArUaLbNZRnCXFYpcnRWZJzY298afHDwbPfBklOfT9TzGeJc2v1l1DSKbBZ6NS2la0NSfLH4h0HbruvmlHNRmpcSSqs8tEHVxinq2CtNinKApuXVxrVOXnERm2b2P_AEGsZas=)

| | [I’m already a member, but I’m chipping in some extra today](https://xtz223.keap-link004.com/v2/click/8923ab456e077b880c9e087d1d0cf137/eJyNkMsKwkAMRf8l62Lty0d3pYiUti58gLqRYRp10E6HaRQf9N-dqrhScJuce8LNHQglk5QUEMKFbq7rgQUauVACJcWVJMafWzfwHc-x4CjkYayrk4Lw_jX8Adqx5w0HFtBVoUHm0yhOk8l4kyWT1JCKaXPjT0_Q-3hGeZRk0DQ_xVgKGp2Nu4aQ9AnbRoUwrWihj4bfE6k6tO2ikoywU5MWCju8Ku3tGnE54LMV9_v-Lu92D0bHlEJZvH-R4vUlbR5-p2an)
---
| The drop in common sense and the level of lunacy underlying each of these bills is off the charts... Truly. Common sense may be common among us regular citizens of New Jersey, but it’s in _very_ short supply among the political elites being elected to Trenton. And as a result, we get patently bad and dangerous lawmaking like this. The power of the Common Sense Club Membership is not just finding a community of other common sense New Jerseyans so you don’t feel so alone amidst the noise of the media elite, but it’s also about empowering ACTION and VOLUME. We’re calling _out_ the BS. Again, and again, and again. And we’re voting. And it’s making waves. Thanks to the message we sent in November, I expect (if they’re smart) that these folks in Trenton will hold back some of the craziness in hopes of being reelected. Hopefully that means we can expect fewer bad bills to take effect January 1, _2026_. So I _urge_ you to JOIN Common Sense Club today (see all the perks [here](https://xtz223.keap-link004.com/v2/click/e955ee6b59bb13a032c96a25ef93cf7f/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnKU1rQ57kwgRrUPUOUyHXHI_2B2jEv97a0WngmBOM888wzs9EKpSUVYDhyvdoyiGACxWwghUtNSKyuo5jeazaTwNoBXqnFrdGeD91-UPMLbjWRgGQDeDHtltk2WebdJDkW1yT5rS-hv_eeL54uNZrZOsgGH4KUYpaHXxbgecbIdjolr4VLS3recbIuM4Y5WWUiuHvqq2O060PTGJ8ojWNcIwbyqNQVW_35Dj7eUbHqmGZl4=)!) or get a family member or friend to join you as a member (since I know many of you reading this are already members, and we thank you!). We’re taking back Trenton and New Jersey. It starts with us! And it’s already underway. For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader
---
|
---
| President
Common Sense Club [Share this newsletter on social media!](https://xtz223.keap-link004.com/v2/click/d0040adad8b73f12057960ab601975de/eJyNkMGKwkAMht8l546lrYr0JiJSqh5k9yxjG3W0zQwzqa4rfXfj7uJpFxZySr58P8kdGEkTFzXk8MGfaZpBBB4r4wwSzyyxrr6m6WiYZEkEjaHzwtvOQX7_dfkFPNtZNplEwDeHgrxtprOyWC-2y2JdCum0l4x_ekbjl2e-mhZL6Ps_xdganl_EHSBn3-HzotrIVfzuG-GPzC7kcVzZtrUUUKpqut3A-kPMRwyodrpWjb4GdRWLMsRW4X4vAnXSpJJYQrRzSPXPh0q8fUf1D_vUb8I=)
---
|
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/24898846/950bbfdafa93655e) Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States

name: Rushern Baker III
subject: Call to Action: Let's Make a difference this Saturday!
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93538/images/Yard%20Signs%20%28March%202022%29%20%2815%29.png]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-1]
Dear Friends and Neighbors,
As we count down to this Saturday, January 11 , we’re reaching out again to emphasize just how critical your involvement is to the Rushern Baker for County Executive campaign. Your passion and dedication can truly help drive this campaign forward.
Why This Saturday Matters:
This canvassing day is a pivotal moment for the campaign. Together, we’ll:
* Engage directly with voters to share Rushern Baker’s vision for the future.
* Build meaningful connections with our community to inspire support and turnout.
* Show the strength of our movement by coming together in full force.
How You Can Help:
* Join the Canvassing Team: Meet us at 9 :00 AM via Zoom to launch this important day of outreach.
* Spread the Word: Encourage your friends and family to volunteer alongside you!
Make an Impact Today:
If you can attend this Saturday , please reply to this email. Together, we’ll make sure Rushern Baker’s message reaches every corner of our community.
Your help—whether it’s knocking on doors, making calls, or supporting the team in other ways—will make a difference. This is your chance to take action and help shape the future of our county!
Let’s do this together. I can’t wait to see you there!
JOIN ZOOM NOW [https://us02web.zoom.us/j/84183653892]
Best regards,
Sherrie Brown
Campaign Volunteer Coordinator
Rushern Baker for County Executive Campaign
P.S. Know someone else who would love to join? Share this email and invite them to be part of this exciting movement!
https://www.mobilize.us/rushernbaker/event/748411/ [https://www.mobilize.us/rushernbaker/event/748411/]
https://www.rushernbaker.com/volunteer/ [https://www.rushernbaker.com/volunteer/]
By Authority: Friends of Rushern Baker III, Calvin Brown, Treasurer
Baker for county Executive
9646 Marlboro Pike
Upper Marlboro , MD 20772
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://go.rushernbaker.com/p/IaomYYgddEW9AU2UW5J6pA2?unsubscribedata=oQ5MK%2F1uIz%2Brj8H2EntgCJNBdgXgfOXxkRJvAx4lYpOeN0hKmKXxBsMnrQbd%2B2bZIGe7PJxq%2B7BTOsYnqIWzmvMbyBty%2FMktrTNtjfltpG2zurktky74FyxrZMCZSqOY0JKdIeHX2znI6qWoe8XFtpkVMSBQB8HtGVilSfJXO2S7R7qaPJIRNxI9Wue%2FE1HPVQG7Q%2B8KnphFWKe2QVjsarhzC3Y7IEUTac3XiMVsvAaIkShCCNhoUQWGHNtroQ93XQAPucah20CDKXxu8VzoTBUVToNkUQkE8j7Q4XiiWKZ%2BQgGx4V0Mzedfqeb%2F6d779Mg%2FCVvDYADAsFG1QMl9H7FzNdk1OR2oXd01uoitmWy2zJQmUBBelIZ6isum4%2FADktwJXtPLujNYj555QM28m8SbT7VTR29OCle2DR43G9g%3D .

Let’s do this together. I can’t wait to see you there! JOIN ZOOM NOW [] Best regards, Sherrie Brown Campaign Volunteer Coordinator Rushern Baker for County Executive Campaign P.S. Know someone else who would love to join? Share this email and invite them to be part of this exciting movement! [] [] By Authority: Friends of Rushern Baker III, Calvin Brown, Treasurer Baker for county Executive 9646 Marlboro Pike Upper Marlboro , MD 20772 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

Last week, we sent you our urgent poll asking if you support pardoning January 6th insurrectionists after Trump made that one of the priorities for his first day.

So we’re re-opening our poll and giving you a second chance to complete it. **[_Click HERE or use the button below to sign »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pardon_insurrectionists/?source=FFR_20250109_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=22730%2E4449941%2EvlE--H)** | [COMPLETE POLL NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pardon_insurrectionists/?source=FFR_20250109_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=22730%2E4449941%2EvlE--H)

Fight for Reform

name: Jay Jones
subject: Making life better for all Virginians
body:
https://jayjones.com [https://jayjones.com]

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025]

Friend,

I am so grateful to have you in my corner as I fight to become the next Attorney General of Virginia. The support I've received has been incredible, and I am so appreciative for everyone who has become a part of Team Jay.

I’m in the race to defeat Jason Miyares because we need an Attorney General focused on keeping Virginians safe, not focused on a political agenda.

If you’re fired up to retire Virginia’s MAGA Attorney General, please chip in right now to help keep our campaign going strong. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025] And if you have a few more minutes, keep reading to learn more about my vision and my plans for Virginia...

I am the descendant of slaves. My grandfather, a Civil Rights attorney, was one of the first Black lawyers in Virginia. My father was in the first wave of students to integrate Norfolk’s classrooms, even as the Attorney General at that time shut down the schools to stop it.

Soon, America will have a president who openly flouts the rule of law. In uncertain times like these, I draw strength from my ancestors. In the darkest days of our history, when things looked far more grim than they do today, they held the hope that a brighter future was possible.

As Virginia’s Attorney General, my highest priority will always be my family and my fellow Virginians.

The incoming Trump administration threatens families with higher health care costs, higher prices for everyday goods, and hazards to our health. And Trump will find an eager accomplice in Jason Miyares. He's used his office to advance his own radical far-right agenda instead of protecting Virginians.

But if I'm elected, I will protect Virginia families, our children, and the most vulnerable. I'll crack down on those who would do our kids harm by working with law enforcement to get illegal guns off our streets, shut down drug traffickers, and hold to account gun manufacturers whose weapons of war are used to commit mass shootings and crimes.

I’ll take on the social media companies fueling a mental health crisis among young people and corporations that pollute our air and water. I’ll fight against price-gougers, predatory lenders, and corporate landlords that break the law and make life unaffordable for the middle class.

If the Trump administration again tries to raise health care costs by taking apart the Affordable Care Act, I’ll be the first to take them to court to stop it.

And I will always fight back against any attempt to undermine abortion rights in Virginia.

If you’re ready to fight for Virginia families, to fight back against MAGA politics in Virginia and protect reproductive freedom, I need you with me.

Our team has set a goal to raise $25,000 in January to get our campaign going strong in 2025. We’re counting on folks like you, team, to help us reach this ambitious goal and start the year off in a great position. Will you chip in any amount to help our campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025]

DONATE TODAY → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024]

Now is our moment to hold tightly to hope. Thank you for joining me in this fight.

– Jay Jones

Jay Jones for Virginia
PO Box 2501
Arlington, VA 22202
United States

[] And if you have a few more minutes, keep reading to learn more about my vision and my plans for Virginia... I am the descendant of slaves. My grandfather, a Civil Rights attorney, was one of the first Black lawyers in Virginia. My father was in the first wave of students to integrate Norfolk’s classrooms, even as the Attorney General at that time shut down the schools to stop it. Soon, America will have a president who openly flouts the rule of law. In uncertain times like these, I draw strength from my ancestors. In the darkest days of our history, when things looked far more grim than they do today, they held the hope that a brighter future was possible. As Virginia’s Attorney General, my highest priority will always be my family and my fellow Virginians. The incoming Trump administration threatens families with higher health care costs, higher prices for everyday goods, and hazards to our health. And Trump will find an eager accomplice in Jason Miyares. He's used his office to advance his own radical far-right agenda instead of protecting Virginians. But if I'm elected, I will protect Virginia families, our children, and the most vulnerable. I'll crack down on those who would do our kids harm by working with law enforcement to get illegal guns off our streets, shut down drug traffickers, and hold to account gun manufacturers whose weapons of war are used to commit mass shootings and crimes. I’ll take on the social media companies fueling a mental health crisis among young people and corporations that pollute our air and water. I’ll fight against price-gougers, predatory lenders, and corporate landlords that break the law and make life unaffordable for the middle class. If the Trump administration again tries to raise health care costs by taking apart the Affordable Care Act, I’ll be the first to take them to court to stop it. And I will always fight back against any attempt to undermine abortion rights in Virginia. If you’re ready to fight for Virginia families, to fight back against MAGA politics in Virginia and protect reproductive freedom, I need you with me. Our team has set a goal to raise $25,000 in January to get our campaign going strong in 2025. We’re counting on folks like you, team, to help us reach this ambitious goal and start the year off in a great position. Will you chip in any amount to help our campaign today? [] DONATE TODAY → [] Now is our moment to hold tightly to hope. Thank you for joining me in this fight. – Jay Jones Jay Jones for Virginia PO Box 2501 Arlington, VA 22202 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Reid
subject: Wyoming in 2025
body:
Energy, Crypto, and Ai | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6365777917c1/straight-talk-12721679?e=9e637674b4)
---
[](https://rasner4wy.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6915dcf45e69335acd266178e&id=7c3890e167&e=9e637674b4)
|
---
| | | | | REID ALL ABOUT IT
---
|
---
| **Welcome to 2025, the Year of Wyoming!**
---
| Happy New Year! As we prepare to celebrate the inauguration of **President Trump** , we are reminded of the strength and resilience that define our nation and state. **America First** is more than a slogan—it’s a commitment to bold action, and Wyoming is ready to lead.
Our state’s **energy independence, thriving agriculture, and robust tourism industries** are the backbone of our economy and way of life. These pillars, powered by the determination of our people, are driving Wyoming toward a future filled with opportunities. Big changes are coming, and I promise they will reflect the values that make Wyoming extraordinary.
This year, we are focused on **Wyoming First** : protecting our industries, growing our economy, and putting every resident’s needs at the forefront. **Leadership** means action, and I am committed to ensuring Wyoming thrives. Your concerns are my mission, and together, we will achieve success.
We face challenges, but we also have incredible opportunities to lead with purpose and determination. **Wyoming’s best days are ahead** , and I am proud to stand with you as we move forward.
[**Stay engaged**](https://rasner4wy.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6915dcf45e69335acd266178e&id=f87fafe3dd&e=9e637674b4)**. Stay inspired. Together, let’s make 2025 unforgettable.**

With resolve,**Reid Rasner****Your Trusted Leader**
---
|
---
| WWW.REIDRASNER.COM
---
| **Making a Difference Across Wyoming**
---
| | | | | | | | | | | This past November, I had the privilege of giving back to our community in meaningful ways. We donated over 400 pounds of turkey to the Casper Salvation Army, helping families in need enjoy a warm Thanksgiving meal.
Additionally, we delivered a pallet of dog and cat food to the Casper Humane Society to support the animals in their care.Giving back to Wyoming is one of the most rewarding parts of what I do.
Together, let’s continue building a stronger community—because Wyoming’s strength starts with its people.
---
|
---
|
---
| Wyoming’s Path Forward: Leadership That Lasts
---
| Wyoming’s legislators have laid the foundation for progress, presenting proposals that address critical issues like **election integrity, ESG policies, and property tax relief.** These efforts reflect our shared commitment to the values of independence, accountability, and resilience.
But let’s be **honest:** while commendable, these measures alone will not secure Wyoming’s long-term **prosperity.** True leadership requires a vision that sees beyond short-term fixes to deliver lasting impact. This is the moment to think **boldly** and challenge ourselves to achieve more.
Take **property taxes,** for example. The proposed 25% reduction, paired with $125 million in community support and a sales tax hike from 4% to 6%, opens the door to important discussions but leaves key questions unanswered. Rearranging numbers on a balance sheet does not reflect true fiscal conservatism. **Wyoming families** deserve real, sustainable relief—not temporary fixes that shift burdens elsewhere. Solutions must honor the principles our state was built upon: **conservatism, responsibility, innovation, and a commitment** to our people.
This legislative session offers an opportunity to think **boldly** and act decisively. Let us come together to craft solutions that **honor Wyoming’s** principles and secure a thriving future for all. Together, we can ensure every decision reflects the strength of our values and the promise of a **better tomorrow.**
This is Wyoming’s moment. Let’s rise to the challenge, united by purpose and guided by **values** that will define our legacy for generations to come.
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
With Determination,
---
| Reid Rasner
---
|
---
| WWW.REIDRASNER.COM
---
| | | | |
---

In just 16 days, the Tennessee Democratic Party's State Executive Committee will gather in Nashville to elect a new Chair and Officers who will lead us boldly into the next two years, including the crucial 2026 election cycle. A strong start is critical, and we need your help to ensure they have the resources to succeed from day one.

That’s why we’re thrilled to invite you to our Biennial Chair’s Reception Fundraiser —an event dedicated to welcoming our new leader and strengthening our party’s foundation for the road ahead.

| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=e3f929b07bdc4d18ae66c4681b7a4934&_e=e5LqIQmA-05ekBizNhDFsinu13lqOIMk5-XNsfdl3a1P0xQ1iB9xV0riQHc6hAVPOsIFF61FnrQF7fp6j16NcNblOmMf6xwBO9i0Wc8rBdlXdQVIj3XElOHnqUaAEY2W5gq32YreGc0YjN6imNExiOIdleU2qtXqiS0EnNbpmKFn2XAAUz7qee42ut4ZalMbG6LiGKA3Gijiuf4t44DfEyRtXqOuTMFbg822JV1739PKZdhi7CoL5MnMtt5Tsnm5Awriz4XlF5lIXWYj-gnBi7YLQHfcfW9t_5fpO6TALd_Jq9QpX-q3Gnx2xi5AjkBwMVF7Nm9qJV_HnN2P7eu1kIr42JaoyeCAPjs-KLScBeMEdnW6xaJRYDSap92UH_1v)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**

body:

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)

Peter, America First Patriots are back in control in Washington. We need your opinions on one of my most treasured issues - the Second Amendment.

It’s no secret that Democrats are coming after our Second Amendment rights with everything they've got, and they won’t stop until they've completely stripped us of our right to bear arms.
