Peter,

I hope you and your family had a joyous Christmas and New Year together. As you can see, we were blessed with a White Christmas in Montana, as the entire family gathered to celebrate the Holidays.
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=73c10d576b5a403485f2a5c7f83fa29e&_e=BP3nGl1H94Ap8qmUbzWUXdzRZTllgDXTmKlCgHULVgdq_R9G8e1vMfL9cD5djmJdc-d_AGU0WgaK6DVDvM1akoqB_Xnj3OMj63apGFijTPQ7amfBiRah8T-c_VSJGkSVM0B5umIKkF2spy1MOBKFBIZrW2Yu1teabvP8HTglVdQBU1ysfghEn3g_Kab1tKiF00cdSAx7yGwwfmee1ZQQmHbk0K6Ks3UNAlvZ96Uk1mba539fPVAMjmF59rVGrzyQJll3_SW8jendyzozcGHGC6CQXkt_lAz5k5O2zKCAUZS0FeAWrJUnsBdHc2_kiJuCxyoewrmhHpa3kljfGXzkTSDJjz92TjYyp3WZTz9bkMjdaFHSg6Tg2QByDbR1iu3Td_BRwbdMd6Dllk6K26rp7_Tw9Eafe14seizcsMfE6AxEVE2oAmAFGuallemFCNXVuRgsVMbLsziGyL3fpPIdJpb06CXGrbgN3GlGTTVk1o0bdIsueoi228U0t4U545Oe15lVxxgItqxxNnvfGocFP7JhD3CgUb9G2wXHjXeffkIaGEvaWHOsxGEDbEIyZ-8xdXLWxLhiNK8APWJ9ms6MryW2hNTYuZPHiwelD2MUrOM%3D)

We need to hear from Americans like you to help us prioritize the work we need to accomplish. body:
Take my 2025 survey >> Peter,

On Friday, I was sworn in to represent you in Congress — a responsibility I don’t take lightly. You’ve put your trust in me to fight for St. Louis; now, I’m ready to get to work.

But the best ideas don’t come from the halls of Congress, they come from real people, like you. That’s why I'm counting on your input as I set my priorities for the year ahead. So before we power full-stream ahead into 2025, I want to know: **What issues are at the top of your mind?**

[**I’ve put together a short 2025 Priorities Survey, and I’d be grateful if you took a few minutes to share your thoughts. →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100111128/521792170/707663715?ms=em25_250108_survey_fndd_gq_act___wb_ettx&refcode=em25_250108_survey_fndd_gq_act___wb_ettx&source=em25_250108_survey_fndd_gq_act___wb_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250108_survey_fndd_gq_act___wb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=GCKsMypqNSunUI2Ak/zb1h7tMgdlqS+JyO4+T400HkFrXeXdti3MfcBq5rm7VP5aNgZ3dYfST8T0rftM6YQJh0fnsUKyrev4cjT47R0VFBlM2ckcF+7rYmcHkQes8Li8TG/frnZQp0//+xz4D3SvQzqjx6TV6ze/T5goOhohc2c=&refcode2=6a0f905a-a5ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmEwZjkwNWEtYTVjZS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LYdmbtmo7OjiAlwWB6ZGg6k5Mr7LRJt1im85bgaj7VM=&emci=67a181c0-ffcd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6a0f905a-a5ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=1020964) | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100111129/521792171/707663715?ms=em25_250108_survey_fndd_gq_act___wb_ettx&refcode=em25_250108_survey_fndd_gq_act___wb_ettx&source=em25_250108_survey_fndd_gq_act___wb_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250108_survey_fndd_gq_act___wb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=GCKsMypqNSunUI2Ak/zb1h7tMgdlqS+JyO4+T400HkFrXeXdti3MfcBq5rm7VP5aNgZ3dYfST8T0rftM6YQJh0fnsUKyrev4cjT47R0VFBlM2ckcF+7rYmcHkQes8Li8TG/frnZQp0//+xz4D3SvQzqjx6TV6ze/T5goOhohc2c=&refcode2=6a0f905a-a5ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmEwZjkwNWEtYTVjZS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LYdmbtmo7OjiAlwWB6ZGg6k5Mr7LRJt1im85bgaj7VM=&emci=67a181c0-ffcd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6a0f905a-a5ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=1020964)

Your feedback will help shape my work to deliver real results for our community — whether that’s lowering costs, protecting reproductive rights, addressing gun violence, or ensuring everyone has access to quality healthcare, I’m here to serve you.

Thank you for using your voice and for being a part of this journey. **Now, let’s get to work!**

With gratitude,

Wesley

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Winter storm cancels 1,400 flights at DFW Airport, Dallas Love Field,** " Dallas Morning News' **Jamie Landers** and **Kyle Arnold** -- "Nearly half of all flights in and out of DFW International Airport and Dallas Love Field are canceled with snow and sleet falling throughout the region and more expected through Thursday.

Almost 1,000 departing and arriving flights at DFW International Airport have already been scrapped for the day and another 200 at Dallas Love Field, [according to Flightaware.com](https://substack.com/redirect/d96b678e-74ce-42b8-8e01-5fb266f3c6d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Only a handful have been delayed as airlines preemptively canceled flights to [manage air traffic during the anticipated winter weather](https://substack.com/redirect/8efda68a-c130-4fff-9430-8814c5fdd159?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

Aircraft departing from DFW Airport were being sprayed with deicing fluid to remove snow and ice Thursday morning.

The FAA noted on its website that ground stops or delays were possible at the airports after 8 a.m.

DFW airport officials said on X at about 5 a.m. Thursday that crews were pre-treating roads and the airfield to prepare for the potential of rain, sleet and snow.

Almost 1,000 departing and arriving flights at DFW International Airport have already been scrapped for the day and another 200 at Dallas Love Field, . Only a handful have been delayed as airlines preemptively canceled flights to . Aircraft departing from DFW Airport were being sprayed with deicing fluid to remove snow and ice Thursday morning. The FAA noted on its website that ground stops or delays were possible at the airports after 8 a.m. DFW airport officials said on X at about 5 a.m. Thursday that crews were pre-treating roads and the airfield to prepare for the potential of rain, sleet and snow. "Please allow extra drive time and check your flight schedule with your airline," the post said. Dallas Love Field officials said conditions may also interrupt their flights in the coming days and asked travelers to contact their airlines directly for updates on delays and cancellations." * **TOP NEWS**

"**Winter storm cancels 1,400 flights at DFW Airport, Dallas Love Field,** " Dallas Morning News' **Jamie Landers** and **Kyle Arnold** -- "Nearly half of all flights in and out of DFW International Airport and Dallas Love Field are canceled with snow and sleet falling throughout the region and more expected through Thursday.

Almost 1,000 departing and arriving flights at DFW International Airport have already been scrapped for the day and another 200 at Dallas Love Field, [according to Flightaware.com](https://substack.com/redirect/2c75afa5-ae8b-45ec-a88c-42c7121536fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Only a handful have been delayed as airlines preemptively canceled flights to [manage air traffic during the anticipated winter weather](https://substack.com/redirect/fd39eadf-5167-4a35-8fe3-36baeb5a551f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

Aircraft departing from DFW Airport were being sprayed with deicing fluid to remove snow and ice Thursday morning.

The FAA noted on its website that ground stops or delays were possible at the airports after 8 a.m.

DFW airport officials said on X at about 5 a.m. Thursday that crews were pre-treating roads and the airfield to prepare for the potential of rain, sleet and snow.

"Please allow extra drive time and check your flight schedule with your airline," the post said.

Dallas Love Field officials said conditions may also interrupt their flights in the coming days and asked travelers to contact their airlines directly for updates on delays and cancellations." * **TOP NEWS**

“**Winter storm cancels 1,400 flights at DFW Airport, Dallas Love Field,** ” Dallas Morning News' **Jamie Landers** and **Kyle Arnold** — “Nearly half of all flights in and out of DFW International Airport and Dallas Love Field are canceled with snow and sleet falling throughout the region and more expected through Thursday.

Almost 1,000 departing and arriving flights at DFW International Airport have already been scrapped for the day and another 200 at Dallas Love Field, [according to Flightaware.com](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eJPw0WgOZgkdvO1KhCaOIc0ytBCWn3Z-6AwFRLsdBFfZ4BiXt6eEmAG8bcjvGRgB_oMl-bABzgbF-xJ92Nog712xDslPjIh_ASlnzYcGWFiWUi0ujPEeNcKnZ2BAKPzIllJpZ8ZHltLa5jV9ns-4H0K5ssUQaWbvnoCrElGyGORkYA4FAZ6Iil2oRca8BVybbm-O5iaUelypADD8KBPYpRpf-q1RQL3G7QsAkJaFrC013FGptHwRrx1k372u_jr-tl0cssMhPrd152PMxFTRWeoaY_dQQ52zPOJ-ofezBY4Del6mY-EEF70BfJ7Dq0rMg98jvlNCYtrS4Nh_D6DbH13OpjMtHo3xSBFP0iT6Ij1gqxLSZ8nR1dcwMejLmKfUXTIMl9ki-oKdL4e4XNp8q8cbm-OrU1pSRu50TXY6ODPT5buO4-9D8JZVdWphiiKAOA/4d0/oC6UADhiTUSK_XetHGuiqw/h14/h001.BOis11bh9LlOerAziAH7IauXB03TW6C7KBX02o5OdVg). Aircraft departing from DFW Airport were being sprayed with deicing fluid to remove snow and ice Thursday morning.

The FAA noted on its website that ground stops or delays were possible at the airports after 8 a.m.

Almost 1,000 departing and arriving flights at DFW International Airport have already been scrapped for the day and another 200 at Dallas Love Field, . Only a handful have been delayed as airlines preemptively canceled flights to . Aircraft departing from DFW Airport were being sprayed with deicing fluid to remove snow and ice Thursday morning. Team, Donald Trump has given Elon Musk the green light to SLASH government funding -- **and he's setting his sights on PBS.**

For decades, PBS has brought free, impartial, educational programming into homes across the country. From Mr. Rogers to Big Bird to The NewsHour and so much more, it's had an INCALCULABLE positive impact on our society. **But Trump wants cuts that would start closing down PBS stations!**

**We CAN'T just stand by as Trump and Musk take direct aim at PBS,** so we've launched an urgent Live Petition to PROVE Democrats support funding this all-American institution. We need 5,000 more signatures by midnight -- **please, don't delay:**

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: BAN Trans Athletes in Women’s Sports
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE VICTORY FUND
body:
Congress needs to PASS the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act
| [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=c22e0c8ff96643968026bf9adde7401f&_e=2R6rFCGndzTmYahVqFHFVj8_Tg0wCA8xI6acdafvdgXrbOL24YPBRFruvsEYYd4aNaSTfFpKpIbu4uAEmdLaIiO8gob4i7g7KnxG5TWFdxIBbEhdQf4qbcGU_Srxhz-h_wWWf_C09VGLYoWeBe-bb1sUHoeuAHtRmiC3y6JGn48kYwpzGt_wdU4mfp7OO841Kd6h5Rrufh7MBthLmW8mF6MLZ75lWKaP3SISmYqv6ft0tzHEzYpu0f08M5Ha6aYJRRvMgPI1LxMEFJuNWi7zGMeEG1T1UvCuS5B9_gXhq60JYPinp76wmFU0cRoCiaer1Xnsz2YZ6liH2jyDPJ1wfg%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

**Congress MUST PASS my Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act! I 'm utterly shocked and disappointed that we need Congressional action to protect women and girls in sports, but here's how we got here.**

_**[FIRST-](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=c22e0c8ff96643968026bf9adde7401f&_e=2R6rFCGndzTmYahVqFHFVj8_Tg0wCA8xI6acdafvdgXrbOL24YPBRFruvsEYYd4aNaSTfFpKpIbu4uAEmdLaIiO8gob4i7g7KnxG5TWFdxIBbEhdQf4qbcGU_Srxhz-h8H5lB9HICl86S4VK8ruXSI5Ns3VS4QR0c8lC_oT1oMiguIbi1e7CysvdA0fiPcVBYy2Es4aV1WPb71wbRjUHjZcdaRrSoanJpg2FmMwHf7eKK-vg8TkpdsVPd01RlrZRVIjb94OWEkLbJqykS8fpebnxg-bGV3TaHlGNVkzRp9d62DNojz2fSScBNr_tRF1A1gxMWtaiDsXCsI4NdJ9Dig%3D%3D)** Congress passed Title IX in 1972, which explicitly ensured that male and female students and athletes in educational settings were treated equally and fairly. This includes ensuring that males and females are treated equally and fairly in sports, from intramural sports to college athletics.

**[THEN-](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=c22e0c8ff96643968026bf9adde7401f&_e=2R6rFCGndzTmYahVqFHFVj8_Tg0wCA8xI6acdafvdgXrbOL24YPBRFruvsEYYd4aNaSTfFpKpIbu4uAEmdLaIiO8gob4i7g7KnxG5TWFdxIBbEhdQf4qbcGU_Srxhz-h8H5lB9HICl86S4VK8ruXSI5Ns3VS4QR0c8lC_oT1oMh488QGLwdlTuISAohZ-s0e4qKW3oP405PTo4VCXnxHc2Lq53g07zzPsSn8iblUBJBfYYkDOro8YRpimV5SbNQ7fov1oyrx_LOx9DMNcUVd7FbmgIxR1QbSatlmIZ_-fk2LUW8f3VxIssbIW_6taS3rXNihi5RW67OgRQSHK3dwqg%3D%3D)** The Radical Left began demanding that biological men who identify as transgender women could compete in women's sports, threatening to withhold Title IX federal financial assistance for schools that would not comply. This led to biological men all over the country infiltrating women's sports and instantly becoming the top athletes, regardless of age or sport. Notably, female athletes like Riley Gaines were ROBBED of trophies and championships after training their whole lives.

**[NOW-](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=c22e0c8ff96643968026bf9adde7401f&_e=2R6rFCGndzTmYahVqFHFVj8_Tg0wCA8xI6acdafvdgXrbOL24YPBRFruvsEYYd4aNaSTfFpKpIbu4uAEmdLaIiO8gob4i7g7KnxG5TWFdxIBbEhdQf4qbcGU_Srxhz-h8H5lB9HICl86S4VK8ruXSI5Ns3VS4QR0c8lC_oT1oMgswM08bbShOdbjy76nbTf-Mf6HrPWbGjflgsAbq3G9-yMdhjTqh14CliXBeAgICtPrjj-Z-fM-QMO_fX3JPEX6HJuGkOFsuKopA5dTisykn-t-0mwv0_HdxGHvCmk9C90L_ZpjjjBgPUeHAdp5k2cUKRHSXdBZY2E4COTpZCYxQQ%3D%3D)** I'm putting my foot down. I introduced the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act to clarify that including male athletes in women's sports IS a Title IX violation and clearly defines males and females as the biological sex assigned at birth. I need your help to make sure that our Senate Majority passes this bill._

**I need 50 Patriots to join my team before midnight so we can show Congress that this bill has grassroots support.[**Can you chip in just $10 to support me?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=c22e0c8ff96643968026bf9adde7401f&_e=2R6rFCGndzTmYahVqFHFVj8_Tg0wCA8xI6acdafvdgXrbOL24YPBRFruvsEYYd4aNaSTfFpKpIbu4uAEmdLaIiO8gob4i7g7KnxG5TWFdxIBbEhdQf4qbcGU_Srxhz-h_wWWf_C09VGLYoWeBe-bb1sUHoeuAHtRmiC3y6JGn48kYwpzGt_wdU4mfp7OO841O37uTm3fhFtWOn3QLmfuZuE8k9P_RtajlelRn8idzOcnrHbGs6k7-UIGidH2z5OMpxT4DICc7SkwYR2yzvwXGwgwO26XOfb1NI0Z_9C4Xg_bVu4UaiFO5F8S1QwykUeSeHRPcmDzEQZIHE-9rBN8gw%3D%3D)**

| [ **PROTECT WOMEN 'S SPORTS** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=c22e0c8ff96643968026bf9adde7401f&_e=2R6rFCGndzTmYahVqFHFVj8_Tg0wCA8xI6acdafvdgXrbOL24YPBRFruvsEYYd4aNaSTfFpKpIbu4uAEmdLaIiO8gob4i7g7KnxG5TWFdxIBbEhdQf4qbcGU_Srxhz-h_wWWf_C09VGLYoWeBe-bb1sUHoeuAHtRmiC3y6JGn48kYwpzGt_wdU4mfp7OO841KoS2y7h245A1oKYfOJ5JYljAwMIvZnbi-jErsadLr9llXnUrZ_kVOG3uIt9_UT02Y4WF6TaXk4uk8BVrurfxbKFdisbJURDB8-JMfNShnRWs0v4tqQ9KRHwxY4w9A_JjtvCcLD_lihIMSY74KC7T0w%3D%3D)
---

It's time to BAN trans athletes from electing into women's sports. Allowing biological men to compete against biological women not only compromises the integrity of competition, it threatens the safety of women athletes.

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

clean_body: Congress needs to PASS the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act | Peter, Congress MUST PASS my Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act! I 'm utterly shocked and disappointed that we need Congressional action to protect women and girls in sports, but here's how we got here. Congress passed Title IX in 1972, which explicitly ensured that male and female students and athletes in educational settings were treated equally and fairly. This includes ensuring that males and females are treated equally and fairly in sports, from intramural sports to college athletics. The Radical Left began demanding that biological men who identify as transgender women could compete in women's sports, threatening to withhold Title IX federal financial assistance for schools that would not comply. This led to biological men all over the country infiltrating women's sports and instantly becoming the top athletes, regardless of age or sport. Notably, female athletes like Riley Gaines were ROBBED of trophies and championships after training their whole lives. I'm putting my foot down. I introduced the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act to clarify that including male athletes in women's sports IS a Title IX violation and clearly defines males and females as the biological sex assigned at birth. I need your help to make sure that our Senate Majority passes this bill. name: Maisy Deans, Evergreen
subject: LA is on fire. Make sure Congress defends climate action.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
We can't let climate deniers stand in the way of our hard-won progress
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3235378/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
| Though Trump and his clown car of cabinet nominees are poised and ready to dismantle the IRA and bedrock environmental safeguards, it doesn't mean our fight for a safer climate future ends here. It means we have to fight harder than ever to protect all the progress we've made—and Congress has the power to make a real difference in that fight.

**Tell your representatives in Congress to defend our hard-won climate gains.** [TAKE ACTION](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3235379/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Hi Friend,

As climate grief hangs heavy in the air today, our hearts are with the tens and thousands of Californians affected by the wildfires raging across the region and devastating their communities.

The climate crisis is here and happening in real time, yet President-elect Donald Trump has appointed **a trio of climate-denying nominees to head critical energy and environment teams—all of whom are expected to be confirmed by the Senate next week.**

If you haven't heard about these disastrous choices, here's a quick primer: |
---
|
* Former Congressman **Lee Zeldin** —who voted against the Inflation Reduction Act and helped defund public transit in New York City—has been appointed to head the **Environmental Protection Agency** (EPA).
* Governor **Doug Burgum** —who has deep ties with the fossil fuel industry in North Dakota—has been tapped to lead the **Department of Interior**.
* And last but not least, Liberty Energy CEO **Chris Wright** —who runs an oil and gas company dedicated to fracking—basically purchased his nomination as **Secretary of Energy** with a $450,000 contribution to Trump's campaign.

|
---
| With these appointments, Trump has made it crystal clear that he’s hell-bent on pushing his "drill, baby, drill" agenda—and prioritizing loyalty above qualifications when addressing very real environmental concerns, like the wildfires eviscerating entire communities in Southern California.

But we've been here before—and we can stop them from rolling back historic climate wins. [**We have to get loud and remind Democrats in Congress that they have the power to protect hard-won gains like the Inflation Reduction Act. Will you join us?**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3235380/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[TELL CONGRESS: DEFEND CLIMATE PROGRESS](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3235381/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| **Now is not the time to lose hope and give up.** The next four years will have its challenges, but our movement must be ready to push forward, go on offense, and make sure our collective future is one that values people and the planet over profits.

Because the alternative gives Trump and his anti-climate cronies a clear path to undoing these popular climate policies—jeopardizing the health and safety of our communities, the economy, and our nation's ability to achieve our climate goals.

Regardless of whether Zeldin, Burgum, and Wright's confirmations go through, we can't let them attack critical protections for our health and safety, clean air and water, and climate action. [**And neither should our leaders in Congress.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3235382/87SdQ4wZ)

Thanks for raising your voice in this critical moment, |
---
| | |
---
### Maisy Deans
Government Affairs Advocate
Evergreen Action

---

name: Katie Porter
subject: The LA wildfires and how you can help:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
I’m thinking of and praying for all those who have been affected by the wildfires in Los Angeles.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39382%2E3422442%2EH2oqgd)
Derek,
If you’ve been affected by the wildfires in California this week, I’m thinking of and praying for you. _[If you need information about wildfire safety, click here.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21280?t=2&akid=39382%2E3422442%2EH2oqgd)_
Many of you have asked how to help. If you’re safe from the fires and are able to make a donation, consider supporting the **[California Community Foundation Wildfire Relief Fund.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250109-wildfires?refcode=em20250109-39382&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39382_3422442_H2oqgd&akid=39382%2E3422442%2EH2oqgd)**
The California Community Foundation’s Wildfire Relief Fund directly supports those who have been impacted by wildfires—with both short term emergency assistance and long term support for community recovery. According to CCF, their grantmaking targets the most underserved, and often hard to reach communities who are going to most need the support after this fire.
**[Will you join me in making a donation to the California Community Foundation Wildfire Relief Fund to provide relief to thousands of Californians who are in need of help? 100% of your contribution will go towards their wildfire relief fund.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250109-wildfires?refcode=em20250109-39382&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39382_3422442_H2oqgd&akid=39382%2E3422442%2EH2oqgd)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250109-wildfires?refcode=em20250109-39382&refcode2=39382_3422442_H2oqgd&akid=39382%2E3422442%2EH2oqgd)
I am so thankful for all the firefighters and first responders who are risking their own safety and working tirelessly to protect our community. For all of us who call Southern California home, this situation is devastating.
And thank you, Derek, for stepping up.
With gratitude,
Katie Porter

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people.
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC

name: John Milligan (MassGOP)
subject: MassDems admit NOV WAS A WAKE UP CALL!
body:
The truth came out in a Zoom meeting..
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r6BtF76hbnA-rHBdsoUN2_7dUiGjRpr5iCTXyhLkv9Z60E0DWxezGsoSbkNNIBQXPkRPXtK94NOUa5fVvk_IEQJ2ka2l5k2eKIlhwwkwTIXywL8x-sg2LPhRua-f6M5X-eWZffvGpbw9ALn-A6mbkg==&c=_1UAl1ByB9KUAFuHKvRxwpgBPUCpP0gASMVVu1s5tmB763WWb3m2bw==&ch=8ra3uNBGePwMSjcBuWjsrPWGiW1LayCMF7bQ0692cwgD5wZrjIQS_Q==)
---
| Friends, I had to share this as soon as I got word...
The other night, the MassDems hosted a virtual listening tour for party activists and supporters as a post-mortem on last year's election. The takeaways?
The Democrats have abandoned us!
Party leaders are on opposite sides of issues that are popular with voters, like the auditor's ballot question
"My feeling is, they don't care"
Frustration with the party pushing volunteers out of state rather than campaigning at home
The number of municipalities that went from blue to red should be a wake up call!
It's clear that the citizens of our Commonwealth are embracing our commonsense Republican ideals, and a truly viable two-party system in Massachusetts is no longer a pipe dream.
And it's got the Democrats terrified.
---
| | [KEEP THE DEMS ON THE OFFENSIVE - DONATE NOW](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r6BtF76hbnA-rHBdsoUN2_7dUiGjRpr5iCTXyhLkv9Z60E0DWxezGmgzi6vKtL3lUN6guILTwQCJ2nD6hKvrABbxEk9VbjFuQPD4GTKdPD6_PQnZhzFjx6j5hun3AFHFub64yu_9oIPoHEa_6FvXGiakQ1EXVN1iFYwRjfe5JeeMUYB8LvQxLYSyPjC3_tAR&c=_1UAl1ByB9KUAFuHKvRxwpgBPUCpP0gASMVVu1s5tmB763WWb3m2bw==&ch=8ra3uNBGePwMSjcBuWjsrPWGiW1LayCMF7bQ0692cwgD5wZrjIQS_Q==)

| Election Night was a historic night for Republicans in Massachusetts and we are just getting started.
Our upcoming, comprehensive candidate recruitment events across the state in places like Fall River, Holyoke, Lawrence, and Worcester, will cover critical areas such as political strategy, data analysis, fundraising, and communications, equipping the best & the brightest in our communities with the tools and knowledge needed to run and to win.
November's results only added fuel to our fire. We're more determined than ever to grow our party, expand our voter base, and elect even more Republicans in the years to come.
Will you please continue to stand strong with us? [https://secure.winred.com/massachusetts-gop/2026](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r6BtF76hbnA-rHBdsoUN2_7dUiGjRpr5iCTXyhLkv9Z60E0DWxezGmgzi6vKtL3lUN6guILTwQCJ2nD6hKvrABbxEk9VbjFuQPD4GTKdPD6_PQnZhzFjx6j5hun3AFHFub64yu_9oIPoHEa_6FvXGiakQ1EXVN1iFYwRjfe5JeeMUYB8LvQxLYSyPjC3_tAR&c=_1UAl1ByB9KUAFuHKvRxwpgBPUCpP0gASMVVu1s5tmB763WWb3m2bw==&ch=8ra3uNBGePwMSjcBuWjsrPWGiW1LayCMF7bQ0692cwgD5wZrjIQS_Q==)

We'll choose the supporter for this special giveaway on January 11th!](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=957cb7e5207a4463bc2fcd9b6f0dda6a&_e=Vyaoo2R81gA7-NdfROf7wfQ5JhCqRbiPIVT0Wjm-7vX3hmwpWKnoOXtQEFxW1jWKc3kad63hw7z7B9psFFaYToNGW0ZyHabTDJvoOWPY-Q71jp74b4UrWt_PlBKto1VfrhsAUphKRmyhnaeA8fEVJcWkB8hVkHboXHzBbSllmoVKgQanTPNhQibCnIPw3v-3YvsNrDIwN0VTIEH51m5_HV80VXbcuMcOjZ8Dv2ooimHTGiMHoQVDZEsuW5Hua2BGitBKs-4HE7Pn5kNbIhFhUC323L6QF77Y75CnntJT8fHMWNYMKKUChK7-4LRArwBU)**

clean_body: On January 20, President DONALD TRUMP will take the oath of office... | | | Peter, On January 20, President DONALD TRUMP will take the oath of office... ...and Peter, YOU could be there! Turning Point USA is offering one special supporter (and their guest) an ALL-EXPENSES-PAID trip for inauguration weekend - a ONCE-IN-A-LIFETIME opportunity to be part of one of the most significant moments in modern American history. At Turning Point's AMERICAFEST in December, President Trump stood before thousands of young patriots and declared that a new era of AMERICAN GREATNESS was beginning. On SUNDAY midday, join President Trump's pre-inauguration event, On SUNDAY evening, enjoy VIP tickets to the Turning Point Inaugural Ball, and On MONDAY midday, attend the INAUGURATION of the 47th President in Washington, DC! Plus, you'll receive round-trip flights to Washington, DC and luxury hotel accommodations for inauguration weekend. Don't miss this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to be part of history, Peter. Thank YOU for your patriotism and your generous support. In 2024, we worked together to inspire MILLIONS MORE kids to LOVE AMERICA again -- and won back an ENTIRE GENERATION in favor of FREEDOM and PATRIOTISM. Now, in 2025, you can help Turning Point USA do more than ever before, starting with this massive celebration of AMERICA'S GOLDEN AGE. ** For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Email%20Logo.png] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Sam%20Headshot.png]
ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH
VOTE TODAY! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Make%20A%20Plan%20To%20Vote.png]
You can vote for November's elections NOW! Vote at your Registrar's office during business hours. Saturday early voting is available October 28th and November 4th. Learn More [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
Find your local Registrar's office here: https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/VWCC.jpeg] 15 years of the Community College Access Program at VWCC
Learn More [https://www.wdbj7.com/2023/09/26/virginia-western-celebrates-15th-anniversary-ccap-program/] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs.
This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education!
CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT
https://karenforvirginia.com/ [https://karenforvirginia.com/] Karen Jenkins for HB-89
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/karenforvirginia] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia.
She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. At the state level, she will be positioned to write and sponsor bills and laws to benefit the schools and communities in the 89th District and throughout the commonwealth.
LOCAL CANDIDATE EVENTS
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/lily%20canvass.png]
Canvass for Lily Franklin!
On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event!
Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com [egunter3@gmail.com] or call 540-353-3645.
South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/sam%20and%20trish.jpg]
Canvass for Sam and Trish!
*this is a place holder until the new facebook event is created*
Join us Sunday to canvass for Sam and Trish! Meet our Field Coordinator, Dom, on September 3rd at the Williamson Road Library, 12:00pm.
Located at 3837 Williamson Rd, Roanoke, VA 24012.
IN THE COMMUNITY
https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424 [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke River Contamination Settlement Reached Roanoke Young Democrats Canvass Tailgate
Without current regulations, the water contamination caused by these companies could have been so much worse. Come out to support Roanoke Valley Democratic candidates!
Read More [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] The Roanoke Young Democrats will be enjoying pizza, coffee, donuts and more before canvassing to knock for Trish White-Boyd, Sam Rasoul, Lily Franklin, Samantha Newell, Jade Harris, & Nancy Horn. Door knocking will begin about 12:30 pm!
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke EnVision Center Kids Movie Night - Sept. 28 Fall Harvest Festival
The movie is free and there will be snacks and much more! Fall into wellness at the Harvest Festival!
Read More Celebrate the end of farm season with fun experiences for the whole family. Try new activities to support your well-being. Connect with others in a beautiful outdoor space. Free meals available with registration. This event is free and open to everyone!
Read More [https://web.cvent.com/event/19422342-be4f-417d-9fc3-6a6bf883e794/summary]
https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992 [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/ [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game - Oct. 1 Henrietta Lacks Statue Unveiling - Oct. 4
Join us for the 6th Annual Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game, being held at the Home of the Salem Red Sox - Carilion Clinic Field. A dignified sculpture will commemorate the ongoing and long unrecognized contributions of Roanoke native Henrietta Lacks, who unknowingly provided the world with the HeLa cell, fueling decades of life-saving and life changing research.
Physicians, nurses and administrators will suit up for each hospital during the nine-inning contest. Proceeds will benefit the American Heart Association. Unveiling is October 4th at 11 am at Henrietta Lacks Plaza.
Admission is $5 at the gate, kids under 10 free. Gates open at 1pm and the game starts at 2pm. 410 3rd St SW, Roanoke, VA 24011
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] Read More [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RCDC.jpeg] Join the Roanoke City Democrats!
Roanoke City Democratic Committee meetings are now in-person and open to non-members. We meet the 3rd Thursday of each month. This month we are meeting at 6 pm at the Main Library (706 S Jefferson St, Roanoke, VA 24016). Sign up for meeting reminders and other information here [https://www.roanokedemocrats.com/subscribe] .
Join us for a social hour every first Thursday of the month at Leonore Restaurant, 128 Campbell St. SW, 5-7 pm.
Join Roanoke Young Dems! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RYD.png]
Meetings occur on the first Monday and third Sunday of every month in person and virtually. The goal of RYD is to help improve our community and to promote the names of Democratic candidates and policies.
Contact: YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com [YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com] to get involved!
Donate Today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/samrasoul]
Thank you for your support! If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to me anytime.
My very best,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-07-29%20at%203.44.06%20PM%20%281%29.png]
Del. Sam Rasoul
https://www.facebook.com/SamRasoulVA [https://www.facebook.com/SamRasoulVA] https://twitter.com/Sam_Rasoul [https://twitter.com/Sam_Rasoul] https://www.instagram.com/sam_rasoul/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sam_rasoul/?hl=en]

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The trial of my life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
It's hard for me to describe just how much is on the line...
| [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=089912902f3e454a896c44e5272a0273&_e=jrpMJ7NV_Dq8mDFWS4J8Y5zOygvl_Mt623fiiAksQoPmBoXnXJetTewz4hMGKb4t_Gq55m_EWiZw41NWpEPxW80pZ4iMGbtF_9Gl7GvZ8Vf23rpmI6eL_gwzI9PPgHEJFj5Xd-jCrZJem2ZqhEvuuCkceH4_fVftwqN7sgheCBqGSIBq7kX9RtMtHIhV3R5yxArhedeE6WCF7k3dOYmRsjfme4WrWuZJmaQFGDvcjLPojFVqWEaCcVCPSTSEWfT3czldENx26ycJ8TTmdpm2BU3gUyATFJpafgNU-VKp8ntk0z6nugtC3D1dj_itxb4Uec__rs2riNFlSI3VODwq3KuMQqWHU5XYx0MjjuP4LL51jcXUG6NW8bUuGlEQboU_fC1xycdMoGkA9GnI8zDLueJGpe5r9M4rn4vi3pap_MYvU_B92vuUF6oJ0CQ5k8j2q_zCUCPQ92IYCAwWFrCksg%3D%3D)
---
My heart sinks even writing these words... but I need your help, Peter.
---
**_In just DAYS, reports indicate my trial is set to begin as I fight for the _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
To me, this trial now feels like the culmination of a years-long witch hunt and an assault - not just on my freedom - but on the freedom of every patriotic American.
---
The Democrats' Deep State has made it their mission to personally, professionally, and financially ruin me all for standing by the TRUTH and by my dear friend, our 45th and 47th president.
---
And because the Left knows there's simply no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of _everything_ I own.
---
But it doesn't end with them stripping me of my possessions, priceless keepsakes I was given as Mayor that I passed on to my son, or even my home...
---
No, these leftist tyrants' end goal is to see me thrown in jail as an innocent man for the rest of my life.
---
_**In fact, an Obama judge just threatened me with "_IMPRISONMENT!_ " **_
---
But no matter what it costs me, I will _never_ _surrender_ this fight for my freedom and justice.
---
**And it 's the generosity of patriots like YOU that gives me the courage to keep fighting.**
---
I understand that so many of you are still struggling from the consequences of Biden and Kamala's disastrous policies. And if that's your case, then please know your kind thoughts and prayers are more than enough to help keep my spirits and my head held high.
---
__But if you can support my legal defense trust at this pivotal moment in my legal battle, know that I 've never needed your help more than right now.__
---
[**Before my trial begins, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me fight for my freedom and justice as the Democrats ' Deep State tries to take away my home - and ultimately, JAIL me for life as an innocent man. **](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=089912902f3e454a896c44e5272a0273&_e=jrpMJ7NV_Dq8mDFWS4J8Y5zOygvl_Mt623fiiAksQoPmBoXnXJetTewz4hMGKb4t_Gq55m_EWiZw41NWpEPxW80pZ4iMGbtF_9Gl7GvZ8Vf23rpmI6eL_gwzI9PPgHEJFj5Xd-jCrZJem2ZqhEvuuCkceH4_fVftwqN7sgheCBqGSIBq7kX9RtMtHIhV3R5yxArhedeE6WCF7k3dOYmRsjfme4WrWuZJmaQFGDvcjLPojFVqWEaCcVCPSTSEWfT3czldENx26ycJ8TTmdpm2BU3gUyATFJpafgNU-VKp8ntaw_mvxNdfao_Ls72r45sfHDhGfAdpYgBwyAACwetkETyWe1tMQfLrvuhoHHZdi_m9OE4wu8mF4nBL8iijAwEZZ1IdWpc4jLhADkkpgDaPnee349wKMewKeEcKe86KG-uB_Fxp5VZMdp4v54ZSJsVizBlmQlOz5gXP3WFqLBIpSA%3D%3D)
---

[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=089912902f3e454a896c44e5272a0273&_e=jrpMJ7NV_Dq8mDFWS4J8Y5zOygvl_Mt623fiiAksQoPmBoXnXJetTewz4hMGKb4t_Gq55m_EWiZw41NWpEPxW80pZ4iMGbtF_9Gl7GvZ8Vf23rpmI6eL_gwzI9PPgHEJFj5Xd-jCrZJem2ZqhEvuuCkceH4_fVftwqN7sgheCBqGSIBq7kX9RtMtHIhV3R5yxArhedeE6WCF7k3dOYmRsjfme4WrWuZJmaQFGDvcjLPojFVqWEaCcVCPSTSEWfT3czldENx26ycJ8TTmdpm2BU3gUyATFJpafgNU-VKp8nvKHdgwAfF1PDFEnwXj_WcZrnIGgrAQjgF0Qoa7lkSBDpXJ65AObb36E9GyDblDNkuZFowS3mn5Hu7j4Zj65zXfDvLoT_u45NvP0OvJ7rKJf72qODTRqDgAExy1BS1uI9bQH8m2_J3oAiY21fmuM9dm3WSHWQnKuXWLa66qbO2aCg%3D%3D)
---

clean_body: It's hard for me to describe just how much is on the line... | My heart sinks even writing these words... but I need your help, Peter. In just DAYS, reports indicate my trial is set to begin as I fight for the final chance to save my home. To me, this trial now feels like the culmination of a years-long witch hunt and an assault - not just on my freedom - but on the freedom of every patriotic American. The Democrats' Deep State has made it their mission to personally, professionally, and financially ruin me all for standing by the TRUTH and by my dear friend, our 45th and 47th president. And because the Left knows there's simply no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own. But it doesn't end with them stripping me of my possessions, priceless keepsakes I was given as Mayor that I passed on to my son, or even my home... No, these leftist tyrants' end goal is to see me thrown in jail as an innocent man for the rest of my life. In fact, an Obama judge just threatened me with "IMPRISONMENT! " But no matter what it costs me, I will never surrender this fight for my freedom and justice. And it 's the generosity of patriots like YOU that gives me the courage to keep fighting. I understand that so many of you are still struggling from the consequences of Biden and Kamala's disastrous policies. And if that's your case, then please know your kind thoughts and prayers are more than enough to help keep my spirits and my head held high. But if you can support my legal defense trust at this pivotal moment in my legal battle, know that I 've never needed your help more than right now. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust - | -

name: Steve Simon
subject: The progress we’ve made, the work we must do
disclaimer_text: paid for by Simon for Secretary of State Committee
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100114628/521802976/-1787004069?refcode=header&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODJiN2MwMzktYWNjZS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Vy5H1E6HQs_br75YxSj6-yCkTIwDJ826qEVI6oUSa8I=) | Four years ago, our democracy faced an unimaginable test. Today, I want to take a moment to reflect not only on the challenges of that time but on the progress we’ve made since. In the 2024 election, Minnesota led the way with record-breaking turnout and elections that were fair, accurate, honest, and secure. Thanks to the efforts of tens of thousands of election workers across the state, Minnesotans came together to ensure our voices were heard and our democracy remained strong. **But the work to protect democracy doesn’t end.** We face ongoing challenges, from disinformation campaigns to threats against election workers. If we want to continue building on our success, we must: – Safeguard the freedom to vote for every eligible voter.
– Push back against dangerous election disinformation.
– Ensure our election workers are protected and safe from threats and harassment. [**Team, democracy is never guaranteed—it’s something we have to work for every day. That’s why I’m asking you to stand with me as we prepare for the work ahead in 2025 and beyond. clean_body: = | Four years ago, our democracy faced an unimaginable test. Today, I want to take a moment to reflect not only on the challenges of that time but on the progress we’ve made since. In the 2024 election, Minnesota led the way with record-breaking turnout and elections that were fair, accurate, honest, and secure. Thanks to the efforts of tens of thousands of election workers across the state, Minnesotans came together to ensure our voices were heard and our democracy remained strong. But the work to protect democracy doesn’t end. We face ongoing challenges, from disinformation campaigns to threats against election workers. If we want to continue building on our success, we must: – Safeguard the freedom to vote for every eligible voter. – Push back against dangerous election disinformation. – Ensure our election workers are protected and safe from threats and harassment. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | ********=****** | ******=****** | ******=****** | ******=****** | ******=****** | ******=****** Together, we’ve shown the nation how elections should be done. name: Sara Jacobs
subject: I hope you and your family are safe from the devastating wildfires in the LA area
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Sara Jacobs - Democrat, U.S. Congress [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89313/images/SDS/SJJ-emailheader1.png]
Friends – with the devastating Eaton, Hurst, Palisades, and Woodley wildfires burning in Southern California, I wanted to quickly reach out to check in.
I hope you and your family are safe.
Watching these destructive fires spread through our communities has been terrifying, and my heart goes out to those who have been injured, lost a loved one, lost a beloved pet, had their home or property destroyed, or been impacted in any way.
I’m incredibly grateful for the first responders and firefighters who are working to respond to the fires, and I’m thinking of them as they put their lives on the line to keep people as safe as possible.
Along with the rest of the California Congressional delegation, I asked President Biden to issue a federal emergency declaration — and I am so grateful he did so quickly.
I will keep pushing for federal support as California works to contain the fires and afterwards, when we work to rebuild.
I urge anyone in the area to pay close attention to updates, follow the guidance of your local officials, and be prepared. The Los Angeles Fire Department website [https://lafd.org/alerts] posts alerts regularly, and has helpful information for anyone who may need to quickly evacuate [https://lafd.org/quick-evacuation-tips] . You can also download the FEMA app [https://www.ready.gov/wildfires#prepare:~:text=Download%20the%20FEMA%20app] to stay updated.
If you’re out of harm’s way and would like to help those in need, consider supporting organizations like the Los Angeles Fire Department Foundation [https://supportlafd.org/] , United Way of Greater Los Angeles [https://unitedwayla.org/] , and the Los Angeles Regional Food Bank [https://www.lafoodbank.org/] .
Stay safe,
Sara
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89313/images/SDS/SJJ-DigitalHeadshot-USE.png]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District
Sara Jacobs - Democrat, U.S. Congress [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89313/images/SDS/SJJ-emailheader1.png]
Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
Sara Jacobs for Congress
PO Box 120085
San Diego, CA 92112
United States

On our December membership call, **we shared our vision for the care agenda, discussed our 2025 priorities, and laid out what it means to be a Care in Action member:**
* Exclusive access to a range of direct action, events information, and volunteer opportunities.
* Invitations to members-only digital events, town halls & resources.
* Invitations to members-only leadership briefings and events that include members of Congress, Care in Action staff, and Washington insiders.

We need your support to power this work through the beginning of the year and Donald Trump’s first 100 days in office. As an organization, we’re advocating for:
* ******Paid** ****family and sick leave
* ******Affordable ******child and in-home care
* **********Good jobs** ********and**********higher wages** ********for care workers

name: Frank Wojtash - Political Director: Rob for PA
subject: Official Swearing-In Ceremony
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob for PA]()
body:
This Saturday at Noon | | | | | | Hello,
You’re invited to attend Congressman Rob Bresnahan’s **swearing-in** ceremony on **January 11, 2025 at the Luzerne County Courthouse**. The invitation is below.
**Event Details:****Event:** Congressman Rob Bresnahan Swearing-in**Date:** Saturday, January 11, 2025**Time:** 12:00 PM - 1:00 PM**Location:** Luzerne County Courthouse | 200 N River Street, Wilkes-Barre, PA 18711**Attire:** Business Attire**Additional Guidance:** Parking is limited so please plan accordingly.There will be approximately 100 seats, some of which are reserved for family & ADA.Doors will open at 11:30 AM.
To confirm attendance, please RSVP to [derek.rockey@mail.house.gov](mailto:derek.rockey@mail.house.gov?subject=RSVP%201%2F11&body=).
Please reach out if you have any questions or concerns.
---
| | | | |
---
|
---
| Best Regards,Frank WojtashPolitical Director - Rob for PA
---

name: Dan Carr
subject: Mississippi First, and LA Wildfire Battle
body:
Every election is more than just a civic duty--it's an opportunity to stand for what matters most.

| |
---|---|---
|
# Mississippi First, and LA Wildfire Battle
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
| Jan 9
---
| [](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
Every election is more than just a civic duty--it's an opportunity to stand for what matters most. In Mississippi, the values of faith, family, and freedom are at the heart of our communities, but they must be protected at the ballot box. The decisions we make today will shape our state's future for generations to come.

body:

## Friend!

I’ll enter you in my rally contest, if you sign my petition to _DROP ALL CHARGES,_ and donate any amount before my sentencing day **TOMORROW!**

[](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxEkc-O2yAYxJ8G37Dwh2O8Bx_SOlZVqav-WalRLxaBj5gVYGrjRHn7ypY3vc78YGZA-uiseTREfCIAg9UzASD8SACOP-D3rzc8oaDfp-NI5Qm_vq4ufN7RGzzhoORfFtT5otXrfG7_dD9dWd2KJ54eEZ_wHpqjl9atqmgz3YCqQakMm0Lwqix5zQ_Z0FyKmgnORY010wL1QWB9KEujwIhCmEtmG2BwYAV7KQRnvMiZ1PxFVVUtzItkyEjJ7jbkegzS6fc0LT7mavSZa4aU4rxV6gh0M6plwvxuw4R6JQh0G02DTHY9TdXovU0Jkb4bRaBzkQ6GbjOoktEm6egYkE7SuQdVY0g4J3orCe-W5HuP2i6e8HYfXq3iPC6TQsJbF3sX-8HsupI-SnsNhLcfA_sUVL_njAG3lP8h_WB6vRXuXfy4ZHVDIrxd5yckUPXBWU14a6R6G-7HhNdN3L6et-P52-lLGS-PbGp0vFvn7FwJUrLrWnl7t1sD_wIAAP__O6e2bw)
This rally contest is a once-in-a-lifetime deal:

* I’m covering your flight and hotel, and giving you the best seats in the house!
* The rally is in Washington, D.C., so you can even attend my inauguration the next day.

Today is your last day to activate this special deal. Sign my petition to DROP ALL CHARGES, and donate any amount before my sentencing day TOMORROW! Once you do this, I’ll throw your name in the hat for the drawing!

name: Economy Watch (via NextGen America)
subject: How much do you have saved up right now? 🤔
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100116696/521811389/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmNhYTExOS1iMmNlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W45Rf-JtIW52Raw-F-ykXr2lX-RV-wpwE_6obopRNrw=&emci=27253f12-b2ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=4fcaa119-b2ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6787172)
---
That wasn’t a rhetorical question, folks. We mean it: Open your bank app right now and see how much is in your savings account.
Did you look?
Is it enough to pay next month’s rent if you lose your job today? Is it enough to replace your groceries if your power goes out and all your food goes bad? Is it enough to get your car fixed if some asshole crashes into you?
If the answer to any of those questions is “no,” you aren’t alone. None of the problems with the economy magically went away after the election.
Rent is still too high. Groceries still cost too much. **And wages are still _way_ too low.**
_Meanwhile, Trump is more worried about renaming the Gulf of Mexico than fixing the problems with our economy._
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100116697/521811390/339141323?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmNhYTExOS1iMmNlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W45Rf-JtIW52Raw-F-ykXr2lX-RV-wpwE_6obopRNrw=&emci=27253f12-b2ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=4fcaa119-b2ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6787172)
It’s clear Trump can’t be bothered to pretend that he cares about our needs. But with a brand new Congress freshly in office, now is the best time to let them know we aren’t going to sit back and let them ignore our needs.
[Whether you have $5 in savings or $5,000, you’re closer to losing everything than you are to being a billionaire. Add your name TODAY and let Congress know it’s time to create an economy that works for everyone, not just a wealthy few.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100116701/521811391/-1226942618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmNhYTExOS1iMmNlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W45Rf-JtIW52Raw-F-ykXr2lX-RV-wpwE_6obopRNrw=&emci=27253f12-b2ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=4fcaa119-b2ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6787172)

Is it enough to pay next month’s rent if you lose your job today? Is it enough to replace your groceries if your power goes out and all your food goes bad? Is it enough to get your car fixed if some asshole crashes into you? If the answer to any of those questions is “no,” you aren’t alone. None of the problems with the economy magically went away after the election. Rent is still too high. Groceries still cost too much. And wages are still way too low. Meanwhile, Trump is more worried about renaming the Gulf of Mexico than fixing the problems with our economy. It’s clear Trump can’t be bothered to pretend that he cares about our needs. But with a brand new Congress freshly in office, now is the best time to let them know we aren’t going to sit back and let them ignore our needs. | Together, NextGen America | | = |

# [Why SoCal Burns & Who's to Blame](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=154491896&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0NDkxODk2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzY0NDUzMjMsImV4cCI6MTczOTAzNzMyMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.oforAypuVhYtAOy08j0SzvCJCbbtPBUkl1wsPmvnOrA)
### Five harsh truths about these devastating fires that we must acknowledge if we hope to meaningfully prevent future fires and climate catastrophe
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Jan 9
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---

---

As wildfires rage across Southern California, devastating communities and forcing thousands to evacuate, it's tempting to see this as a natural disaster. But the truth is far more disturbing. This isn't just a freak event caused by bad luck or extreme weather. The fires consuming California are the result of decades of deliberate choices made by corporations and politicians who value profit over people, fossil fuels over sustainability, and exploitation over equity.
These wildfires were _predicted_ --and avoidable. **Let 's Address This.**
**Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..h4A-GH1gbcfebFd9Exa9Lywd44kr-W7fdK53WqQ9Ldg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=154491896)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8bdf7416-f906-4c41-9b26-d9342c52084d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **1\. They Knew This Was Coming**
Oil and gas companies like ExxonMobil knew as far back as the 1970s that fossil fuels would cause catastrophic climate change. A report from the _[Harvard Gazette](https://substack.com/redirect/4e9cf623-89b7-4cc3-9aa4-7d6aec151bc6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ revealed that Exxon's internal projections on the impact of carbon emissions were frighteningly accurate--even more so than some governmental forecasts. Despite knowing that fossil fuels would lead to rising temperatures, droughts, and wildfires, ExxonMobil didn't sound the alarm. Instead, they sowed doubt, funded climate denial, and doubled down on expanding their fossil fuel empire.
Today, those same corporations continue to prioritize drilling and extraction over sustainable solutions, making billions while the planet burns. Southern California is on fire, and the fossil fuel industry isn't just complicit--they're responsible.
## **2\. Budget Priorities That Set Us Up to Burn**
At the local level, LA's political leaders have also failed their communities. Instead of investing in critical infrastructure to combat the growing climate crisis--like increasing funding for firefighting services--the LA City Council made a different choice. As Ariana Jasmine [reports](https://substack.com/@jasminesjusticejournal/p-154408353):
> Los Angeles Fire Department's budget[ decreased by about $17.6 million](https://substack.com/redirect/ce060f55-cc50-4a45-befc-a546a42e4e4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) this year. [The LA City Council] did this [while giving the green light to a four-year](https://substack.com/redirect/9e73d044-4e4d-4fd5-8a2e-5fa8eb0bb883?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) commitment contract to grow LAPD--with a hefty price tag of $1 billion.
This misplaced priority reflects a broader trend in American politics, where the fear of crime outweighs the fear of climate disaster, even though crime rates have been decreasing and climate catastrophe is exponentially increasing. Studies show that climate change already [kills roughly 1300 Americans annually](https://substack.com/redirect/f6fe0760-0103-4c6a-92fa-17c63b6ef524?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The World Health Organization estimates [more than 250,000 deaths annually](https://substack.com/redirect/e24c0f0a-cbf7-4204-a092-618ddad4a0ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) caused by climate change. With an increasing climate crisis, these numbers will sadly increase too.
## **3\. Fighting Fires with Modern-Day Slavery**
So who is on the frontlines battling these infernos? Many of them are incarcerated individuals working for slave wages. It's worth highlighting some key and mortifying data points from a [recent Forbes analysis below](https://substack.com/redirect/ff00c236-60b5-4aa7-ad9d-538d28668778?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). In California, prison labor is used to fight wildfires. While incarcerated people volunteer for these roles, the conditions and compensation are appalling:
* They're paid as little as $0.16 to $0.74 an hour or a daily rate of $5.80 to $10.24.
* Their daily food budget is $4, usually comprising of a sandwich and an apple.
* When they're released from prison, they're barred from getting jobs as firefighters due to felony convictions, despite risking their lives to do the job while incarcerated.

This system exploits people when they're most vulnerable and then denies them opportunities for meaningful employment after they've served their time. It's a modern-day version of slavery, enabled by a loophole in the 13th Amendment that allows forced labor for those convicted of crimes. This isn't justice. It's exploitation. And given this is propped up by the private prison industry, it's also a sanitized form of human trafficking.
## **4\. Billionaires~~Hoard~~ Own California's Water**
Wildfires don't just need heat to spread--they need **drought conditions** , which have worsened due to the privatization of California's water supply. [More Perfect Union has conducted outstanding investigative journalism in this space](https://substack.com/redirect/4dffd454-2fa2-4cb9-a698-fb9eda1dd4ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
The Resnicks, a billionaire couple worth over $8 billion, own the majority of California's water rights. Their control over this critical resource has caused untold harm to 40 million Californians. Water should be a public resource, but in California, it's treated like a commodity for billionaires.
So why don't politicians hold them accountable? Because the Resnicks fund their re-election bids. For decades, politicians like the late Senator Dianne Feinstein worked to protect the Resnicks' interests, ensuring that water remained privatized and inaccessible to many communities. Water is a human right, but California's water policy reflects a system that prioritizes profit over people.
## **5\. Insurance Companies Are Skipping Town**
Adding insult to injury, home insurance companies are abandoning California.
As Barron's [reports](https://substack.com/redirect/c086312a-bb19-41ad-ad83-524aa027cff8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), after the devastating wildfires of 2017 and 2018, many insurers either paused coverage in high-risk areas or raised premiums to unaffordable levels. State Farm, one of the largest insurers in the country, recently canceled 72,000 policies in California, with many of those cancellations affecting high-risk, upscale neighborhoods in LA--including areas now engulfed in flames.
These companies aren't just fleeing from risk--they're leaving ordinary Californians without the safety net they need to rebuild their lives. This not only devastates Californians, it sets horrific precedent for other parts of the country that will soon be impacted by the climate crisis -- or are already being impacted by the climate crisis. A [recent study](https://substack.com/redirect/358636f8-0f19-420e-a223-61bad4b662e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) warns of this growing insurance bubble across the United States, which when it pops, will devastate millions.
## **The Flames of Late-Stage Capitalism**
What we're seeing in California is the result of late-stage capitalism at war with itself.
* The oil and gas industry fuels climate change.
* The insurance industry refuses to cover the harm caused by climate change.
* The private prison industry profits off cheap labor to fight the fires.
* The water industry hoards a critical resource, worsening drought conditions.

In this war between billion-dollar industries, the losers are always ordinary people.
This system is unsustainable and morally bankrupt. The wildfires raging across LA are a direct consequence of a system that prioritizes corporate profits over human lives.
[Give a gift subscription](https://substack..h4A-GH1gbcfebFd9Exa9Lywd44kr-W7fdK53WqQ9Ldg?&gift=true)
## **The Bottom Line**
For those looking to assist, or in need, [here is a comprehensive and constantly updated Google Doc](https://substack.com/redirect/ac10c5ec-7baf-4004-94db-d1de6235bd4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that provides contact information, location, and availability of resources for those in need.
The bottom line is that these fires are not a natural disaster--they're a policy disaster. Thus, I'm reminded of the famous Cree Indian proverb:
> Only when the last tree has died, and the last river been poisoned, and the last fish been caught, will we realize we cannot eat money.
For decades, we've allowed corporations to poison our planet, exploit our labor, hoard our resources, and abandon us in times of crisis. The flames we're seeing today are the direct result of those choices.
In response, we must hold the fossil fuel industry accountable. Oil and gas companies knew the climate crisis was coming, and they chose to lie about it. They should be paying for the destruction they've caused--not taxpayers. Likewise, we must end the use of prison labor for firefighting. These individuals deserve fair wages and employment opportunities after their release, not exploitation. Likewise, California's water must be reclaimed as a public resource. Billionaires shouldn't own the lifeblood of an entire state. Finally, we must vote out politicians who continue to capitulate to corporate interests. The climate crisis is here, and it's not slowing down. Politicians who fail to take bold action must be held accountable at the ballot box.
It's time to demand a radical shift in how we approach climate, labor, water, and corporate accountability. We are witnessing the logical, predictable, avoidable end result of exploitative late stage capitalism, and unless we activate and organize to stop this destruction, there will be nothing left to save.

And given this is propped up by the private prison industry, it's also a sanitized form of human trafficking. 4\. Billionaires~~Hoard~~ Own California's Water Wildfires don't just need heat to spread--they need drought conditions , which have worsened due to the privatization of California's water supply. . The Resnicks, a billionaire couple worth over $8 billion, own the majority of California's water rights. Their control over this critical resource has caused untold harm to 40 million Californians. Water should be a public resource, but in California, it's treated like a commodity for billionaires. So why don't politicians hold them accountable? Because the Resnicks fund their re-election bids. For decades, politicians like the late Senator Dianne Feinstein worked to protect the Resnicks' interests, ensuring that water remained privatized and inaccessible to many communities. Water is a human right, but California's water policy reflects a system that prioritizes profit over people. 5\. Insurance Companies Are Skipping Town Adding insult to injury, home insurance companies are abandoning California. As Barron's , after the devastating wildfires of 2017 and 2018, many insurers either paused coverage in high-risk areas or raised premiums to unaffordable levels. State Farm, one of the largest insurers in the country, recently canceled 72,000 policies in California, with many of those cancellations affecting high-risk, upscale neighborhoods in LA--including areas now engulfed in flames. These companies aren't just fleeing from risk--they're leaving ordinary Californians without the safety net they need to rebuild their lives. This not only devastates Californians, it sets horrific precedent for other parts of the country that will soon be impacted by the climate crisis -- or are already being impacted by the climate crisis. A warns of this growing insurance bubble across the United States, which when it pops, will devastate millions. The Flames of Late-Stage Capitalism What we're seeing in California is the result of late-stage capitalism at war with itself. The oil and gas industry fuels climate change. The insurance industry refuses to cover the harm caused by climate change. The private prison industry profits off cheap labor to fight the fires. The water industry hoards a critical resource, worsening drought conditions. In this war between billion-dollar industries, the losers are always ordinary people. This system is unsustainable and morally bankrupt. The wildfires raging across LA are a direct consequence of a system that prioritizes corporate profits over human lives. The Bottom Line For those looking to assist, or in need, that provides contact information, location, and availability of resources for those in need. The bottom line is that these fires are not a natural disaster--they're a policy disaster. Thus, I'm reminded of the famous Cree Indian proverb: Only when the last tree has died, and the last river been poisoned, and the last fish been caught, will we realize we cannot eat money. For decades, we've allowed corporations to poison our planet, exploit our labor, hoard our resources, and abandon us in times of crisis. The flames we're seeing today are the direct result of those choices. In response, we must hold the fossil fuel industry accountable. Oil and gas companies knew the climate crisis was coming, and they chose to lie about it. They should be paying for the destruction they've caused--not taxpayers. Likewise, we must end the use of prison labor for firefighting. These individuals deserve fair wages and employment opportunities after their release, not exploitation. Likewise, California's water must be reclaimed as a public resource. Billionaires shouldn't own the lifeblood of an entire state. Finally, we must vote out politicians who continue to capitulate to corporate interests. The climate crisis is here, and it's not slowing down. Politicians who fail to take bold action must be held accountable at the ballot box. It's time to demand a radical shift in how we approach climate, labor, water, and corporate accountability. We are witnessing the logical, predictable, avoidable end result of exploitative late stage capitalism, and unless we activate and organize to stop this destruction, there will be nothing left to save. Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Subscribe and join the movement. | | ---|---|--- Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

On the first day of meaningful national news coverage of wildfires raging in California, each major network nightly news special --[CBS](https://substack.com/redirect/d742cd0b-1cc3-4517-8df6-72458fe1a4f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [NBC](https://substack.com/redirect/e4eb0518-657e-44f3-97ff-3be7750e1e3c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [ABC ](https://substack.com/redirect/6acd4d64-85fa-452b-98cc-e39371b29051?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--dedicated 4-6 minutes of coverage to the disaster.
Not one mentioned climate change.
The connection between climate change and wildfires is among the clearest of all global warming-enhanced disasters...

name: Eliza Walton
subject: Peter, here's the status on the Owyhee
body:
Inside you’ll find an update on our campaign and what’s next for the Owyhee Canyonlands!| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100117385/521813840/-1743356665?contactdata=BzC1HVXD8nmlgUBzaYVquc3+aJJIPhUZhJMNd6FT2EiVZwe63ouw7G5hZov1bd8J0WZz2PH6GXksQZXKKckgiVnlDVcrXS+jkMtoilsWFz8n8ZRRbUhPA1OLpLvl3Ulj&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4MTg1OTlkLWIzY2UtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ph6MVg0kHL0lrac2grWPYlSu3HCPcbz5oLJTw72FGtE=&emci=0cf8d347-1cce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6818599d-b3ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230)
---
Hi Peter, As dedicated members and supporters of the Owyhee, we know you’ve been patiently waiting for an update on our campaign to protect the Owyhee Canyonlands. I’m writing to you today to thank you for your commitment to protecting the Owyhee, provide a campaign update, and share what’s next as we continue to pursue protections for this incredibly beautiful, majestic, and iconic region in Oregon’s high desert. In spite of our tremendous collective efforts and tireless advocacy over the past two years, I'm disappointed to report that the Owyhee Canyonlands will not be protected as a National Monument before President Biden leaves office later this month. Senator Wyden's legislation to protect the Owyhee passed the Senate on December 20th -- an exciting first for the Owyhee!! -- but the bill stalled in the House of Representatives and neither President Biden or Senator Wyden were willing to push for the establishment of the monument. Senator Wyden opted instead to continue working on legislation in 2025. When we launched the National Monument campaign two years ago we sought to build the political support needed to secure National Monument protections in the event that Congressional gridlock blocked the advance of Senator Wyden's legislation. Together we built an incredible grassroots political movement, including:
* A petition signed by 70,000 people;
* Endorsements from three Tribal Nations, including the Fort McDermitt Paiute and Shoshone Tribe, Shoshone-Paiute Tribes of the Duck Valley Indian Reservation, and the Klamath Tribes;
* Support from the highest levels of elected office in Oregon, including the Governor, Treasurer, Secretary of State, and dozens of state legislators;
* Endorsements from the local community in Malheur County, including Mayors, City Councilors, businesses, organizational leaders, tourism and economic development organizations, and others;
* A robust suite of communications, including ads in local, regional and national news outlets, billboards, radio spots and extensive social media

---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100117389/521813841/-1743356665?contactdata=BzC1HVXD8nmlgUBzaYVquc3+aJJIPhUZhJMNd6FT2EiVZwe63ouw7G5hZov1bd8J0WZz2PH6GXksQZXKKckgiVnlDVcrXS+jkMtoilsWFz8n8ZRRbUhPA1OLpLvl3Ulj&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4MTg1OTlkLWIzY2UtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ph6MVg0kHL0lrac2grWPYlSu3HCPcbz5oLJTw72FGtE=&emci=0cf8d347-1cce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6818599d-b3ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230)
---
| All of this was organized and managed by a coalition of local, regional and national organizations representing more than 22 million Americans nationwide. This included conservation, recreation, hunting, fishing, Tribal and BIPOC-led organizations, all working together to share resources, expertise and capacity to support protection of the Owyhee. We're incredibly proud of the work we've done together and inspired by the commitment, camaraderie and passion from everyone involved. Going forward we will continue to pursue permanent protections for the Owyhee Canyonlands.
---
| | This past year you have all shown our Senators tremendous support for the permanent protection of the Owyhee Canyonlands. The support of this campaign and coalition created outstanding momentum for protecting the Owyhee, and we cannot thank you enough. It’s clear our work is not finished. Protecting the Owyhee Canyonlands has been a decades long movement, and we’re not giving up any time soon.
---
[**Please join us in this continued work by contacting our US senators and your congressperson today. Urge them to keep working toward the strongest permanent protections possible for the Owyhee.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100117390/521813842/-1743356665?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4MTg1OTlkLWIzY2UtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ph6MVg0kHL0lrac2grWPYlSu3HCPcbz5oLJTw72FGtE=&emci=0cf8d347-1cce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6818599d-b3ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230)
