| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=77f819892d924739b0461c274cc483f5&_e=936Uh01HsS9rVHQEnte_j3kiZEsBmt3RkVk6hXEVKEySKZ5QzeCP-akeRqDI7Vsm-WtossMJRoRVpzYPi8DkEyMjH-Y7rEEX_CpUio8bYBhlqn4mfDm1Tr3cOLX8UNfl1xj3AwF-HDCF-ABlx7jcqGTURhR4iDME0kOyXaodMI5MVXrSNcAJtnilg7HTLjN7TcWwbgwfUHWO8wQkPFnwRJQ9NdlNM5wZbJTu7tWWyNCv4owaoyr4echUDBRz88i3FD3TgR6ZdjySFFyn1ZwQedReRwCMN0mw8yV-svs-7QRVQs7GhydaIENlXmvGN138_ILNLXThjygQ951OvHUngrxvl3GA8ZoktK8Jy_ONXPGKTjMfLUgh0ns3LKnwKd-IDr3YlfnN70sDK80t4gCVYg%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=77f819892d924739b0461c274cc483f5&_e=936Uh01HsS9rVHQEnte_j3kiZEsBmt3RkVk6hXEVKEySKZ5QzeCP-akeRqDI7Vsm-WtossMJRoRVpzYPi8DkEyMjH-Y7rEEX_CpUio8bYBhlqn4mfDm1Tr3cOLX8UNfl1xj3AwF-HDCF-ABlx7jcqGTURhR4iDME0kOyXaodMI5MVXrSNcAJtnilg7HTLjN7TcWwbgwfUHWO8wQkPFnwRJQ9NdlNM5wZbJTu7tWWyNDUFRzsk-DsQ516czBkPT7BMYSzkLuDhv0yV36ED0n-WqhW1u3AhC9wTlrrMV4-28Hnwx-x9-W-SVLJkXpgWnj2epsGlfASsAGYPB3tfynq_lQj22McQNmJx9XbUdEmVtN5zlFTI2cNR_cSiEVS0QNm5KFbJpCG4RJPhlwVCi27Mg%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=77f819892d924739b0461c274cc483f5&_e=936Uh01HsS9rVHQEnte_j3kiZEsBmt3RkVk6hXEVKEySKZ5QzeCP-akeRqDI7Vsm-WtossMJRoRVpzYPi8DkEyMjH-Y7rEEX_CpUio8bYBhlqn4mfDm1Tr3cOLX8UNfl1xj3AwF-HDCF-ABlx7jcqGTURhR4iDME0kOyXaodMI5MVXrSNcAJtnilg7HTLjN7TcWwbgwfUHWO8wQkPFnwRJQ9NdlNM5wZbJTu7tWWyND0lmTZOkodF4JiOOl9O8rOUGqz22OK3J9Ssy6OarK4kVKrzbtI83xLtxiLuW2p8jsxl3pY00g7JTSRH_oOtwTOziMjrUULSfgK74j_iU_qdLbEgbJSJrcrZjSJRm4mMselZL68HIiqEyPNxGnJn4Cx6AhZJlCKC8p3YXL4flUGhw%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251

The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

name: Trump Knife Set
subject: Limited Edition Trump Knives – Claim Yours Before They're Gone!
body:
With President Trump taking office..
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19695/6374453/0a57817211e46afcc2cc036a0d5a59a2cd5a254b/a5f2a5eb2d5d0c63ddd23e74b9f8dede1d5eeac4)
---
|
---
| | | | |
Introducing a unique opportunity to own a distinguished piece of American history.
The **[Limited Edition Trump Knife Collection](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19695/6374453/c28f6e83fc95d2f9e8f141a06077f8f6dda60699/a5f2a5eb2d5d0c63ddd23e74b9f8dede1d5eeac4)** is not just a collectible—it’s a legacy of patriotism, precision, and exquisite craftsmanship.
Reserved for those who appreciate the finer things in life, this set is the ultimate tribute to the 45th President of the United States.

---
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19695/6374453/c28f6e83fc95d2f9e8f141a06077f8f6dda60699/a5f2a5eb2d5d0c63ddd23e74b9f8dede1d5eeac4)
---
| | |
**Why the Trump Knife Collection Stands Apart:****8 Distinctive Knives, Each Telling a Story**
This collection is thoughtfully[ designed to commemorate pivotal moments from Trump’s presidency](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19695/6374453/c28f6e83fc95d2f9e8f141a06077f8f6dda60699/a5f2a5eb2d5d0c63ddd23e74b9f8dede1d5eeac4).
Each month, a new knife arrives at your door, featuring a full-color image of President Trump paired with one of his defining messages—from “Keep America Great” to “Save America Again.”
Each piece is more than a knife; it’s a statement of American pride.
* **Premium Pakkawood Handles** : Hand-polished with a rich cherry stain, each knife handle is crafted to reflect both strength and elegance, offering a balanced, luxurious feel in your hand.
* **Razor-Sharp Stainless Steel Blades** : Each blade is forged with precision, ensuring durability and a sharp edge, reflecting the steadfast spirit of American craftsmanship.
* **American Craftsmanship** : Designed and forged in the USA, each knife is a testament to American quality, pride, and tradition.

---
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19695/6374453/c28f6e83fc95d2f9e8f141a06077f8f6dda60699/a5f2a5eb2d5d0c63ddd23e74b9f8dede1d5eeac4)
---
| | |
**A Showcase of Elegance: The LED Display Case** The collection comes complete with a **[custom-designed wooden display case](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19695/6374453/c28f6e83fc95d2f9e8f141a06077f8f6dda60699/a5f2a5eb2d5d0c63ddd23e74b9f8dede1d5eeac4)** , made from premium cherry wood and featuring a shining gold strip with a hinged glass cover.
The addition of **eight built-in LED lights** enhances the beauty of each knife, casting a soft glow that captures the essence of this elegant tribute.
* **Protective and Elegant** : The hinged cover provides easy access to your knives while ensuring they remain protected from dust and wear.
* **Showcase Presidential Pride** : The display case is adorned with a raised golden medallion, inspired by the American presidential seal, making it a stunning centerpiece for any home or office.

---
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19695/6374453/c28f6e83fc95d2f9e8f141a06077f8f6dda60699/a5f2a5eb2d5d0c63ddd23e74b9f8dede1d5eeac4)
---
| | | ****
**An Heirloom for Generations**
****
****This collection is more than a tribute to Trump’s presidency—it’s an heirloom piece that captures a moment in history with elegance and pride. Each knife's patriotic theme is carefully chosen to resonate with the values that define America: freedom, strength, and resilience.

Displayed together, they create a narrative that will be admired for generations.
****
**What Our Collectors Are Saying:**
* **“The detail and craftsmanship are unparalleled. Each knife is a conversation starter, and the display case elevates them to a true work of art.” – Lisa M., Verified Buyer**
* **“I’ve never seen anything like it. Each delivery brings a new piece of history to my collection, and the quality is outstanding.” – Tom L., Verified Buyer**

**Secure Your Place Among History’s Collectors**
****
****The**Limited Edition Trump Knife Collection** is available for a short time.

With each knife delivered monthly, anticipation builds until your set is complete.

This isn’t just about owning knives; it’s about curating a piece of history.
****
**[CLICK HERE TO CHECK AVAILABILITY AND ORDER YOUR SET](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19695/6374453/c28f6e83fc95d2f9e8f141a06077f8f6dda60699/a5f2a5eb2d5d0c63ddd23e74b9f8dede1d5eeac4)**

Sincerely,
TrumpKnifeSet.com

P.S. Each knife is delivered in a custom box, making it an exquisite gift for those who hold America's values close to their hearts.
---
|
---
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by **newsletter@gunowner-news.com**

name: Steve Daines
subject: Help us clean up the Democrats’ mess
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
I hope you and your family had a joyous Christmas and New Year together. As you can see, we were blessed with a White Christmas in Montana, as the entire family gathered to celebrate the Holidays. |
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2905787a76dd485caeae2845730f3a8f&_e=_G361BqQHElyiYPMnzhwFCs7T-Ht9rJeB3P4ocgNL_eObPqzN_JhkIgpI8IlhenybUmfmYk-SmXnOXII9ZCuJhpgiLLO5-neCt5Tq1mtHvx62mgte__fq1DmyIdZkFwmqlMrcmsQSifGkeGEzBBD0OVuNRTcfIPKvMGsLIMkNqNeOItNC5nuuWTTskmjVAms4l-m6yQZRNgSqgljon4-5aIuBdB0v060vnv7j3jXWZ_p6BjAgv_yFyQJTEdUIDupjbjTX5e6hFzO68Q23F_9lJDkcDPWQWGyY1L6Wgxh4SUGMLmVwFuQl-S8BEvhcjImKjuK2P2icTXYxFT7Ya0LhETPR8H_67T5D-9Qv5AuSq1PxgLw5-AktP8PDgq1Ai5Lo06oagXU3MuditHab8-QOunSkJ-kO4qTPjo4ulvMvOTc96qmSNzPx-s9mGkm7m6G4VuyJi1MX4NYgNRAAe-7z3thjyTwOXUomDzytPUKKHNdcnPunf60eej5Ft3RogzrBIJYC92j2BFpU4qMj4Fr6RLPbSPbfMTm_DZmZytBOxmeC8k2MTyXYZ_1642GF2L82hPqny3ERYSLAqkyhA1Pig%3D%3D)
Fellow American,

I hope you and your family had a joyous Christmas and New Year together. As you can see, we were blessed with a White Christmas in Montana, as the entire family gathered to celebrate the Holidays.
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2905787a76dd485caeae2845730f3a8f&_e=_G361BqQHElyiYPMnzhwFCs7T-Ht9rJeB3P4ocgNL_eObPqzN_JhkIgpI8IlhenybUmfmYk-SmXnOXII9ZCuJhpgiLLO5-neCt5Tq1mtHvx62mgte__fq1DmyIdZkFwmqlMrcmsQSifGkeGEzBBD0OVuNRTcfIPKvMGsLIMkNqNeOItNC5nuuWTTskmjVAms4l-m6yQZRNgSqgljon4-5aIuBdB0v060vnv7j3jXWZ_p6BjAgv_yFyQJTEdUIDupjbjTX5e6hFzO68Q23F_9lJDkcDPWQWGyY1L6Wgxh4SUGMLmVwFuQl-S8BEvhcjImKjuK2P2icTXYxFT7Ya0LhETPR8H_67T5D-9Qv5AuSq1PxgLw5-AktP8PDgq1Ai5Lo06oagXU3MuditHab8-QOunSkJ-kO4qTPjo4ulvMvOTc96qmSNzPx-s9mGkm7m6GaPddu7u3PgJDbq0IvUOjKT6_Z4UkdH2Wv1MQIUJeEael2pEZX9bU2drzifQq9dywvsprrLXcNotFcHxPmcwVD7O02hZ-47o123DKYQguHbzTrYMxMkp-gIUJDOiu0ksIUNJGNE2UYUY25-XZB-by_w%3D%3D)
Now, I’m back in D.C., ready to resume my work for the American people. And Fellow American, we have A LOT of work to do. Democrat control in Washington left our new Republican Senate Majority a monumental mess to clean up, from the economy to the crisis at our Southern Border.

We need to hear from Americans like you to help us prioritize the work we need to accomplish. As you can see, we were blessed with a White Christmas in Montana, as the entire family gathered to celebrate the Holidays. | Fellow American, I hope you and your family had a joyous Christmas and New Year together. As you can see, we were blessed with a White Christmas in Montana, as the entire family gathered to celebrate the Holidays. Now, I’m back in D.C., ready to resume my work for the American people. And Fellow American, we have A LOT of work to do. Democrat control in Washington left our new Republican Senate Majority a monumental mess to clean up, from the economy to the crisis at our Southern Border. We need to hear from Americans like you to help us prioritize the work we need to accomplish. Making sure we’re on the same page before our Republican Majority is sworn in will guarantee we start 2025 from a position of strength and signal to Democrats their obstructionist tactics won’t work. The Supreme Court of the United States just released an official ruling to DENY Donald Trump's request to delay sentencing in the sham New York case. This means TOMORROW President Trump will be forced to face a partisan judge for sentencing, just 10 days before he is to be sworn in as the 47th President of the United States! This is a major blow to our efforts to free Donald Trump from the endless witch hunt and sham charges filed against him. This case should NEVER have been brought. This entire situation is a disgrace to President Trump’s legacy, the legitimacy of the presidency, and our country as a whole! We cannot allow this injustice to continue. We, the American People, elected President Trump by an OVERWHELMING margin. So now, we, the American People, DEMAND an immediate end to the political weaponization of our justice system and ALL witch hunts against Donald J. Trump. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=624a55de37fac55e6661d86bc2b8f6de8d6e427806c2ded57981804f3dc4e970b82f7aa6ad763afe9d96feebd7872a3c4e8d11c5251efd9bb13e8e92deb10cae In the hour following this breaking news, we need to collect ONE MILLION emergency signatures from MAGA patriots nationwide to keep our efforts to defend Donald Trump alive. Thank you for your attention to this URGENT matter. We’re living in unprecedented times and must do everything we can to stand by Donald Trump’s side in the days - and hours - to come. We are rapidly running out of time before President Trump’s sentencing at 9:30 AM tomorrow. This entire situation is a disgrace to President Trump’s legacy, the legitimacy of the presidency, and our country as a whole! We cannot allow this injustice to continue. We, the American People, elected President Trump by an OVERWHELMING margin. So now, we, the American People, DEMAND an immediate end to the political weaponization of our justice system and ALL witch hunts against Donald J. Trump. In the hour following this breaking news, we need to collect ONE MILLION emergency signatures from MAGA patriots nationwide to keep our efforts to defend Donald Trump alive. Together, we will request an END to the witch hunts, DEMAND the sham case be immediately thrown out, and CLEAR President Trump’s name once and for all. Thank you for your attention to this URGENT matter. We’re living in unprecedented times and must do everything we can to stand by Donald Trump’s side in the days - and hours - to come. We are rapidly running out of time before President Trump’s sentencing at 9:30 AM tomorrow. name: Team Ohio Dems
subject: Trump’s FBI henchman gets Yost’s stamp of approval
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
apparently free speech isn’t Yost’s thing.
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100118999/521819567/-252064726?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_ICYMI_250109_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTk3OGQxZC1iN2NlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yy4YJv3kbaT-_JqJrN-afj7qPngGZCaFdclKeUN5Ptg=) Well, team, here we go again.

Ohio Attorney General Dave Yost has hitched his wagon to yet another Trump-backed disaster. This time, he’s supporting Kash Patel for FBI director—a nominee handpicked to turn the FBI into Trump’s personal vendetta machine.

Yes, you read that right. Patel’s grand plan includes using the FBI to target political opponents and the media. Yost supports attacking the First Amendment and dissenting opinions.

[_**No one with views like this should hold any office in Ohio. If you agree, rush $5 right now >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100119000/521819568/-252064726?amount=5&refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_ICYMI_250109_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTk3OGQxZC1iN2NlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yy4YJv3kbaT-_JqJrN-afj7qPngGZCaFdclKeUN5Ptg=)

If someone like Dave Yost is willing to sell out our Constitution to score political points, why should we trust him with Ohio’s future?

Spoiler alert: **We shouldn’t.**

We need leaders who stand up for the rule of law and protect our rights and freedoms—not those who think the Bill of Rights is optional.

[_**Let’s send a message to Yost and his friends: Ohio won’t stand for this nonsense. Can you chip in today to help us fight back?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100119001/521819569/-252064726?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_ICYMI_250109_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTk3OGQxZC1iN2NlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yy4YJv3kbaT-_JqJrN-afj7qPngGZCaFdclKeUN5Ptg=)

Thank you for standing with us,

Ohio Dems **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100119002/521819570/-252064726?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_ICYMI_250109_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTk3OGQxZC1iN2NlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yy4YJv3kbaT-_JqJrN-afj7qPngGZCaFdclKeUN5Ptg=)**

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Help Shape Our Republican Majority’s Priorities
body:
| | | | [](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQws8BGIy40AgguasoSgYja8uzDS8D6IKFzBVncuMsvVyGTWJsJV_y_S-sdbM)
---
Our new Republican majority has been sworn in, and we’re already delivering on our promises. The very first bill we passed was the Laken Riley Act, a critical step in protecting innocent Americans from dangerous illegal immigrants by requiring DHS to detain non-U.S. nationals who have been arrested for burglary, theft, larceny, or shoplifting. The bill also authorizes states to sue the federal government for decisions or alleged failures related to immigration enforcement. But this is just the beginning. With so much work ahead, I want to hear from you. This is your chance to shape the direction of our work. Together, we can continue fighting for the conservative values that matter most to Minnesota and America. Your input is crucial to ensuring that our agenda reflects the priorities of supporters like you. **[Please take my Official Republican Majority Priorities Survey and share your thoughts on the issues we’ll be tackling in Washington.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQws8BGIy40AgguasoSgYja8uzDS8D6IKFzBVncuMsvVyGTWJsJV_y_S-sdbM) **

Thank you,

body:
Can I count on your support to help us keep winning?| | | [](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=74a33bf6081845ef959c55771956eb78&_e=DfOD9dZEMEruMNqdEaWFMf0i_IYlVhg0ul28onTgqKJlTWC-GBfADK1AxYd3ZcvMq-AAFn_al9wavtTVLKfj91lWqw0ZFKTHVqUseoec6_6J7z2j7igbjCxrFUb2CPlNfh3-Nqfn0JB6xyeGUUDyejaw0qhiImo6cItQVfUCPWyrdKX689Cez86BcTLYVuC49ATzPq1gW06OBeFpkIz5UvW1JqPgoQ65IzUqq5apa2jFeYGelmZahLqh2TELX3t-C2xj4FXiUkl5c8YsTmU7ICCYgCQ6ZAPUuZVPOiN8RESbqeycAiYX8Gmddnyq-O6r4-HCLYVNXuCIoqxEm5J0jV_QvwQsjTGA5DycY7HJvQ0BrFDU9qSqR3dV9XJBLcUX1YIBDvPfjGJmbqSJYHfPSA%3D%3D)

Peter, I’m so grateful to have you on my team as we head into 2025! We have a bold agenda to continue fighting for education freedom, cutting taxes, standing up to Communist China, supporting President Trump’s administration, and much more. But we’ve only been able to win big so far because of grassroots supporters like you chipping in $5 and $10, which is why I’m writing today. With so much to do in 2025, I’m reaching out to as many grassroots leaders as possible to help make sure we can keep up our momentum. **[**So, can I count on your support for a one-time contribution of $5 or more today?**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=74a33bf6081845ef959c55771956eb78&_e=DfOD9dZEMEruMNqdEaWFMf0i_IYlVhg0ul28onTgqKJlTWC-GBfADK1AxYd3ZcvMq-AAFn_al9wavtTVLKfj91lWqw0ZFKTHVqUseoec6_6J7z2j7igbjCxrFUb2CPlNfh3-Nqfn0JB6xyeGUUDyejaw0qhiImo6cItQVfUCPWyrdKX689Cez86BcTLYVuC49ATzPq1gW06OBeFpkIz5UvW1JqPgoQ65IzUqq5apa2hc2s-SGGALDVNXrtn_NnxhR6L2c-VCrakZVObhcKvKq-g5mtYLyGDEf_AY7I5ectYcwVOLee8Sju-rXcHP55OuXQKx4wHlEzWUlLAiPykKhEXMer1a93YT05iT8OSiksFtDwoTjzYiV_YO2VtMbBjeE3dAvBc5LBHeOl3VkAR8-w%3D%3D)**

name: David Hogg
subject: President Carter’s lasting legacy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Did you know Jimmy Carter first ran for office in his 30s?
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250109-1&t=1&akid=1618%2E587540%2ErICewk)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250109-1?refcode=em20250109-1618&amount=5&refcode2=1618_587540_rICewk&akid=1618%2E587540%2ErICewk)
Peter, today is a solemn day in America: **President Jimmy Carter will be laid to rest after his funeral.** At 100, he was our longest living president – and he proudly spent the best of his long life working for the common good and helping people.
President Carter, a peanut farmer from Georgia who rose to the highest office in the country, will leave a lasting legacy behind him. But today, I am reminded of something that not a lot of people may know. **Carter was first elected in his 30s.**
That’s right: Jimmy Carter became a leader in his community in the 1950s, serving on county boards that oversaw schools, libraries, and hospitals. In 1962, at only 38 years old, Carter was elected to the Georgia Senate, beginning his political career.
**[Leaders We Deserve exists to elect the young progressive candidates who will go on to lead this country, just like Jimmy Carter did. If you support our mission, can you make a $5 contribution today to help us continue this vital work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250109-1?refcode=em20250109-1618&amount=5&refcode2=1618_587540_rICewk&akid=1618%2E587540%2ErICewk)**
Jimmy Carter was elected Governor of Georgia in 1970. He was elected President of the United States in 1976. But it all started when he was a young man with the vision to make his community better and make an impact on his neighbors’ lives.
I can’t help but think of how many of our most inspiring leaders started out young:
* FDR was 28 when first elected in NY.
* LBJ was 28 when he was elected to Congress.
* Lincoln was 25 when he was first elected to the IL House.

When we endorse candidates at Leaders We Deserve, these former presidents are on my mind. Because I firmly believe that one of our candidates will become president in the next thirty years. But they’ll only get there with our early support.
**[Peter, can I count on you to donate $5 today and – in honor of Jimmy Carter, FDR, LBJ, and every other leader who ran for office before they turned 40 – help us elect the next generation of progressive leaders in this country?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250109-1?refcode=em20250109-1618&amount=5&refcode2=1618_587540_rICewk&akid=1618%2E587540%2ErICewk)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250109-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250109-1618&refcode2=1618_587540_rICewk&akid=1618%2E587540%2ErICewk)**
Thank you,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250109-1&t=2&refcode2=1618_587540_rICewk&akid=1618%2E587540%2ErICewk)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: The Senate Budget Committee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
In this new Congress, I’ll be leading the Democrats on the Senate Budget Committee as the committee’s Ranking Member.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100119837/521823034/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTgwNTZhMC1iYWNlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RV9J8KBHWQyHlKHPPRJMeJZWPmCHKpCWmrdpLBpw_hk=&emci=cf7b599a-bace-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=c98056a0-bace-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=7731215)
---

| | **In this new Congress, I'll be leading the Democrats on the Senate Budget Committee as the committee's Ranking Member.** Our Committee is responsible for drafting budget plans for Congress and for monitoring and enforcing rules surrounding spending, revenue, and the federal budget. And in the new Trump era, I'll be working to ensure that Americans get their fair shake in future budget negotiations. As the top Democrat on the Senate Budget Committee, I'll press Trump's nominees on why their plan cuts programs for working families and runs up the national debt to fund massive tax giveaways to the richest 1%. The public deserves to know. **We're going to stand up to the powerful and fight for the solutions Americans need — fair taxes and a government that prioritizes the needs of hard-working people and preserves critical programs like Social Security and Medicare.** Right now, I'm talking to Oregonians about the issues that matter most to them. Everyday Americans are trying to put food on the table, pay their rent or mortgage, and take care of their families and loved ones. The federal budget must prioritize their needs and increase opportunities for hard-working people. Let's work together to get it done. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I haven’t forgotten
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Check this out, here are a few pictures from the reception we had after I was sworn into the United States Senate last week:
#

Peter —
Check this out, here are a few pictures from the reception we had after I was sworn into the United States Senate last week:
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan25.N6iRGd&refcode=em250109-1-120&t=1&akid=3641%2E734936%2EujQcz3)
This is me and my high school librarian. She saw something in me all those years ago, and helped me navigate the college application process.
* * *
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan25.N6iRGd&refcode=em250109-1-120&t=2&akid=3641%2E734936%2EujQcz3)
This is my boss from the hotdog stand I worked at through high school. He let me work on my homework when it was slow, and helped me provide for my mom and my sisters at a time when we really needed it.
* * *
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan25.N6iRGd&refcode=em250109-1-120&t=3&akid=3641%2E734936%2EujQcz3)
And these are the brothers I served with as a Marine in Iraq. It was never guaranteed that any of us would make it back, but we got each other through.
* * *
I wanted to share these pictures with you because without the people in them I would not be here today. That goes for you, too. I haven’t forgotten, and I never will.
Thank you so much for making this happen, Peter. I’ll do my best to make you proud.
Semper Fi,
Ruben
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan25.N6iRGd&refcode=em250109-1-120&t=4&akid=3641%2E734936%2EujQcz3)

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=5&akid=3641%2E734936%2EujQcz3). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=3641%2E734936%2EujQcz3). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=3641_734936_ujQcz3&akid=3641%2E734936%2EujQcz3)

name: Gay Valimont
subject: Boots on the Ground for our Vets
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont Gay Valimont For Congress
body:
| | | Hello friend, I’m Gay Valimont, candidate for FL-1, and proud veteran supporter.**** I’m running for Florida’s 1st Congressional District to help lead the charge for fair treatment for all, especially our brave LGBTQ veterans who have been denied the respect they deserve for too long. **We need you to join in the fight for our veterans.**
---
---
In a major step forward, the Pentagon is securing a landmark settlement for **LGBTQ+ veterans** who were wrongfully denied benefits under “don’t ask, don’t tell.” This initiative shows what is possible when we __focus on justice and equality__ , even in the face of political turmoil. The work isn’t done yet, but with your support, I have the opportunity to join these efforts and continue pushing for progress. With your vote, and your support **NOW** , we can make an impact in the future to avoid irresponsible involvement in our lawmaking to influence the laws we see passed, and _keep our veterans at the heart of America._

**[Rushing $9 dollars to our cause before today is over will ensure the safety and well-being of our veterans by getting another Democrat into our Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100120087/521824345/181761264?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc3NDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWFmMmZiZmYtYmJjZS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EtWPKjeJFQ4_-Joo2qls0_qJQkcb4-XqM3R1apzbM5o=)**

clean_body: | | | Hello friend, I’m Gay Valimont, candidate for FL-1, and proud veteran supporter.** I’m running for Florida’s 1st Congressional District to help lead the charge for fair treatment for all, especially our brave LGBTQ veterans who have been denied the respect they deserve for too long. We need you to join in the fight for our veterans. In a major step forward, the Pentagon is securing a landmark settlement for LGBTQ+ veterans who were wrongfully denied benefits under “don’t ask, don’t tell.” This initiative shows what is possible when we focus on justice and equality , even in the face of political turmoil. The work isn’t done yet, but with your support, I have the opportunity to join these efforts and continue pushing for progress. With your vote, and your support NOW , we can make an impact in the future to avoid irresponsible involvement in our lawmaking to influence the laws we see passed, and keep our veterans at the heart of America. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = FL-1 has the most military families out of any of our congressional districts. It is up to us not to let them down.** | | | | | Paid For By Gay Valimont Gay Valimont For Congress PO Box 1258 Gulf Breeze, FL 32562 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

This class reflects the strength of our diverse coalition: nearly half of these representatives are women and almost 45% are legislators of color. It also includes a lot of “firsts,” like Sarah McBride (DE-at large), the first openly transgender member of Congress, and Julie Johnson (TX-32), the first openly gay representative from the South, who will hopefully never be the last.

The nomination of RFK Jr. for HHS Secretary poses a grave threat to the well-being of millions, particularly people with disabilities. His dangerous views on vaccines and public health measures undermine decades of scientific progress and put vulnerable populations at risk. **We cannot allow someone who disregards scientific consensus and promotes misinformation to lead the agency responsible for safeguarding our health.** **_Lives are at risk. Call the Capitol switchboard at (202) 224-3121 and tell your Senators: do NOT let RFK Jr. “go wild on health.”_** RFK Jr.'s track record demonstrates a blatant disregard for the very principles that ensure our safety and security. His leadership would jeopardize essential health programs, threatening the lives and well-being of those who rely on them most. _It’s imperative that we act swiftly to prevent this catastrophe.Your voice is powerful, and together, we can protect our communities from this imminent threat._ **_We urge you to call the US Capitol switchboard at (202) 224-3121 and demand that your Senators vote NO on RFK Jr.’s nomination._** **[After making your call, please consider donating to Able Dems. clean_body: | | | We are at a critical juncture for public health in America. The nomination of RFK Jr. for HHS Secretary poses a grave threat to the well-being of millions, particularly people with disabilities. His dangerous views on vaccines and public health measures undermine decades of scientific progress and put vulnerable populations at risk. We cannot allow someone who disregards scientific consensus and promotes misinformation to lead the agency responsible for safeguarding our health. Lives are at risk. Call the Capitol switchboard at (202) 224-3121 and tell your Senators: do NOT let RFK Jr. “go wild on health.” RFK Jr.'s track record demonstrates a blatant disregard for the very principles that ensure our safety and security. His leadership would jeopardize essential health programs, threatening the lives and well-being of those who rely on them most. It’s imperative that we act swiftly to prevent this catastrophe.Your voice is powerful, and together, we can protect our communities from this imminent threat. We urge you to call the US Capitol switchboard at (202) 224-3121 and demand that your Senators vote NO on RFK Jr.’s nomination. ** Stand with us in this fight for a healthier, more inclusive future. Your action and support are crucial. -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. name: Voter Action Project Research Team
subject: Quick poll: Party switching
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010925_1&amount=25]
You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
In several states the last few years, Florida and North Carolina among them, we've seen several candidates run for office and win as a member of one party and then switch to the other party to cement a legislative super-majority and ram through suppressive, anti-voter policies, among other legislation.
One proposed response has been to require party-switchers to immediately run in a special election so that the people have a voice in this process, instead of being stuck with a bait-and-switch from the person whom they thought represented them and their views.
Please answer our simple question below:
Team: Do you agree that party-switching elected officials should be subject to a special election?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=010925_1&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=010925_1&amount=15]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010925_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010925_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010925_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010925_1&amount=25]

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: Protect our rights before Trump’s second term:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Biden can protect women and LGBTQ+ people before he leaves the White House. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWOGTILmu6AyRRBPJzwSAWMn0NQWa-y9qUouj0AMXh72N2Vr_RKPVQ0Z56dDkatMGMkQgUIzStgtR1OZspjkXpOYYU3hOv6OVEfZT9qRauUCqhRUSJ4-7JvuPtV4mojFDRZc9w3xnRZWc9bu3cEzr41TiTXr4bitrQJPltZg1pmbfZU8pj2ObVXGXCSrRDjvHlb-9FsvYYRt6-rHpl5sr5nQ/4d0/BsBn3ueCSe-nY4qP137pcA/h0/h001.0tH8aUIxzRdgq_kHxpiJXCBpcIaMmgX9USELpEYb9bY)
---
Friend, Millions of Americans’ lives, rights, and bodies are on the line as we near Trump’s second presidential term. He’s threatened the rights of so many of us, including women, LGBTQ+ people, sexual assault survivors, and anyone who can get pregnant. But we have an important tool to fight for abortion access, gender-affirming care, improved Black maternal healthcare, equity in the workplace, and more: the Equal Rights Amendment to the U.S. Constitution. If officially part of our Constitution, this would establish equal rights regardless of sex or gender, which we could use to fight for the fundamental rights and freedoms of a majority of Americans. This constitutional amendment has met the requirements to be an official part of the Constitution: It’s been approved in 38 states and passed by 2/3 of Congress. We just need President Biden to act. That’s why I recently joined more than 120 of my colleagues in the U.S. House of Representatives to send a letter urging the president to certify and publish the Equal Rights Amendment now. [**Can you sign the petition to President Biden to publish the Equal Rights Amendment before he leaves the White House later this month?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38bacrXqz-CH_FIlv0-54amMMH6jRAbDa2EaVhLmyFMpsiTk08mLvlULo8mbgKpm5DJm6gMkcETu9i9a72_3wuUnI42ULFe6Fy_Di2OY65Qe8eSIeYupHLzGiMtTeTluIJDSbw-Yf4YoKiExhjeD45iKBUV8-y9Wk1dk-HyGZjao-zaRPiIyLANDiRXK-JVMvqi1W_J4Un5oGghWeI_yCf0E9OCeAnJWLWRPVohZXGxXnvvqfEM9g6bcdGVbZI9epYuH-Z3fkeNbUlFF58IAJch4YaBNWvlwQa2srp3INA6iUCdte9w1B9xQStemdxstzkBkTcX7Knre1gahs4rpHdR5nkHRWRuuz0Tgz2lyKCVPb-C9Bq4TGqD0Mv8-3bw8Cg/4d0/BsBn3ueCSe-nY4qP137pcA/h1/h001.w2aEc48m9INCWkpT_gbO_63wL3kXFIXJemjp18SSb2w) Thank you for taking action to bring about the world we deserve. I promise I’ll keep fighting for you as we face more threats ahead. In solidarity, Rashida P.S. If you want to take action in your community this weekend to demand Biden publish the Equal Rights Amendment, check out more [here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMRzYCVuTTIlAmBt_sSycOSgBtG8UMtrxQeyNITCWR9nQZjyWylCNhu5KKZpYpvi1tSQoegLqX5V_mTp_brWY9Y70CgsxBCaWUhXz50loYtBzHKC04in5h7qe1gHDb3NCCXF_19lei1FpiDCLeV4wKlowcZ1ZjmMs3-HdmDND-gcW7nPaVNMT4PE4j3-68M92CBrsywhnbGqhpDjmUe5h_DXYWEixH7l_LfApU02yud38yej8KRz3spmvc54TOW5NXNzC0LV9XmnS50meci8QCD-uf4ELyasXbzc3UPK-zdjitWI2ypCXitpcprh28YmswTlTVeklam0FAn-wkQvBWa0/4d0/BsBn3ueCSe-nY4qP137pcA/h2/h001.1zEHxBuee-TJ-9eBDw026gp5nndZ9uHK516C-ROQu5Y). \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Wed, Jan 8, 2024
Subject: Protect our rights before Trump’s second term:
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Joe Biden is still president until January 20, and in his final weeks he has the power to publish the Equal Rights Amendment to the Constitution, which is one of our best tools to **protect women and LGBTQ+ people from Trump and Republican attacks**. This simple amendment proclaims that: _“Equality of rights under the law shall not be denied or abridged by the United States or by any state on account of sex.”_ If officially part of the Constitution, this 28th Amendment would help eliminate the gender pay gap and fight back against other discrimination based on sex, gender identity, and sexuality—including **protecting access to abortion, birth control, and gender-affirming healthcare.** At the state level, Equal Rights Amendments to state constitutions have successfully established a legal basis for protecting reproductive rights. **We urgently need this at the federal level before Trump occupies the White House again** and follows through on his promises to ban abortion and attack queer and trans people, women, sexual assault survivors, and more marginalized people. [**Please sign the petition to demand President Biden certify and publish the Equal Rights Amendment before he leaves the White House later this month.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38bacrXqz-CH_FIlv0-54amMMH6jRAbDa2EaVhLmyFMpsiTk08mLvlULo8mbgKpm5DJm6gMkcETu9i9a72_3wuUnI42ULFe6Fy_Di2OY65Qe4ESXhNl3NAypRlUgITKg53Vqq3PJc2PBznqcrLAe9CdtAYkXscvVgo5jUElcyQUBwx1OelCrZYhcWAlWdydr1uZrCsuvZRVMYR2TP_QMKPAmTfNDmKufjWaP7xvvOyEGcPIunj94WlgCUEVz4ZaRAxN3E2n4eYAV9s65Xq73dlVNBRE3wVePGwBROSwGVZz4XVVHfPWnRQeofuwzMFFKZO7vcihWxfWc9l1lV-1TaJn_9y6WStrbTTekfjQAMpyAwKdy0YeJGm1B9fKKZfnMc4/4d0/BsBn3ueCSe-nY4qP137pcA/h3/h001.KzuyM3BTH0uy2G5RApYuRqXfkMmPl6zHF65jl65uUfQ) Last month, I joined more than 120 of my colleagues in the U.S. House of Representatives who sent a letter urging the president to publish the Equal Rights Amendment. Thousands of activists around the country have also taken action in the past month to demand this key tool to save lives and protect women, LGBTQ+ people, sexual assault survivors, abortion rights, Black maternal health, workers’ rights, our bodily autonomy, and more. Feminists have fought for this for over 100 years, and it’s past time for all of us to be written directly into the U.S. Constitution. Fortunately, the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) has met the threshold for its ratification, with approval from 38 states and passage by 2/3 of Congress. Now all we need is President Biden to act by directing the U.S. Archivist to certify and publish the ERA now. [**Add your name to ask President Biden to publish the Equal Rights Amendment now, in order to protect our rights and freedoms before Trump’s second term.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38bacrXqz-CH_FIlv0-54amMMH6jRAbDa2EaVhLmyFMpsiTk08mLvlULo8mbgKpm5DJm6gMkcETu9i9a72_3wuUnI42ULFe6Fy_Di2OY65Qe1U3BjVIQVfDhMeBXoebWE5CziaKSkjcUq6m7ULE606lmdKGBI2C-bgGy9QcRCQ60M98ZIFU7YW0sFsSTN6sim1BoboAyxpPJBEdLBEbOFbotO5_bOZkv9p-G3FuHRPGzCt1o4mLDVaG9J6dnHJswJHY8ktysC3bqAF0kJcaiPlF_tQSEQUIjLLqRZcwpyxIeSVpRPeJoNY9oncLuQQaa2jC4Fn2K28UyM9BXql51FEWq0h1GeHL37wFvV4xjp9nOa2rTXb51aRZxuzRVFBmJfA/4d0/BsBn3ueCSe-nY4qP137pcA/h4/h001.z5l16nAleqjzXNFGQM7lM6-1rT6iO47kVZBL8OIJx5s) Thank you for continuing to take action for equity and justice for all. We’ll continue pushing together. In solidarity, Rashida P.S. This coming weekend, activists are planning banner drops in their communities in support of the Equal Rights Amendment. You can find out more and sign up [here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMRzYCVuTTIlAmBt_sSycOSgBtG8UMtrxQeyNITCWR9nQZjyWylCNhu5KKZpYpvi1tYZrQ3GU85nhwQoI1NDbMqCLcODKeHnCZji5j2s-LSmg4nMZBB99Ih_cIXX06qXx9Qq0b_Lta8QDD5lbKdSNtIeAwCwyS1Ch7ii9HvkfwZ7qMAe4syhIt6b1bygR5LKjTODu8CdFTpdTj9CpNcA53a5i7brXXTsl5YRGNGmAVAEwnaYEYXUqrb6SG_YXXOKiBD5b4tNP2ja5YuQo77pEk4k8ru2cUFTKmOl4abD30FcqNTmDgrjswoMgIsUXbjmxbf_n_W-4rrSnQODLDx5ZBFU/4d0/BsBn3ueCSe-nY4qP137pcA/h5/h001.WCdL_6J7y51DY7EhBS8D-EZU-npCCNhr4KEYwvSTDus). [DONATE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtjzbjFBpR7JpBHI31l9kbTssL2iCd_LDl88OA1cO_uPZTh_4qb-dDV4KslVIGGFBsWsoZxH7V32eJ1wAzoqx2wjnvE0d6t9Q5p3_S6LTjfv3gofT2Zmcq8v9klr4_eMWiigg1bdzrZSs0J3jW7Aewjq6aVncVZEUTVutPqyTRbBHZVMcy83bx8TvRGlNYZWndexZn9H72m-zOGFEHJZmDHsE-OXZqrN6Q9uJevmjrf-fnnkdkT2BadopVNaZUQu1abJVjlpFeAIaPRToBu1zPhsjaY9KuiQa4dSWLzQxgThNg_ztkGYKezVPNb8X4mbWQAKMAX6ifShVr5dxvF2_4UWDCqXKFd5zkwR_oDCrrJLFk51Ji9xv3TiaauFwxifoM/4d0/BsBn3ueCSe-nY4qP137pcA/h6/h001.cp-7mMgMP9f6FUCmXxDel-iaaMDrALkAbghS3SZIr7Q)

name: MassGOP
subject: MassGOP Condemns Massachusetts Congressional Delegation’s Vote Against the Laken Riley
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kO3HCFLvNSRV_fSQrwaDX9moUEg0Xom0N504LEAb2jn-DrQBfbrKuYMwtm9qbaAZnYvL9KeLq-80gNZlrQuc0BRAXKIgJn5mIlBcyRYpRgEWer_JFnqUJbkZxCC9cyWFa2Rj9Fpt6iEfMXlb-4q-GQ==&c=pWk6seb9UgbuisdjfjN9tPsTq32MfEPG2eV0FIhYJ788v2VdFCXrxw==&ch=Cp9X8AMQd5wYyS6wr63Iwu17enfVdS8FcucbFlxcTIpwSjIWI3WDow==)
---
| MassGOP Condemns Massachusetts Congressional Delegation's Vote Against the Laken Riley
---
---
| Boston, MA-- The Massachusetts Republican Party is appalled by the decision of the majority of the Massachusetts congressional delegation to vote against the Laken Riley Act. This critical legislation would require U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) to take custody of immigrants in the United States illegally who commit heinous crimes, including assault and battery, drug trafficking, illegal firearm possession, sexual assault, and homicide.
Voting against the Laken Riley Act is indefensible. This bill is a straightforward measure to prioritize public safety and uphold justice. Opposing it is nothing more than a political stunt that disregards the safety of Massachusetts residents.
MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale expressed her outrage, stating:
"This is a vote against public safety and the rule of law. In the Senate, even a majority of Democrats managed to set aside political posturing to do the right thing. Yet Senators Elizabeth Warren and Ed Markey stood among just nine Democrats who voted against this vital bill. Their decision is particularly troubling given Boston's recent refusal to honor 198 ICE detainer requests.
Those detainers included individuals accused of armed robbery, assault with a dangerous weapon, assault and battery on a police officer, illegal firearm possession, possession of large-capacity weapons, attempted murder, fentanyl distribution, heroin trafficking, and indecent assault and battery. According to federal authorities, this is a public safety crisis.
When you add this vote to recent revelations about crimes and misconduct in migrant shelters and the arrests of individuals here illegally who have committed despicable offenses, it becomes clear that Massachusetts Democrats are ignoring the real consequences of their policies. They've chosen to cater to the most extreme progressive factions of their party, leaving our communities vulnerable. On behalf of Massachusetts residents, we are outraged."
The Massachusetts Republican Party will continue to stand with the people of Massachusetts to demand accountability and advocate for policies that prioritize public safety and justice.
###
---
---

name: Team Kelly
subject: A New Year — Let’s Get Started
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

On January 3rd, we officially began the 119th Congress.
On January 6th, we certified the results of the presidential election.
On January 20th, Donald Trump will be sworn in as the 47th President of the United States.
And today, we can tell you one thing for sure: _These next four years will not be boring._ With Trump and his party in full control of the government it is more important than ever that strong leaders defend our principles and our institutions, and work to deliver for the American people.
Mark Kelly sets himself apart from the rest of Washington. He doesn’t take any donations — not a cent — from corporate PACs, he puts all of his assets in blind trusts, and he publicly releases his official Senate schedule so everyone knows who he’s meeting with. This is the Mark Kelly standard of ethics, and he is the only U.S. Senator that maintains this level of transparency.
We need more people like Mark in the U.S. Senate — and we need to make sure that we defend him as he fights for us.

clean_body: God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God.| | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251

subject: Justice Riggs won her race — but the GOP won’t accept it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**
body:
If we give them an inch, they’ll take a mile. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100121249/521827892/-488448398?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250109_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWI1MTEzZC1iZWNlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4UkkFgOkQ2fXaKsz5U2L_waUshOsmObDt6Pu-R-pO5M=)
---
Peter, **Democracy is on the line here in North Carolina.** Justice Allison Riggs won re-election to the state Supreme Court by a razor-thin margin of 734 votes. But instead of accepting the results, her Republican opponent is working with his GOP allies in the court to throw out _60,000_ legal votes. This isn’t just an attack on one election — it’s an attack on democracy itself. If Republicans succeed in overturning the result of this race, they’ll be sending a clear message: _**elections only count if their side wins.**_ I’m raising the alarm because there's a lot at stake here, and if we give them an inch, they’ll take a mile. Justice Riggs is fighting back in court, but we need to stand with her and make it clear that we’re not going to let the GOP get away with this. **[Can you split a contribution between Justice Allison Riggs’ legal fund and my campaign today? name: Sean Feucht
subject: Awesome God official music video captured at Angelus Temple in Los Angeles
body:
Declaring this over California today!!| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=7da29ebfc346422da50da42924caa176&_e=lJQIHACao7f606ZBwkDfEXA8cQdqLuL7vS8A9bioGHfDFOPpspfFDmAZWnfwiWakB6zMpSIbjP3yPNOLOg1o4eKdJWLOXvUyfmW6WR_9x6ugUSu3bbsEPpzsM288vfFq8My2bJCVQIKZfcvE5_MOYA7wAV0Or6rinYB6XVhLM06P0YnuaRL90uvsJgqfWRXQRtLdcavkoSVr2dmwpRUKD8V2LpfB1zlETK8bl6nbRdzmJb2JMbkKOr8sF7-UB7FOvFWU1pyY-hNvt_OWteujolicF_lqhTi5qQIXYeUipk9VyQxOuy--Ygc3U_XDxsKFsawdIAwqvl1Tu106fcag8Q%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
We just released a video that couldn't be more important to the moment we are living in. The timing can only come from God. Even before the fires that are ravaging Los Angeles ignited, we planned a list-minute revival in the city—at the historic Angelus Temple. We've worshiped there before and the presence of God was EVERYWHERE!

At that revival, we recorded "Awesome God," and planned on sharing it this week. Little did we know, the city of Los Angeles and the state of California would be so devastated. As is often the case, God sends us where his presence is most needed and where people are experiencing terrible hurt.

And that is why we are dedicating "Awesome God" to California today, and praying for his mercy and protection to fall over the people and state of California!
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=7da29ebfc346422da50da42924caa176&_e=lJQIHACao7f606ZBwkDfEXA8cQdqLuL7vS8A9bioGHfDFOPpspfFDmAZWnfwiWakB6zMpSIbjP3yPNOLOg1o4eKdJWLOXvUyfmW6WR_9x6ugUSu3bbsEPpzsM288vfFq8My2bJCVQIKZfcvE5_MOYA7wAV0Or6rinYB6XVhLM06P0YnuaRL90uvsJgqfWRXQ4dcE6oCXLPXPZMS9WZqZGFsw8tBduLC5qMHOk_748YMoRQDco4NJTodpsdFZcUWzdEOCQzqSCR3kvaJzdpzi7UxCBXrBisYc-bh33dq1wqaWi5Lgs9I5FE417e8h98pc7497W-wOPqNvPS6YBIbjUA%3D%3D)
---
We are still going to Los Angeles this Saturday, but our worship night will now be a time of prayer for Los Angeles and distributing supplies and aid to victims of the fires. It will be a powerful time of meeting people's needs, and we know that testimonies will emerge from this.
---
Till all hear,
---
---
[**SUPPORT LET US WORSHIP >>>**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=7da29ebfc346422da50da42924caa176&_e=lJQIHACao7f606ZBwkDfEXA8cQdqLuL7vS8A9bioGHfDFOPpspfFDmAZWnfwiWakB6zMpSIbjP3yPNOLOg1o4eKdJWLOXvUyfmW6WR_9x6ugUSu3bbsEPpzsM288vfFq8My2bJCVQIKZfcvE5_MOYA7wAV0Or6rinYB6XVhLM06P0YnuaRL90uvsJgqfWRXQMNVSlvi-N6o1HFyQ7UlWyhi_YLcy5xrSbBtlYjN79dghtnXtuQOHGG7EXNgtEBw_C1jBZLZdYn85V2MeP8uAyHeEUMrcDT35aKLzTJYSPI5Q3-bBGZdjQDyl7YiaGAF3dnwTRvNXByKKf6OiHFGAeQ%3D%3D)
---
Sean

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Help those affected by the California wildfires →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Los Angeles is currently experiencing the worst wildfires it has ever
seen, with at least five major fires ravaging the area, destroying entire
neighborhoods, and creating apocalyptic conditions.

So far, five lives have been lost, around 179,000 people have been ordered
to evacuate, hundreds of thousands of people have been left without power,
and at least 1,300 homes and other buildings have been burned, with more
than 60,000 additional structures at risk.

This is the devastating reality of our climate crisis and our leaders’
unwillingness to tackle it with the bold, urgent action it demands — and
it will only get worse.

While we continue to push politicians on both sides of the aisle in
Congress to do what is necessary and pass the Green New Deal — which will
cost less than the inevitable destruction caused by worsening wildfires,
flooding, and rising sea levels — we must come together to help those
impacted.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250109-ca-wildfire-relief?refcode=em20250109-36304&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36304_1203867_cvvhFY&akid=36304%2E1203867%2EcvvhFY ]Please make a contribution of whatever you can spare to the California
Community Foundation Wildfire Relief Fund and Los Angeles Regional Food
Bank to provide desperately needed resources to wildfire victims today →

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250109-ca-wildfire-relief?refcode=em20250109-36304&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36304_1203867_cvvhFY&akid=36304%2E1203867%2EcvvhFY ]Donate

Let’s help the everyday people hurt by this disaster as we continue to
demand those in power stop prioritizing forever wars and billionaire
profits and start addressing this crisis with the urgency it deserves.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250109-36304-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36304_1203867_cvvhFY&akid=36304%2E1203867%2EcvvhFY

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36304%2E1203867%2EcvvhFY

JusticeDemocrats.com

name: Alex, United We Dream Action
subject: Our plan for Trump’s first 100 days:
body:
This is why we created the Squad. | | | Hi Peter, Donald Trump ran for president and won on a hateful platform of mass deportations — making it clear that immigrants will be the target of the new administration. **No matter who is in office, our team will hold them accountable and prioritize our immigrant communities.** That’s why we created the Squad, a fierce group of immigrant youth and allies committed to defending our community and fighting against politicians’ attacks to move our country closer to building the future we envision. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplrPQtKgNRxJ4NxE8B81MzWIuSnA8P6J65-0mULYyLDWDWYnCVA7aANAnxHKUyzIptSoZD1EyTcLS-Xkr7Z8j540TqwB0VkKRYcTnvVB2HJE_Zc_z6Eo7zOoiWqI9SU3riptGMXknTv6N9qgVo3k_JJY019TfVvBxi2bWgtGdnbUHOiC2cgdxiwoxhZFy9_tZ94ij3G4cP10UfkP9w9VWtVhTFeeMYymjrvSYRcYQ2ozYSacTLT70Q6oFKPRaJ7Xm4fvv5WNB9ZA7RX8aKQGZZu81ElnrqKM2AKg_dPfxrnakAjUvqwtwKz7jyy5IGoaa1aM7eOuDLuYSt5O1UdK6yq4yfZrm-4xhImFHYhDLJ75rb6X0rjLkIHxDXKv52GpQGJDIIDtE13-Qcr5LNIPzLVSxlTbkwmu8OpXvw3FKrhcs6sRQBge1Zf3Z_r1-Tie-Fa/4d0/FefwawDFR06VHuBEP-sY0A/h0/h001.jfgqr3c8caTghiWA_F05p-hMbPBVKgvdA-ZXlnT8JWc)
We’re preparing and recruiting more Squad members to fight back against the Trump administration’s anti-immigrant agenda through our **Squad Up & Know Your Rights** campaign. During Trump’s first 100 days, UWDA will mobilize volunteers across the country in preparation for any efforts to mass deport. This activation campaign will support communities by training volunteers on the information they need to teach folks their rights. **We’re a growing movement, taking action everywhere.** Your support allows us to look out for our communities and fight back against Trump’s mass deportation agenda. **[Peter, power our fight to protect immigrant communities with a donation today. We can’t keep up this critical work without your help.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplrPQtKgNRxJ4NxE8B81MzWIuSnA8P6J65-0mULYyLDWDWYnCVA7aANAnxHKUyzIptSoZD1EyTcLS-Xkr7Z8j540YAMwfyg1ctMpM2eVMkbN9IG4MxQAEq-cSAbd55jXW2pZpFXSxQKl3Xt99El-INs7SuBSXgKt9XOVfdN695nbEAIUJWM34VDibfvmyCsXPy2xNsYFumBaq9awVPQ8UFLYmvKoGTPehr0Bx_KcpJTGool9qtSh-rv8K9XX6kvS6dS9a6QHP6NgxO2fiiiChE-g4HS21j48NQhud9tsG6ZAMMMdhf7eWNIMn93KqSHcgJyWOrqRjC0x_WhWFQqv8WBGUKwdwF02gcWtIY8-m6WpKAQl5cyXCUDq7UPCgCBpVZ68xwN8hrS4IxM0wVkOiv7JWx5bhJS42uYg1pvEGYswQjMzA0HxaVKtui_tcFAQ7qm/4d0/FefwawDFR06VHuBEP-sY0A/h1/h001.bOkT_egyO7UaU0ZOiY-IWD8ZYdOAGNpkQKnTyANDqr4)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplrPQtKgNRxJ4NxE8B81MzWIuSnA8P6J65-0mULYyLDWDWYnCVA7aANAnxHKUyzIptScxzctwEmhZEUWMU9hi3yz1QVbmvXA5Erp7evjWnuU4AT4m2rNH1PKT3QiL6xXEr1eATFscvkoQQsyWvYwxBrH4j_NrDGOniNsm7mdZCPXMM_EYD7cEWwEdSea5Un1aHqPhztQJp6v7H_FjTYRMqv7XDfpQ6o9oQZ4AiptC8_96JzPdYgPdnx3959C-QVH-RZUiGEnGfWoNvLrybOg4SV0HCBqGpYFBklV3EgniaPDXl8AnpXlokReZ_nIoAV3tH-vVD8b-KX9cn8UUtYhEmWHiel7gIBgD9zN5wSbhY55qB53YU3HxkuUFmdYE12jGn-0-dOOnRen1TE0tt7mB4UKDhlRIrl2jhwGh4RB_CmmlsnHRVRja7ppZFms_AweM8sN5aZiisSZDcZGSn2UWaaRs_ZldvVLNvn4D4MYQfCL2s/4d0/FefwawDFR06VHuBEP-sY0A/h2/h001.7BA5WJQkeDnYFOD3lGIKYQUpGqi8Bv7c9Vj-7GxsnZc)

clean_body: This is why we created the Squad. | | | Hi Peter, Donald Trump ran for president and won on a hateful platform of mass deportations — making it clear that immigrants will be the target of the new administration. No matter who is in office, our team will hold them accountable and prioritize our immigrant communities. That’s why we created the Squad, a fierce group of immigrant youth and allies committed to defending our community and fighting against politicians’ attacks to move our country closer to building the future we envision. We’re preparing and recruiting more Squad members to fight back against the Trump administration’s anti-immigrant agenda through our Squad Up & Know Your Rights campaign. During Trump’s first 100 days, UWDA will mobilize volunteers across the country in preparation for any efforts to mass deport. This activation campaign will support communities by training volunteers on the information they need to teach folks their rights. We’re a growing movement, taking action everywhere. Your support allows us to look out for our communities and fight back against Trump’s mass deportation agenda. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | We can’t wait to build a powerful movement with you 💪 Alex, United We Dream Action | Our most dedicated supporters are chipping in monthly to sustain our fight to secure a pathway to citizenship. Join them and help us win permanent protections in Congress by starting a recurring donation today: | |

name: Michele Hoitenga
subject: State land or solar farms?!
body:
What is the administration thinking?

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/brightsparkstrategies/up-next-the-michigan-senate-11035759?e=9ec31248a9)
---
| | | |
---
| Friend,
Over the last week you may have seen news stories about the Department of Natural Resources leasing more than 400 acres of state land to a private solar company in Otsego County. If the department charged with protecting our state’s valuable natural resources turning land over to private solar developers leaves you scratching your head, you aren’t alone.
According to a recent [DetroitNews article](https://takeitbackmi.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f3a7dccdb3ca90c7483cf93d3&id=f63657336d&e=9ec31248a9), the decision comes “as the DNR faces dwindling revenues from hunting and fishing licenses, and Michigan falls behind building enough renewable energy fast enough to risk not meeting a key state climate goal – 100% clean energy by 2040.” Top DNR officials have confirmed this plan and it didn’t take long for my Republican colleagues and I to sound the alarm. The DNR has a duty to protect our wildlife and public lands. Failure by the DNR to promote Michigan’s rich outdoor heritage, and the state’s inability to build sufficient infrastructure to support arbitrary renewable energy goals, does not necessitate a fire sale of precious forestland, especially from the department charged with its protection. This plot to destroy forests and drive animals from their habitats in order to raise funds from leasing agreements is shocking, shortsighted and unacceptable.
This is just another example of misguided priorities coming out of the current administration. Take it Back Super PAC, together with Senate Republicans, is committed to working for you, not special interests with the biggest check books. We are committed to doing everything we can to put the lights out on this horrible, unnatural plan.
We urge you to let your voice be heard by reaching out to the following people:
Governor Gretchen Whitmer: 517-335-7858 or 517-373-3400
DNR Director Scott Bowen: 517-284-6367 or [DNR-Director@Michigan.gov](mailto:DNR-Director@Michigan.gov)
Office of Public Lands - Scott Whitcomb: 517-284-6367 or [whitcombs@michigan.gov](mailto:whitcombs@michigan.gov)
Stay tuned for news and updates as this discussion continues and feel free to share this e-newsletter with anyone you think would benefit. Your friends can sign up [here](https://takeitbackmi.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f3a7dccdb3ca90c7483cf93d3&id=2531779930&e=9ec31248a9).
In service, Senator Michele Hoitenga Senator Joe Bellino
---
| Senator Roger Hauck Senator Mark Huizenga
---
[DONATE TODAY!](https://takeitbackmi.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f3a7dccdb3ca90c7483cf93d3&id=85f195ba2d&e=9ec31248a9)

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Counter false history and anti-American teaching
body:
| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=bef71af05c9f4d7481c0c738593019f1&_t=bHSEIPy1iYPbmCGbM0ADTSV5nungrjCBTwmWi_JzQnyoeQc1xFxFSPztsmR1ESG09zj00ACKYa_cj0kPQAjFGmn0X8ANQg8T_K-54YoNsn-95iEE8aVqN_pJ0-DandLF)_
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bef71af05c9f4d7481c0c738593019f1&_e=5L6jQJ69ZUYBpRJR_mGCyTrER79xo6jy82XgEKpTsKWOQ4zz6jyFyuoXpImU07pcfImoXxmE24FKtQkhPoeBsked5LhiVmM0G41bj1gnnZ_AIrhsG3asKXMWTKdTAUS_6arzzbB293GxUEnUz92MF58nKcJ7p30nyxdGGLkSEQPBJqSXRe9HgUV0ZY_5_VbZwU9K_uYTcu3jy7BOf92z14y4Hiahml8HYRYUD6ebjTdySLt6hcihLfYB6P43uC8jE3qHjOqICFDU2XedFlVKLFSJ10yK7RGUMN7ct4Jn6bmzTIRgo1-4MrMeqOKupF7ELg0rHKCwWA1ti7Spd3shcEDEn7XUw2QpD1hm1K8kzKdjWXVEUz6KBbOSN-Y-fpTjbIwSt7XeYDxPzqz_g_-HLUEiGASuG4Mk8eweRnAEPaOCnPLwx5en6SySmzstTKK9)
---
| | Fellow American, There is a powerful movement in our culture to teach young Americans that our nation's history is **oppressive** and **shameful**. Sometimes, this effort goes under the name "critical race theory." Other times, activists advance these ideas through works like _The_ _New York Times_ '_ _ "1619 Project."

This radical movement pushes a narrative that slavery, not freedom, is the defining characteristic of American history. They teach our children that we should replace equal individual rights with the idea of unequal rights based on group identity.
---
| | **Hillsdale College is committed to countering this destructive ideology. That 's why we have produced a new, free online course titled ["Civil Rights in American History."](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bef71af05c9f4d7481c0c738593019f1&_e=5L6jQJ69ZUYBpRJR_mGCyTrER79xo6jy82XgEKpTsKWOQ4zz6jyFyuoXpImU07pcfImoXxmE24FKtQkhPoeBsked5LhiVmM0G41bj1gnnZ_AIrhsG3asKXMWTKdTAUS_6arzzbB293GxUEnUz92MF58nKcJ7p30nyxdGGLkSEQPBJqSXRe9HgUV0ZY_5_VbZwU9K_uYTcu3jy7BOf92z14y4Hiahml8HYRYUD6ebjTdySLt6hcihLfYB6P43uC8jE3qHjOqICFDU2XedFlVKLIsMt8pKXRpCaI6vfH6N0SQ-_NekayXBGKuMOi5etdu9m1tG3qmujyxr3vzfFDTHJaSUSqmAynbz7q6l4qxuxz0tdL36X4O2Ry4ghfI9nPfuzreMKgF-P7twD_iuL6MR6NIgrLrp7kVFm46posYyW_WDPpiekowwUxRzvXq2gUnE) And right now, it is available in a special, limited DVD box set.** When you take this course, you'll learn about:
* How our Founding Founders understood equality, natural rights, and civil rights.
* The quest for justice in America through the Civil War, during Reconstruction, and in the 20th century.
* The danger posed to freedom and civil rights today by identity politics.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bef71af05c9f4d7481c0c738593019f1&_e=5L6jQJ69ZUYBpRJR_mGCyTrER79xo6jy82XgEKpTsKWOQ4zz6jyFyuoXpImU07pcfImoXxmE24FKtQkhPoeBsked5LhiVmM0G41bj1gnnZ_AIrhsG3asKXMWTKdTAUS_6arzzbB293GxUEnUz92MF58nKcJ7p30nyxdGGLkSEQPBJqSXRe9HgUV0ZY_5_VbZwU9K_uYTcu3jy7BOf92z14y4Hiahml8HYRYUD6ebjTdySLt6hcihLfYB6P43uC8jE3qHjOqICFDU2XedFlVKLFWqVCVyRGlR7nd35ptH6StfSCYf1RcKsdL9gdC4r95XuU3a0n1t09y8a7varAbl6wTGW51A8FsWUDkPqSDkQexeSQsO9opwc5PqjCNP5uTQc0MA1VlSjsJBIYJ_kzteL7u77MZZcLEztjwIb5z2eC7Pq20g2hKt4DS5tAEtuNz9)
---
| | **You can help promote "Civil Rights in American History" and receive your very own DVD box set of this timely and important new course by giving a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more today.** As we do all of our work, we produce free online courses while refusing to accept _any _government funding. We don't even receive indirect funding in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. At Hillsdale, we rely entirely on the support of private citizens like you who agree with our mission on behalf of liberty. Please help promote Hillsdale's free online courses and other educational outreach efforts during this critical time by making your best gift today. And don't forget. When you give $100 or more, you'll receive your very own DVD box set of **" Civil Rights in American History." ** You can make your tax-deductible donation using the secure link below: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-civil-rights-in-american-history-dvd**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bef71af05c9f4d7481c0c738593019f1&_e=5L6jQJ69ZUYBpRJR_mGCyTrER79xo6jy82XgEKpTsKWOQ4zz6jyFyuoXpImU07pcfImoXxmE24FKtQkhPoeBsked5LhiVmM0G41bj1gnnZ_AIrhsG3asKXMWTKdTAUS_6arzzbB293GxUEnUz92MF58nKcJ7p30nyxdGGLkSEQPBJqSXRe9HgUV0ZY_5_VbZwU9K_uYTcu3jy7BOf92z14y4Hiahml8HYRYUD6ebjTdySLt6hcihLfYB6P43uC8jE3qHjOqICFDU2XedFlVKLJxZSrqZyclvQT8Mc3tk2TzISg6TrYz1hYhBtxX8ftKQhXyI8XuEbaUOPpJUgyMW9D-0oE2mC78wf-_6fhfiSDDTnq7cHiC8opm-Usbf3dLZ1kOjJAQkQvwvky3p3nF6Wj6fjv2djxaWf7hSsB5m7ZDVawT4k0VrWce4mqmXuJm3) But please don't wait. There are only a limited number of "**Civil Rights in American History** " DVD box sets available, so reserve your copy before they're gone. Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its educational mission on behalf of liberty. Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
