name: Martin Heinrich
subject: I’m honored
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100122281/521831933/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYThiZmQ2MC1jNGNlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TxMOCigZbNtdbFtG4ciCPDhKVDRa0dg53I9TV8Z9M8E=&emci=3b0b81b0-9cce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=aa8bfd60-c4ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=252045)
---
Team, I am honored to have been chosen by my colleagues to serve as a Ranking Member of the Energy and Natural Resources Committee. My work is grounded in my love of public lands, my understanding of energy technologies, and my unwavering commitment to deliver for the people and places in New Mexico and across our country. At the same time, I am clear-eyed about the work ahead to defend and protect our communities from the inevitable threat posed by the incoming administration. As I assume this role, I will work every day to provide effective leadership and protect New Mexico’s public lands. **There’s still so much for us to accomplish together, but doing so will require bold action.** [_**I’m ready to fight for New Mexico and our planet every step of the way. Will you chip in a grassroots donation to fuel my work today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100122282/521831934/226891441?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYThiZmQ2MC1jNGNlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TxMOCigZbNtdbFtG4ciCPDhKVDRa0dg53I9TV8Z9M8E=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100122283/521831936/226891441?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYThiZmQ2MC1jNGNlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TxMOCigZbNtdbFtG4ciCPDhKVDRa0dg53I9TV8Z9M8E=)

My work is grounded in my love of public lands, my understanding of energy technologies, and my unwavering commitment to deliver for the people and places in New Mexico and across our country. At the same time, I am clear-eyed about the work ahead to defend and protect our communities from the inevitable threat posed by the incoming administration. As I assume this role, I will work every day to provide effective leadership and protect New Mexico’s public lands. Newsweek: Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=48fa8f60db3a42378de03883afa96728&_e=aMbt092LUUQeetKy9QxQu7gdJEw4hGoNdcmiZWlAlx1LPVsDIg78eCa5KVeIkugAKdjF6yABF3iamI2FG1kAcVKcPlHhl9TQ25OyQYNl-aLYKHQjNqPSzeBtanc-KHc69ObFeXnFvGNlKFrM8x5VBsKIlKoJCC7-t5Pn0yEnkm9Jz-OQmT5YmdSkui2BPfgvhgxVQswSPPAl24qUdDybylCA-oI662ukLvjAmSNujnqoRjEsEd5PfnmXRCPEqvVvZCAP0T07nZnigFssymk0g2SusZvqcNN0keIvSmvoSFxJ9zS5UdQr92HOSJmMX93hMZVLPTk0vdB0q8MFzO7i_GZTDy_VICdaFjwTBQZHGgOUcUJmDk4-i9dRAi5tjIVK5zKR5uK9fKK5Oesmm40eNA%3D%3D)
---
Dear Peter,
---
Even as the Deep State continues its efforts to rob me of EVERYTHING – _my home, my possessions, my credit cards, my car_ – _I will never surrender the fight for my freedom and justice._
---
And even with headlines like these popping up, I refuse to roll over like a dog and give up my rights:
---
**_Newsweek_ : Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst**
---
Outside the New York City Courthouse, I was asked, _“Do you think Mr. Trump can help you get out of this?”_
---
Here’s what I said: _**“Mr. Trump doesn’t have to help me get out of it. All Mr. Trump has to do is straighten out the legal system and we’ll find out who the real criminals are.”**_
---
Anyone with common sense knows this case was a complete abuse of power. _They want me to pay _$148 MILLION!__
---
It’s punitive! It’s ridiculous! This was done solely because I’m a Republican living in the Democrat Dictatorship of New York.
---
But now that President Trump is headed back to the White House, I have hope that our broken, corrupt, and predatory judicial system will be fixed – and justice for ALL Americans will be restored.
---
Don’t forget: President Trump refused to surrender to the tyrannical Democrats even after four wrongful arrests, a felony conviction, and an assassin’s bullet. And he just won the White House!
---
_**That’s why I will _KEEP_ _FIGHTING_ for my God-given freedoms and rights.**_
---
If you can support me in my fight, I’d be eternally grateful. But if you cannot, please do not even think twice. Take care of yourself and your family!
---
[**If you can, and, seriously, only if you can, please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – as I keep fighting for my freedom and justice as the Democrats’ Deep State tries to JAIL me for life.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=48fa8f60db3a42378de03883afa96728&_e=aMbt092LUUQeetKy9QxQu7gdJEw4hGoNdcmiZWlAlx1LPVsDIg78eCa5KVeIkugAKdjF6yABF3iamI2FG1kAcVKcPlHhl9TQ25OyQYNl-aLYKHQjNqPSzeBtanc-KHc69ObFeXnFvGNlKFrM8x5VBsKIlKoJCC7-t5Pn0yEnkm9Jz-OQmT5YmdSkui2BPfgvhgxVQswSPPAl24qUdDybylCA-oI662ukLvjAmSNujnqoRjEsEd5PfnmXRCPEqvVvvVbVAm8kICverpVxhmzoaPfsewK4uWTzZgJn31WsBgNUbcTbt89KTJxlzc0HLofWZ3WOaS2B9LNKqtBaDeIE8oyQyNyt655JH3u6u5kL6VTxmvdfEFC4WDx0ad7Rwh8IpGt8CKuIUbWe-NdfJ7vX8Q%3D%3D)

With the support of the EMILYs List community, **Judge Janet Protasiewicz** won her seat on the Wisconsin state Supreme Court in 2023, giving liberals the majority. And thanks to that victory, our fundamental freedoms are protected in Wisconsin today.

But, Peter, we can't risk having that progress reversed this year.

Susan Crawford's race _will_ determine whether the Wisconsin state Supreme Court has a liberal or conservative majority — and, consequently, if the rights of Wisconsinites remain protected for years to come.
[**It's never been more important to have pro-choice justices on our highest courts. name: David Horowitz
subject: the enemy within
body:
The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against.| |
---

I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. body:

Team —
On January 6, 2021, the very existence of our democracy was threatened and, for the first time in American history, the peaceful transition of power was interrupted.
The insurrectionists have not been defeated. The attempted coup on that day may have failed, but its architects have been emboldened and they are, in fact, planning the next one.
Today, we’re going to start fighting back. The Democracy Defense Fund is an organization committed to saving our country from the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it — but we need your help.
Will you join our pro-democracy movement by splitting a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton? Any amount helps in our fight to save democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
You know my uncle. He started the “Big Lie” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk.
We must stop him and his loyal cronies and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund — and it’s why Seth Moulton and I are asking for your help now.
We need resources to support organizations and people who are committed to protecting the right to vote and preserving our Constitution, just like Seth Moulton.
This includes an all-out effort to support campaigns at the local and state level in order to take back state houses and preserve election integrity.
All of that is necessary in order to defend our democracy, friend. And that’s what we’re committed to do here at Democracy Defense Fund.
This will only be possible if we all do our part — starting right now. So, will you split a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Thank you,
Mary

Peter,

I hope you and your family had a joyous Christmas and New Year together. As you can see, we were blessed with a White Christmas in Montana, as the entire family gathered to celebrate the Holidays.
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=95b175ff669f4c20888ac69bb298f073&_e=2tqmroElO-x1O5WmiS2eJQIOrZZUuUpxNX4j9Op2wpnRSR8ywlKiMoSOZSz5YY3CmxL0I499_1QvhSMfO4kI-L5SorBZVqnsu-DEVT-nz5c3TmY4hyQUaOKxwal6Pk_Sk7ubYnPAochsKa30jbshSrwo4Q7ZaYtk5gt6dURlsAVYB-AmtoFKEmAGZu8bU4XAnz-zhi1MwXxSFLmmm-aQgcmw0ymxKVe0lCZlQf-TFNPHsW7y2owLDwBVdTMK_TzEElDI6KWLcOLPX9PBdn_9M9fpcKv5bFvWJrz8s4EB1S89LkYnj7_DbpG_GYqkb_pT74YcDq3CGDrFqrBWe6EIqYrQbKx36CGh6TFga1lUTpBWT9rjvRCRkCU0abBg6a5AyDs87GmlU9FYLoMreurTEsDovdCoDVhfkME-cKqDij5330xFOSgy8V1NBaKVznfVyYOlro8rTB_Nh_IgspKdpuaOpGIpTo8G63qDfdFqGTCp7uG66r5HNLftTW2Ngc-jFJduNpvF7sc6ktV8ravgj1koNvRo8rgRajsEAWa0tU6wsEKiKs362frQEtVjZHSWC8O1v-DIRl5b7Ct0A3l7W8hlD60wVz6uyReEuUvnFtM%3D)
Now, I’m back in D.C., ready to resume my work for the American people. And Peter, we have A LOT of work to do. Democrat control in Washington left our new Republican Senate Majority a monumental mess to clean up, from the economy to the crisis at our Southern Border.

We need to hear from Americans like you to help us prioritize the work we need to accomplish. As you can see, we were blessed with a White Christmas in Montana, as the entire family gathered to celebrate the Holidays. | Peter, I hope you and your family had a joyous Christmas and New Year together. As you can see, we were blessed with a White Christmas in Montana, as the entire family gathered to celebrate the Holidays. Now, I’m back in D.C., ready to resume my work for the American people. And Peter, we have A LOT of work to do. Democrat control in Washington left our new Republican Senate Majority a monumental mess to clean up, from the economy to the crisis at our Southern Border. We need to hear from Americans like you to help us prioritize the work we need to accomplish. Making sure we’re on the same page before our Republican Majority is sworn in will guarantee we start 2025 from a position of strength and signal to Democrats their obstructionist tactics won’t work. clean_body: With twelve special elections quickly approaching, will you chip in to help ensure that state Democrats have the resources they need to win this month, next month, and beyond? | | | | | ---|--- Democrats are gearing up for twelvespecial elections across eight states over the next three months. Here’s what’s on deck ⬇️ | Date | State | Seat ---|---|--- 1/28 | Minnesota | SD-60 1/28 | Minnesota | HD-40B 1/28 | Iowa | SD-35 2/15 | Delaware | SD-1 2/15 | Delaware | SD-5 2/25 | Maine | HD-24 3/25 | South Carolina | HD-113 3/25 | Pennsylvania | SD-36 3/25 | Mississippi | HD-23 3/25 | Mississippi | HD-82 3/29 | Louisiana | SD-14 3/29 | Louisiana | SD-23 With Republicans' federal trifecta, building Democratic power at the state level has never been more critical to our fight for reproductive freedom, gun safety, and our democracy. But, state legislative races are frequently overlooked and underfunded – we need you to help change that. Each of these special elections marks an opportunity to take a meaningful stand against Republicans’ hate-driven agenda. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | As we gear up for the fights ahead, we know we do our best work together. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: President Carter is a reminder that things can be different.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Today we’re observing a national day of mourning after President Jimmy Carter’s funeral service.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250109-4657-footer&t=1&akid=4657%2E420207%2EfnWsTr)
Peter, today we’re observing a national day of mourning after President Jimmy Carter’s funeral service.
**President Carter was a champion of peace, human rights, and dignity for all people, everywhere. Our country — and the world — were better because of him.**
__
_Photo from The Carter Center_
He fought to expand Medicaid and Medicare. He never stopped campaigning for peace, both as president and as a private citizen. He built thousands of homes for families in need. And he was a model on anti-corruption efforts, going as far as putting his family farm in a blind trust when he entered the White House to avoid even the appearance of wrongdoing.
In today’s era of overwhelming corruption, crushing medical debt, skyrocketing housing costs, and heightened global conflicts, President Carter leaves a legacy that reminds us things _can_ be different.
On this national day of mourning, I hope you’ll take some time to reflect on President Carter’s memory — and on where he would want us to go in the years ahead.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250109-4657-footer&t=2&refcode2=4657_420207_fnWsTr&akid=4657%2E420207%2EfnWsTr)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4657%2E420207%2EfnWsTr)

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: A new year, a new Congress
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250109-1180-foote&t=1001&akid=1180%2E342411%2EPrCzUN ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

This past week, Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan and Rashida, returned to
Washington D.C. for the start of the 119th Congress.

That’s thanks to the unwavering
support of everyday activists who chipped in and showed up for our
Squad,
Peter.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250109-movement.UptdyY&refcode=em20250109-1180&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1180%2E342411%2EPrCzUN ]If you stand with our Squad, please chip in $3 today to
help us kick off the new year.

As our Squad begins the crucial work of legislating and advocating for our
rights in a Republican-led House, it’s clear that the strength of our
grassroots movement will be key to our success.

We must have the resources to amplify our movement—from organizing events,
volunteer training, and phone banking, to canvassing, digital ads, and so
much more.

However, we can’t do that if our fundraising doesn’t match the true
urgency of our present situation. With Donald Trump set to take office in
less than 10 days and his MAGA allies gaining control of critical federal
institutions, we must be ready to outsmart, outvote, and out-organize the
far-right at a moment’s notice.

Peter,
2025 is a new opportunity to recommit
ourselves to supporting our Squad and strengthening this
movement.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250109-movement.UptdyY&refcode=em20250109-1180&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1180%2E342411%2EPrCzUN ]Will you chip in $5 to ensure our Squad has the resources to protect
our rights and push back against the chaos in the Republican-led House?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250109-movement.UptdyY&refcode=em20250109-1180&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1180%2E342411%2EPrCzUN ]Contribute ››

The far-right has done everything in their power to silence our Squad —
and they’ve failed. Now, it’s up to us to show up for our Squad while they
fight to bring transformational and bold change for our communities.

Together,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1180%2E342411%2EPrCzUN

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100123454/521835850/-1346133780?refcode=AU_FSP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250109_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTkwMjhiOS1jOGNlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4d0dfmG5VvLcDZgwsj8C19novR7DtCl4MOq5iMw2PbY=)

Peter, More Americans than ever before have health insurance thanks to the _Affordable Care Act._**Donald Trump and House Republicans want to change that. ** After _repeatedly_ failing to repeal the ACA during his first term, extreme Republicans are dead-set on renewing their efforts to destroy our health care system and jeopardize the health coverage of tens of millions of Americans. Trump has reiterated that he has “concepts of a plan” for the American health care system — including looking at new ways to overturn the ACA and rip away protections for millions of people with preexisting conditions. And Republicans have made it known that **Social Security and Medicare** could be on the chopping block. **Katherine is leading the charge to make sure that doesn’t happen.** House Republicans will begin the next Congress with one of the smallest majorities ever, and Katherine is working hard to ensure Democrats stand firm against Trump and his allies’ efforts to make health care more expensive for working families. **[_**Every person deserves to have a fair shot at success. That starts with ensuring they can access basic human services like affordable health care. Will you support Katherine and House Democrats in their fight to protect affordable health care from extreme Republicans by adding your name to our petition?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100123458/521835854/709646634?refcode=AU_FSP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250109_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTkwMjhiOS1jOGNlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4d0dfmG5VvLcDZgwsj8C19novR7DtCl4MOq5iMw2PbY=&emci=acbb26b3-c8ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=419028b9-c8ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=30620316)** | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100123461/521835857/709646634?refcode=AU_FSP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250109_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTkwMjhiOS1jOGNlLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4d0dfmG5VvLcDZgwsj8C19novR7DtCl4MOq5iMw2PbY=&emci=acbb26b3-c8ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=419028b9-c8ce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=30620316)**

---
Peter,
---
Democrats and the mainstream media are still searching for answers. They are living in complete denial as to the state of America. They tried to set the agenda and tried to trick Americans into thinking everything was ok, but they were wrong, and the voters saw right through it.

The victory we won in November came from the good, hardworking, God-fearing Americans who were tired of settling for second best, and who believed we could do better and be better. That's the message I delivered on the campaign trail in the little town of Chesterfield, Missouri-- "At a time when our choices will determine whether we have a country in fifty or sixty years, this is our time."

The American people delivered a mandate in November, but now the work starts. I'm rolling up my sleeves to deliver on the promise that America's best days are ahead of us, and I need you by my side.
---
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d7adad7cacf94cc4b51fb8ad4401ef6b&_e=VeDyjf1uIpQPm9cgSo66oofOul1iakIwiogxNXzzgeZ-8arxq0z3q6tff6rk0p-LWhbOQUmBZaiIX3MR0lJ0MhmnDGi2vabXR0EGBNuwCpZOYK7LbFxu0ocQuHdg7X1oKOkX9gNOtL1ZHlKMv_QC9BRem6_Qx2Lxe_9E6GIJsW9QbAcC8cIuBYnD-L9UDmhw0RJHNlvcijwBR0E_U2aBpe9NyCmSmXVHhmMYVkIsQPUHx28Ka6QIHUNkLaKwGSNKv2NMPtmqKT2C49bqlQ9Khayj-uDRkLaoGM2aXJkZqt11_goAwNmRog9ttNHXgyHHnmN9M7hTcNo0i1ujVzNc65oqOq4X8De1pqAEdJvSnM3ZT5OYkSqVNeQWOaqKCs34)
---
Transcript:

I'm pretty sure that when you look back years from now and you tell the story of this time to your children your grandchildren your nieces and nephews, in a time of consequence, in a time that mattered, I took a stand for my country.

In a time when our choices could shape the direction of this country for fifty and sixty years to come, ladies and gentlemen, at a time when our choices will determine whether we have a country in fifty or sixty years, this is our time.

You hear people say, “oh we need more solutions in Washington, D.C.” Can I just tell you the truth? There aren't solutions in Washington, D.C.

The solutions for our country are right here, right here in this room. The hope for our country is right here in this room. The salvation of our country will come from the faith, from the courage, from the boldness, from the goodness that's right here in this room.

Let's stand together, let's fight together and together let's save our country.
---
[**SUPPORT JOSH HAWLEY >>>**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d7adad7cacf94cc4b51fb8ad4401ef6b&_e=VeDyjf1uIpQPm9cgSo66oofOul1iakIwiogxNXzzgeZ-8arxq0z3q6tff6rk0p-LWhbOQUmBZaiIX3MR0lJ0MhmnDGi2vabXR0EGBNuwCpZOYK7LbFxu0ocQuHdg7X1oKOkX9gNOtL1ZHlKMv_QC9BRem6_Qx2Lxe_9E6GIJsW9QbAcC8cIuBYnD-L9UDmhw0RJHNlvcijwBR0E_U2aBpe9NyCmSmXVHhmMYVkIsQPV0PGAFSj7JbXKqpiu66-lnYqJsWDGi7sN-HyrQy_FTqsIyxikGEHPxSYIjhfR2uW6sGOveDKbqD3QYSUZ-3VOwyNm5Ko0A18GUIS4xFZmm_YVwQWa2JdZg0yffA1S0WKCTGqihk16b0Cu6wM5VoD3X)
---
God Bless,
---
---
Josh Hawley

name: John Fetterman
subject: Mourning the loss of a great public servant
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
President Jimmy Carter’s funeral service was held this morning in Washington.
#
The country is mourning the loss of a great public servant today, Derek.
**President Jimmy Carter’s funeral service was held this morning in Washington. During his life, he set an example for all of us to follow.**
__
_Photo from The Carter Center_
Whether he was in the White House or building homes for his fellow Americans, President Carter was committed to fighting for the little guy. That’s something I’ve always admired about him.
His honesty, selflessness, and commitment to treating everyone with respect and dignity are a reminder of what our politics should *really* look like.
So let’s honor his memory by trying to be a little bit more like he was every day. We’ll all be a little better off for it.
John ❤️
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20250109-9775-footer&t=1&refcode2=9775_434096_iB4bsf&akid=9775%2E434096%2EiB4bsf)**

name: Take on Elon Musk via Our Revolution
subject: Elon Musk's plan to plunder your tax dollars
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1011?refcode=email-20250109_v&akid=7501%2E5885482%2EMPpSqx ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis — Elon Musk’s
Business Plan for 2025 is to use his ‘first-buddy’ status with Trump to
privatize NASA, win even more defense contracts, and loot the government.

Already, Elon Musk’s SpaceX gets nearly half of its income from federal
NASA and Defense contracts — and in four short years he has increased his
wealth from $20 Billion to $400 Billion!

And he’s just ONE of Trump’s billionaire buddies lining up to privatize
the government and plunder our tax dollars to pad their pockets.

Bernie Sanders and our movement are the force that can blunt Trump and
Musk’s moves to enrich themselves and destroy public services. It’s not
just rhetoric — right now, Our Revolution and our allies have a strategic
plan to expose this corruption and mobilize citizens across the nation to
pressure their politicians to stop it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20912?t=1060&akid=7501%2E5885482%2EMPpSqx ]Musk and the Oligarchy’s Plan will go into effect in less than 2 weeks
when Trump takes the oath of office. Can you chip in today to fuel our
efforts to take on Trump, Musk, and the Oligarchy?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20912?t=1061&akid=7501%2E5885482%2EMPpSqx ][IMG]

And that’s just Elon Musk. The rest of Trump’s billionaire buddies have
the same plan to pillage our critical public services — from the U.S.
Postal Service to the National Weather Service, and they’re eyeing Social
Security and critical health infrastructure as well.

Public goods must serve the public — not enrich Oligarchs at our expense.
Our Revolution is going to fight like hell to make sure that you don’t
have to pay for your weather report, lose crucial public media like NPR,
or have to pay a monthly subscription to get your mail delivered.

the Oligarchy's grift.

resources to take on the Oligarchy. We know the challenge ahead is both
massive and urgent, so we need the help of our grassroots donors right
away.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250109nd&akid=7501%2E5885482%2EMPpSqx ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250109nd&akid=7501%2E5885482%2EMPpSqx ]CHIP IN $22

name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: [Sign On] Endorse Ilhan Omar!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1439%2E791427%2EuC2fMH)

Friend — In just a few days Donald Trump will step back into the Oval Office and begin his attempt at a far-right transformation of America.
He plans to carry out mass deportations, reshape federal agencies, increase the power of the presidency, pass a national abortion ban, and much more.
[**So, with all of these important fights ahead, we’re asking you to take 60 seconds and personally endorse Ilhan Omar today.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-jan25-personal-endorse/?source=em250109-1-gm&akid=1439%2E791427%2EuC2fMH)**
**[ENDORSE ILHAN](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-jan25-personal-endorse/?refcode=em250109-1-gm&akid=1439%2E791427%2EuC2fMH)**
Ilhan has been a consistent fighter on the issues we care about, from creating a truly fair and humanitarian immigration system, to restoring the right to abortion across the country, to pushing for a ceasefire in Gaza and a more just US foreign policy.
But on each of these issues, no one person or leader can make change alone. It’s always taken a grassroots movement of regular folks like you pitching in and making their voices heard. That’s how we’ve made change in the past, and it’s how we’ll make change for our future.
[**So please: Add your name today and personally endorse Ilhan Omar as she starts her new term in Congress. Help us show the size and strength of this incredible movement.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-jan25-personal-endorse/?source=em250109-1-gm&akid=1439%2E791427%2EuC2fMH)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-jan25-personal-endorse/?source=em250109-1-gm&akid=1439%2E791427%2EuC2fMH)**
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan

clean_body: Friend — In just a few days Donald Trump will step back into the Oval Office and begin his attempt at a far-right transformation of America. He plans to carry out mass deportations, reshape federal agencies, increase the power of the presidency, pass a national abortion ban, and much more. Ilhan has been a consistent fighter on the issues we care about, from creating a truly fair and humanitarian immigration system, to restoring the right to abortion across the country, to pushing for a ceasefire in Gaza and a more just US foreign policy. But on each of these issues, no one person or leader can make change alone. It’s always taken a grassroots movement of regular folks like you pitching in and making their voices heard. That’s how we’ve made change in the past, and it’s how we’ll make change for our future. In solidarity, Team Ilhan PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

name: Kotek HQ
subject: New year, new challenges, same Tina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Hello Peter, This month marks the halfway point of Tina’s first term as Governor. Thank you so much for being part of this journey with us! Let’s take a moment to celebrate the progress we’ve made under Tina's leadership as Governor of Oregon. Here's what we've achieved together: 💚 We passed a sweeping affordable housing bill that Tina shepherded into law — a priority for her last year. Oregon needs more tools and resources to boost our housing supply, and that’s what our team will continue to fight for in 2025. ⚠️ We declared a crucial state of emergency on fentanyl in downtown Portland. This led to tighter coordination among community organizations and government agencies. We've expanded access to lifesaving overdose-reversal medications and made major strides in boosting city security with better lighting and stronger crime prevention measures. There's more to get done, but progress is visible. 🎓 We secured funding for summer learning programs, helping thousands of our students stay on track academically during summer. 🚍 Tina visited all nine of Oregon's federally recognized Tribal Nations, taking time to connect with their leaders and communities to hear their concerns and grasp their important role across Oregon. 🏛 We now have a new milestone in campaign finance reform with bipartisan legislation capping political contributions. 🩺 We protected reproductive health services by growing our mifepristone stockpile, ensuring abortion medication will be available statewide for at least four years. These highlights illuminate what's been a remarkable year of hard work and dedication to solving problems. But Tina’s work to deliver for Oregon never stops. 2025 is here and with it comes new challenges amid changes in D.C. politics. We need your help to keep our progress going. [_**We wouldn’t ask if it weren’t vital. We must continue this important work. A contribution of just $20.25 keeps us steady as we head into 2025. name: DC Daily Journal
subject: New way to beat depression (without sticking your fingers in cow poo)
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *

| If you're like most people, you probably know that psilocybin--the active compound in magic mushrooms--has been scientifically proven to help with depression, anxiety, and PTSD.

...But finding a reliable source for it can feel like a mission.

After all, who wants to go digging through cow poo just to find something that might work?

That's why we took matters into our own hands... Quite literally!

Introducing... the Easiest Way to Experience the Power of Magic Mushrooms--Without the Hassle Of Going Out And Finding Them Yourself, Or Buying Them From Some "Dodgy Guy" On The Street And Potentially Getting Arrested!

We've transformed real psilocybin mushrooms into a simple, easy-to-take supplement, and we'll ship them right to your door, direct from our farm here in California.

Start your day with a single capsule that helps you:
* **Boost your mood** --Shake off those morning blues and feel more positive every day.
* **Enhance mental clarity** --Get the focus and sharpness you need to tackle your day with ease.
* **Increase energy naturally** --No more sluggish mornings or dragging yourself through the day.

And you can get started today with a full month's supply of real psilocybin magic mushrooms with our Mighty Micro "Microdosing Starter Kit".

_Here 's what's inside each dose:_

150mg of organically grown psilocybin mushrooms (carefully grown and prepared for maximum potency)

A touch of ginger--to support digestion and metabolism (trust us; it doesn't taste very nice without this. Yuck!)

That's it. No fillers, no gimmicks. Just pure, effective ingredients that get results. FAST.

_Here's How Easy It Is to Take Your Daily Dose_

Taking your dose is a breeze. Just:
1. Pop a capsule with your morning coffee.
2. Blend it into a smoothie.
3. Or chew it like a children's vitamin.

It's that simple. And once you find the right dose for you, you'll experience a surge of good energy, positive emotions, and mental clarity that lasts throughout your day.

_Why Trust Us?_
* **Scientifically Backed** --Psilocybin microdosing has been shown to have life-changing benefits, backed by real research and studies from Harvard, Yale, & And Thomas Hopkins Medical University, amongst thousands of other places. You may have already read them.
* **Real Results** --Thousands of satisfied customers have already seen improvements in their mood, focus, and energy.
* **Organic & Safe**--We use only the highest-quality, organically grown mushrooms, from our own farm in california. Everything has been lab tested.
* **Risk-Free** --We stand behind our product with a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied, we'll give you a full refund. No questions asked.

Don't let another day go by feeling stuck.

Order now and get your 1-month supply of real magic mushroom capsules for just $99--and get $1000 worth of FREE products for becoming a new customer--but only if you act today.

Click here to order now:

[https://mightymicro.co/op/starter-pack/ref/12/](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/b0b15f185ecc4587a9a14914facdaa42-9102a051328443bbb04894939539455c/63)

Experience the benefits of magic mushrooms without the mess, and start feeling better today.

Best regards, Michael "The Mushroom Guy" Griswold
---

Peter,

President Trump has officially nominated Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy to lead a new program, the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), to CUT WASTEFUL SPENDING and make sure our tax dollars are SPENT WISELY!

_**Now, Elon and Vivek are CROWDSOURCING the American People to determine what should be cut first.**_

[**CAN YOU SHARE YOUR FEEDBACK?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=03367b0f55384e95a9c65a5e83af21af&_e=Y412m1MatoW2GdPh6vjQQwfk7jhEHqwhoMaOXDc9lXg2H9vMXgpvyVKobAs8Kah0AP3rszafBcWSGbzXC9mGVlnt3zVkXg4M_4mzzahDs_oQhI_QojGRNKliZZWvvRyy5H8M45xRz3Lr3HVb2nAEGhhp1URgbVKZRiW-qjSC7HIn5Lw83n8OnH3b86kO70wD3cHapjKC4h_18b5Sqd4Gnm92yLi8WwODcC2FKprBWpT1UABFuvMBX6Aib8wL5CtstK7onjuj0K54aNdJN_0n3_8Orna_eE_x0VySC4iFM-nbL8VAHASOSwkO9Zq1-Uu_k4muhn8b1gs0P4olf5ZgwA%3D%3D)

clean_body: You've been selected to provide your feedback! | Peter, President Trump has officially nominated Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy to lead a new program, the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), to CUT WASTEFUL SPENDING and make sure our tax dollars are SPENT WISELY! Now, Elon and Vivek are CROWDSOURCING the American People to determine what should be cut first. In 2023 alone, the Federal Government WASTED OVER $900 BILLION OF TAX DOLLARS! Elon and Vivek are set to SLASH the most wasteful spending across the Federal Government, but with so much to tackle, they need to know where to start! The American People gave President Trump and CLEAR MANDATE to Make America Great Again, and it starts with DEFUNDING the most useless Government Programs. Thank you, Royce White | PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343 Copyright (C) 2024 Royce White For Senate, All rights reserved.

body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ IMMEDIATE ACTION REQUIRED: BECOME A TOP MAGA DEFENDER BEFORE TRUMP’S SENTENCING IN NEW YORK TOMORROW https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=ca16e753f2d725cafaf53540490318f939dc2fc25cd5c10c5a4ba5504ed064ed9ef877f36e8cfba7af429e415f9b720210db9281767073f97793483216c18fd0 ADD YOUR NAME: https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=ca16e753f2d725cafaf53540490318f939dc2fc25cd5c10c5a4ba5504ed064ed9ef877f36e8cfba7af429e415f9b720210db9281767073f97793483216c18fd0 BECOME A TOP MAGA DEFENDER Peter, this isn’t the news we wanted to deliver, but Donald Trump’s sentencing for the SHAM guilty verdict he received in New York is scheduled to happen TOMORROW - just 10 days before he is to be sworn in as the 47th President of the United States. Despite Donald Trump’s legal team spending countless hours, days, weeks, AND MONTHS fighting in courtrooms to clear his name and demand his freedom. Despite the real jury – the American People – seeing through the witch hunt and electing Donald Trump by an overwhelming margin. And despite Donald Trump never giving up his promise to “FIGHT, FIGHT, FIGHT!” The soon-to-be 47th President of the United States of America is still scheduled to be sentenced in a New York courtroom FIRST THING tomorrow morning. Now, with just HOURS left until his sentencing, we’re ramping up our nationwide search for the most loyal, dedicated Trump Defenders in America who are committed to standing alongside Donald Trump before, during, and after his sentencing. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=ca16e753f2d725cafaf53540490318f939dc2fc25cd5c10c5a4ba5504ed064ed9ef877f36e8cfba7af429e415f9b720210db9281767073f97793483216c18fd0 Peter, you’ve never backed down from a challenge, so tonight we’re pleading with YOU to join our Trump defense efforts. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=ca16e753f2d725cafaf53540490318f939dc2fc25cd5c10c5a4ba5504ed064ed9ef877f36e8cfba7af429e415f9b720210db9281767073f97793483216c18fd0 ADD YOUR NAME: https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=ca16e753f2d725cafaf53540490318f939dc2fc25cd5c10c5a4ba5504ed064ed9ef877f36e8cfba7af429e415f9b720210db9281767073f97793483216c18fd0 STAND WITH TRUMP BEFORE HIS SENTENCING While we’re sorry to bother you so late at night, time is truly of the essence, and we’re hoping you could take just one moment now to join our fight and stand with Trump before it’s all over. We sincerely hope you’ll take our request to heart. Peter, we look forward to seeing your name on our list when we finalize it at MIDNIGHT! https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=ca16e753f2d725cafaf53540490318f939dc2fc25cd5c10c5a4ba5504ed064ed9ef877f36e8cfba7af429e415f9b720210db9281767073f97793483216c18fd0 Please let us know if you’ll be standing proudly in support of Donald J. Trump when he faces his final sentencing TOMORROW. We’ll be sure to flag your support directly for the official Trump team. Thank you, and God Bless you, MAGA Patriots Via Team Marsha Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. body:
I hope you and your family had a joyous Christmas and New Year together. As you can see, we were blessed with a White Christmas in Montana, as the entire family gathered to celebrate the Holidays. |
---

Fellow American,

I hope you and your family had a joyous Christmas and New Year together. As you can see, we were blessed with a White Christmas in Montana, as the entire family gathered to celebrate the Holidays.
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=84bc97fadd1740f09a6f9593c81af947&_e=82gk-ynqckskdCVPCaPsGjsd2X_g6MMM0mqvzvyV-ltstQbPnRyrJIQkOeJ6Z9HiVxaFR4RZWg--tay05tH0Hv9IzHeEMaAZA4qMZ54njcqvFEuj3ExjTntV7XofAYArIvL0lUyicSNmOll_pTkPOeh9CfbzFvjciqYGbppSfYFxavyS2eq-OIonaxdhIrh3312ZpEZJ3Xotf2jTYQbf2MfwKTSp3aCu3UXYCcKlc7OMK9MhzV3AS-v3OYe5c7OPXD1yU8u19XdIXGKaG93gJflYIb2Og1hPwqY6-dvbKeRyNXiSFccxxP0MKM1JR27c020CVz32HydGlJna_vrLuDROCkuj5MOMCwkeMgrJcc4M_Bs0ipmOedWhv5vsJrfl2Yr9Qj_sWnwGsc7Fj9y-763GHLPLzjhk2u4tnEZ3L-ypE9NGi-j09K25jlrvLTN4GCaMjo9gp3_OxqXFCb98FTkJwIh7zO5RoV6_zvCgt4d3zsA59BRozewQwOVK5TCTXCNWbH9n4C8rBd8xO61lYyK-lh0SFCcSjHXyg-UUxRqUgNJsGktXzlEuZk0AMzQCLiWytCdgT39pfBW3hBTPKft5q1cYzhjF-1Y2sozg7mA%3D)
Now, I’m back in D.C., ready to resume my work for the American people. And Fellow American, we have A LOT of work to do. Democrat control in Washington left our new Republican Senate Majority a monumental mess to clean up, from the economy to the crisis at our Southern Border.

We need to hear from Americans like you to help us prioritize the work we need to accomplish. [**That’s why you were hand-chosen to answer our 2025 American Priorities Survey.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=84bc97fadd1740f09a6f9593c81af947&_e=82gk-ynqckskdCVPCaPsGjsd2X_g6MMM0mqvzvyV-ltstQbPnRyrJIQkOeJ6Z9HiVxaFR4RZWg--tay05tH0Hv9IzHeEMaAZA4qMZ54njcqvFEuj3ExjTntV7XofAYArIvL0lUyicSNmOll_pTkPOeh9CfbzFvjciqYGbppSfYFxavyS2eq-OIonaxdhIrh3312ZpEZJ3Xotf2jTYQbf2MfwKTSp3aCu3UXYCcKlc7OMK9MhzV3AS-v3OYe5c7OPXD1yU8u19XdIXGKaG93gJflYIb2Og1hPwqY6-dvbKeRyNXiSFccxxP0MKM1JR27c020CVz32HydGlJna_vrLuDROCkuj5MOMCwkeMgrJcc4M_Bs0ipmOedWhv5vsJrfl2Yr9Qj_sWnwGsc7Fj9y-763GHLPLzjhk2u4tnEZ3L-ypE9NGi-j09K25jlrvLTN4ZSmnJOrVABA3kaZqYuRoUbJWSi4BHGVcbZ7-AHRaP0dJG9F4FWnHtAXqeLH35ybsgllrVK8PoY86BTOi3qY2HLFPivzoOcIdJSV9sUP_brj6e78EtfsEP5ImnoHUA154_b5uy-QbXEhXA8H-mey_xG-NmzuiUye28HDJ3IhFexY%3D)

[**Please take a minute to respond to our exclusive one-question survey, telling us what you want to see accomplished first as we work to undo the damage left by Joe Biden and the Democrats.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=84bc97fadd1740f09a6f9593c81af947&_e=82gk-ynqckskdCVPCaPsGjsd2X_g6MMM0mqvzvyV-ltstQbPnRyrJIQkOeJ6Z9HiVxaFR4RZWg--tay05tH0Hv9IzHeEMaAZA4qMZ54njcqvFEuj3ExjTntV7XofAYArIvL0lUyicSNmOll_pTkPOeh9CfbzFvjciqYGbppSfYFxavyS2eq-OIonaxdhIrh3312ZpEZJ3Xotf2jTYQbf2MfwKTSp3aCu3UXYCcKlc7OMK9MhzV3AS-v3OYe5c7OPXD1yU8u19XdIXGKaG93gJflYIb2Og1hPwqY6-dvbKeRyNXiSFccxxP0MKM1JR27c020CVz32HydGlJna_vrLuDROCkuj5MOMCwkeMgrJcc4M_Bs0ipmOedWhv5vsJrfl2Yr9Qj_sWnwGsc7Fj9y-763GHLPLzjhk2u4tnEZ3L-ypE9NGi-j09K25jlrvLTN4zXYjGBVBXxDYLe4wFLMil6XJV5lKYEbpuxm_BEt04_XnE8hcRlz-7YzqtKoWe-wia-1LBBKPATjO-NMNr2rbbG7HHYQw8Zqxd0EZDbqbSDD3mojUc2GveBEt5J75I_kq9N3NfzCdFXcdi-_6UeGsPKu5MtjjVJRxo1-4dvqYFGA%3D)

Making sure we’re on the same page before our Republican Majority is sworn in will guarantee we start 2025 from a position of strength and signal to Democrats their obstructionist tactics won’t work.

[**I hope I can count on your advice as soon as possible.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=84bc97fadd1740f09a6f9593c81af947&_e=82gk-ynqckskdCVPCaPsGjsd2X_g6MMM0mqvzvyV-ltstQbPnRyrJIQkOeJ6Z9HiVxaFR4RZWg--tay05tH0Hv9IzHeEMaAZA4qMZ54njcqvFEuj3ExjTntV7XofAYArIvL0lUyicSNmOll_pTkPOeh9CfbzFvjciqYGbppSfYFxavyS2eq-OIonaxdhIrh3312ZpEZJ3Xotf2jTYQbf2MfwKTSp3aCu3UXYCcKlc7OMK9MhzV3AS-v3OYe5c7OPXD1yU8u19XdIXGKaG93gJflYIb2Og1hPwqY6-dvbKeRyNXiSFccxxP0MKM1JR27c020CVz32HydGlJna_vrLuDROCkuj5MOMCwkeMgrJcc4M_Bs0ipmOedWhv5vsJrfl2Yr9Qj_sWnwGsc7Fj9y-763GHLPLzjhk2u4tnEZ3L-ypE9NGi-j09K25jlrvLTN4E9-Mp_nV3Eavevf40EXfeTysSeqFHgY6HFoYlmgdaySDfIiRZBRCt7qSxYXxYHDZYacpmiSaY-3UmdaAPOb7QNjqnXk1sJihDD7oMxESA1IBeZZWcrPe7GJ68uVodUB9lMvlxLGYk_8rARzXxou46IX1BUedY5kWDHDM3Uh3VGs%3D)

Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. clean_body: I hope you and your family had a joyous Christmas and New Year together. As you can see, we were blessed with a White Christmas in Montana, as the entire family gathered to celebrate the Holidays. | Fellow American, I hope you and your family had a joyous Christmas and New Year together. As you can see, we were blessed with a White Christmas in Montana, as the entire family gathered to celebrate the Holidays. Now, I’m back in D.C., ready to resume my work for the American people. And Fellow American, we have A LOT of work to do. Democrat control in Washington left our new Republican Senate Majority a monumental mess to clean up, from the economy to the crisis at our Southern Border. We need to hear from Americans like you to help us prioritize the work we need to accomplish. Making sure we’re on the same page before our Republican Majority is sworn in will guarantee we start 2025 from a position of strength and signal to Democrats their obstructionist tactics won’t work. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Sarah McBride
subject: President Jimmy Carter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Well done, good and faithful servant.
#
President Jimmy Carter’s funeral is today.
**President Carter was the epitome of a selfless public servant.**
His honesty, compassion, and principled leadership serve as a model for all of us as citizens and for all those in positions of public trust. President Carter lived his faith and his patriotism in such profound ways — and our world is better off for it.
Photo Credit: The Carter Center
Today, as we celebrate and remember President Carter, let’s honor his legacy by committing to serve our neighbors and work to improve our communities as long as we can — even until we’re 100 years old, if we’re lucky enough to live that long.
Thank you, President Carter. Well done, good and faithful servant.
Sarah McBride
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=1&akid=1678%2E21716%2E4A0XdY)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=2&akid=1678%2E21716%2E4A0XdY)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1678%2E21716%2E4A0XdY)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: Powered By People
subject: Supporting our neighbors in Los Angeles
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Right now, there are so many images of blazing fires in Los Angeles across the news and social media. At least five people have lost their lives and thousands have been displaced due to these LA wildfires.
When tragedy strikes, it’s up to all of us to come together to support those who are in need of assistance, which is why we’re reaching out to you today.
[**If you can afford it, please make a donation to World Central Kitchen which is on the ground in Los Angeles right now providing emergency food and water to people who need relief.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250109-wck.u6emRR&refcode=ema20250109-239941&t=1&akid=239941%2E444211%2EcTl_63)

When thousands of people pitch in what they can, it all comes together and can make a big difference in helping people who need emergency relief.
Thank you for stepping up today,
Team Powered by People

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: Stand with Me in Supporting Barbara Lee for Mayor of Oakland
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Dear Friend,
Barbara Lee has been a leader for Oakland for decades—delivering results at the local, state, and federal levels. From securing tens of millions of dollars for our community to standing on the frontlines of justice, Barbara has always fought for us. Now, she’s stepping forward to lead Oakland as our next Mayor, and I’m proud to give her my full support.
Barbara’s priorities are clear: tackling the housing crisis, driving equitable economic development, ensuring real public safety rooted in prevention, and taking bold action on climate change. She has the relationships and experience to hit the ground running on day one and make the tough decisions needed to move Oakland forward.
This is a critical moment for our city, and Barbara is the leader we need. I’m asking you to join me in supporting her campaign to bring new resources, fresh vision, and bold leadership to Oakland.
Make a contribution today and become a founding member of Barbara’s campaign: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/barbaralee_lateefah?refcode=x_010925_BLlaunch_LS]
BARBARA LEE FOR MAYOR [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/barbaralee_lateefah?refcode=x_010925_BLlaunch_LS]
Barbara Lee has shaped the future of Oakland for decades. Together, let’s ensure she can continue to deliver for us as our next Mayor.
In solidarity,
Congresswoman Simon
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_010925_BLlaunch_LS [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_010925_BLlaunch_LS] Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. Now, as a 25-year veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for civil rights and social justice, she’s taking this fight to Congress. In Lateefah, CA-12 has a fighter.
To learn more about Lateefah, visit LateefahSimon.com [http://lateefahsimon.com/]

name: April McClain Delaney
subject: ready to get to work
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY APRIL MCCLAIN DELANEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Our country is headed in an unprecedented direction, but the strength of our democracy lies in the belief that what unites us is greater than what divides us.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100126604/521846839/-1146661722?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2025-01-09_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWJjYTJhNGMtZDVjZS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=b_hPm8fZtjouKVLMh33xvezlfuQZeXnlfcsG5aW4Y8c=)

| Peter,

Now that I’ve been officially sworn in, I’m ready to get to work for Marylanders in our 6th District.

I’m honored to serve Maryland’s 6th District and to do so with a common sense, common ground approach. We face a difficult road ahead with a Republican-led majority in Congress, but I’m prepared to work across the aisle to take on the most pressing challenges in our district and across the nation.

Our country is headed in an unprecedented direction, but the strength of our democracy lies in the belief that what unites us is greater than what divides us.

I remain deeply committed to working with my colleagues, both Republicans and Democrats, to putting people over politics and getting things done. [_**I hope I can count on your support as we face this year’s challenges head-on.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100126605/521846841/-1146661722?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2025-01-09_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWJjYTJhNGMtZDVjZS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=b_hPm8fZtjouKVLMh33xvezlfuQZeXnlfcsG5aW4Y8c=)

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: You can’t balance the budget on the backs of Veterans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
VoteVets is going to do everything we possibly can to defeat their attempts to slash the care that Veterans fought to earn.
#
Peter —
When Trump promised to balance the federal government and slash regulation, a lot of people thought that sounded pretty good.
Then he tasked two out-of-touch, filthy rich billionaires — Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy — with dismantling the federal government and slashing trillions in spending.
The DOGE Boys are planning to start things off by ending care for Veterans as we know it.
One of the first things Ramaswamy proposed was ending the Veterans Health Care Eligibility Act, a $119 billion program that funds medical services for Veterans.
Then we started seeing coverage in the media about how “absurdly generous” the disability benefit payments Veterans receive are in outlets like The Economist.
Now, as they get ready to take office, the architects of Project 2025 are beginning to finalize their plans: Slashing benefits for Veterans, firing thousands of career public servants at the VA, and replacing them with Trump loyalists. Their goal is to privatize the VA — and we’ll give you one guess which filthy rich billionaires are going to be trying to pick up those contracts when they’re on the market.
This is a betrayal. Full stop. And VoteVets is going to do everything we possibly can to defeat their attempts to slash the care that Veterans fought to earn.
[**Peter, we need you with us to hold the line. Chip in $5 or anything you can and help us fight back against Trump, Musk, and Ramaswamy as they work overtime to gut care for Veterans. Please.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-jan25.34Pqeh&refcode=em250109-1-120&t=1&akid=34069%2E3013755%2EYcex-u)**

clean_body: VoteVets is going to do everything we possibly can to defeat their attempts to slash the care that Veterans fought to earn. Peter — When Trump promised to balance the federal government and slash regulation, a lot of people thought that sounded pretty good. Then he tasked two out-of-touch, filthy rich billionaires — Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy — with dismantling the federal government and slashing trillions in spending. The DOGE Boys are planning to start things off by ending care for Veterans as we know it. One of the first things Ramaswamy proposed was ending the Veterans Health Care Eligibility Act, a $119 billion program that funds medical services for Veterans. Then we started seeing coverage in the media about how “absurdly generous” the disability benefit payments Veterans receive are in outlets like The Economist. Now, as they get ready to take office, the architects of Project 2025 are beginning to finalize their plans: Slashing benefits for Veterans, firing thousands of career public servants at the VA, and replacing them with Trump loyalists. Their goal is to privatize the VA — and we’ll give you one guess which filthy rich billionaires are going to be trying to pick up those contracts when they’re on the market. This is a betrayal. Full stop. And VoteVets is going to do everything we possibly can to defeat their attempts to slash the care that Veterans fought to earn. name: Democrats.org
subject: A note about the importance of making a $3 contribution to the Democratic Party today:
body:
---
Derek, As we start the new year, we wanted to send you a note about the contributions we received at the Democratic Party last cycle, share a bit about how that money has been spent, and ask you to add a contribution today to start the new year off strong. >From data, tech, and cybersecurity to human resources and operations, the DNC methodically invested early in state party infrastructure last year. These investments helped lay the groundwork for critical Senate wins in states like Wisconsin, Arizona, Michigan, and Nevada. It helped make key local, congressional, and ballot-measure wins possible across the country. In states where Democrats came up short, Trump and his allies had some of the narrowest wins EVER recorded. As we reflect on our work and the lessons to learn heading into this year, we know that Republicans did not secure a mandate in this election. Now, Trump and his allies are hoping we won’t have the energy to keep fighting. We have to prove them wrong. **That's how we'll use that $3 contribution we're asking you to make today. What do you say?** [**Can you chip in now, so we can start off the new year in the best position possible?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250109_2509_fr&refcode2=2533_22930333_AjkW2d&akid=2533%2E22930333%2EAjkW2d) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250109_2509_fr&refcode2=2533_22930333_AjkW2d&akid=2533%2E22930333%2EAjkW2d)**

| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?refcode=em_20250109_2509_fr&refcode2=2533_22930333_AjkW2d&akid=2533%2E22930333%2EAjkW2d)**

Thank you for everything,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

These investments helped lay the groundwork for critical Senate wins in states like Wisconsin, Arizona, Michigan, and Nevada. It helped make key local, congressional, and ballot-measure wins possible across the country. In states where Democrats came up short, Trump and his allies had some of the narrowest wins EVER recorded. As we reflect on our work and the lessons to learn heading into this year, we know that Republicans did not secure a mandate in this election. Now, Trump and his allies are hoping we won’t have the energy to keep fighting. We have to prove them wrong. That's how we'll use that $3 contribution we're asking you to make today. What do you say? If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | ** | ** Thank you for everything, The Democrats If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support.

clean_body: | | Team, This past weekend, New York’s Congestion Tax scheme went into full effect, whacking New Jersey families with another outrageous tax. This plan is nothing more than a cash grab that directly harms our Jersey workers and commuters. It not only unnecessarily burdens our hardworking Jersey families with higher costs, but will increase cancer-causing smog here in Jersey. | | | | | | | I won’t stand by while our neighbors across the river vote to increase taxes on New Jersey commuters and spread cancer-causing pollutants to our communities. Thank you for being a part of my team, Josh Gottheimer | Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. If you'd like to support his campaign , or to unsubscribe Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. | | | Prefer to donate by mail?** Make checks payable to Josh Gottheimer for Governor PO Box 201 Hackensack, NJ 07602 PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR Josh Gottheimer for Governor PO Box 201 Hackensack, NJ 07602 United States

Jasmine Crockett](https://substack.com/redirect/a5b14710-7c2d-4a62-a397-082bf759e384?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after she tries making the LA wildfires about her distrust of Donald Trump.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a5b14710-7c2d-4a62-a397-082bf759e384?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Crockett complained that Trump has surrounded himself with "loyalist" who are unqualified to lead the departments he has appointed them to, demonstrating "bad judgement." She further called into question Trump's willingness to work with Gavin Newsom to respond to the devastating wildfires currently engulfing Los Angeles.
"California will not have to worry if we get this done before Trump is in office!" she said. "If we wait, I don't know what is going to happen!"
**[Johnson stood up for Trump,](https://substack.com/redirect/a5b14710-7c2d-4a62-a397-082bf759e384?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** arguing that he would not withhold needed relief due to personal differences with a democrat governor.
"You can't show me one emergency disaster that he rejected because he thought the governor was a bozo," Johnson fired back.
Jennings couldn't resist hammering the point in even further.
"The current president is a democrat,.. we're doing a lot of doom casting about what Trump may or may not do, but there doesn't seem to be a lot of accountability for what the people currently in charge didn't do that led to this," Jennings added.
Watch the tense clash below:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/a5b14710-7c2d-4a62-a397-082bf759e384?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *

"Don't let it touch the ground!!"
[](https://substack.com/redirect/02b06ede-1ac3-498f-a1d6-66e5b3ed13ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: emergency-response@uso.org
subject: URGENT: Additional troops activated for CA wildfire response
body:
Please read this service member update.
Please read this quick but important update: As deadly and destructive wildfires continue to ravage the Los Angeles area, additional National Guard members and the U.S. Navy are deploying to assist firefighters and protect civilians.
The Department of Defense is working closely with the state of California on a coordinated response to this emergency, and it's expected that even more service members will be deployed to the front lines soon.
**[At this urgent moment, the USO is calling on supporters like you to donate $29 or more as we prepare to support our service members who are responding to this emergency and serving around the world.* We're just over 60% of the way to our goal, and we need your help to provide critical resources and connections to home when our heroes need them most.](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/e-)**
[RUSH AN EMERGENCY DONATION](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/N-6VBpwGajBm/V01LbkR4OTRWMit2MWVLTDFWSDBrTnNEWmdZNzlwdS9ZcmhGQnJESk1IekVqdTZJNEh6cTNXOHEwTjdhTkkvM3NPSm5yTitGSVVNeWJvUU1jY2ZCanJhMUpndkprWDg0Zk1GRG5YN1hUMHM9S0/T3JkaEZNYmRkYm5HeUgvK1FWZStqenBqd04yRW5wMzZmbU5Oelh6MDlIQVN0elgxZlM3ZTkyVTV0RlZsNFo4eW1VRXN0cE5rOU9nRit6c3dlTlp0aDVmR3lkL20vTjA5S0)
---
Thank you for stepping up for our heroes, especially in moments of emergencies like this and anything else that may arise in 2025.
--The USO
* * *
**From: **Emergency Response via USO
**Sent: **Wednesday, January 8, 2025
**Subject:** BREAKING: CA Wildfire Alert -- National Guard activated
[](https://www.uso.org)
[RUSH A DONATION](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/6jKZHV-PKAMA/V01LbkR4OTRWMit2MWVLTDFWSDBrTnNEWmdZNzlwdS9ZcmhGQnJESk1IekVqdTZJNEh6cTNXOHEwTjdhTkkvM3NPSm5yTitGSVVNeWJvUU1jY2ZCanJhMUpndkprWDg0Zk1GRG5YN1hUMHM9S0/T3JkaEZNYmRkYm5HeUgvK1FWZStqenBqd04yRW5wMzZmbU5Oelh6MDlIQVN0elgxZlM3ZTkyVTV0RlZsNFo4eW1VRXN0cE5rOU9nRit6c3dlTlp0aDVmR3lkL20vTjA5S0)
---
**" Fire chief describes 'apocalyptic'
scene in Pacific Palisades"
--CNN, Jan. 8, 2025 ** _National Guard members are actively assisting affected communities, and**[we're counting on YOUR emergency donation as we prepare to support our heroic service members.*](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/A-VKBbwp8jBD/V01LbkR4OTRWMit2MWVLTDFWSDBrTnNEWmdZNzlwdS9ZcmhGQnJESk1IekVqdTZJNEh6cTNXOHEwTjdhTkkvM3NPSm5yTitGSVVNeWJvUU1jY2ZCanJhMUpndkprWDg0Zk1GRG5YN1hUMHM9S0/T3JkaEZNYmRkYm5HeUgvK1FWZStqenBqd04yRW5wMzZmbU5Oelh6MDlIQVN0elgxZlM3ZTkyVTV0RlZsNFo4eW1VRXN0cE5rOU9nRit6c3dlTlp0aDVmR3lkL20vTjA5S0)**_
---
The news out of California is devastating. Four life-threatening fires are wreaking havoc across Los Angeles County. Tens of thousands of people have been forced to evacuate their homes; many have lost everything they own.
The California National Guard has been activated and are joining firefighters to fight the blaze. With little notice, they jumped into action, left their own families behind and deployed to the front lines to protect civilians.
**While the news around this disaster is rapidly shifting, we know this: The USO will be there for our service members throughout emergencies like this and whatever else arises in 2025 -- but to do that, we rely on generous donations from people like you. **
**[Please, will you rush an emergency donation of $29 to help reach our $20,000 rapid-response goal by midnight and support our heroes in uniform around the world at this critical moment and into the future?](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/e-)**
**[RUSH AN EMERGENCY DONATION NOW](https://links.e.uso.)**
---
Just over a week into the new year, we've already seen service members activated in response to multiple disasters across the country. We are so grateful for these selfless heroes in our communities who are ready to go wherever duty calls to do whatever it takes to keep us safe -- and it's up to us to make sure they have all the support they need and deserve in these difficult moments.
**During emergency deployments like these, the USO provides critical support such as kits filled with essential supplies, water, snacks and warm meals, as well as a secure connection for service members to call their loved ones.[All this and more is only possible with your generosity, so please, will you donate $29 -- or anything at all -- to support our heroes around the world no matter what crises arise in 2025?](https://links.e.uso.)**
[RUSH $29 NOW](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[RUSH $58 NOW](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[RUSH $116 NOW](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/-Z39JW6zGPB~)
---
[RUSH ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
We'll continue to keep you updated on our work to support those responding to this emergency. Thank you for being a military supporter our heroes can count on!
--The USO
*Your contribution will be joined with the contributions of others and used where it is needed most to strengthen the well-being of the people serving in America's military and their families.

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: [BREAKING] The House GOP is pushing for national concealed carry reciprocity
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is an absolute disgrace.
#

Yesterday, on the 14th anniversary of Gabby Giffords’ assassination attempt, the House GOP introduced their bill pushing for national concealed carry reciprocity.
Let that sink in: On the day we were honoring the victims of the Tucson mass shooting, House Republicans were introducing legislation that would flood our communities with more guns.
**_This is an absolute disgrace._**
[**We will be fighting back against House Republicans’ dangerous attempt to allow concealed carry reciprocity nationally. Will you please rush in $3 right away to help fuel this important work?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan25.MP3Bzo&refcode=em250109-1-b&t=1&akid=9791%2E3935704%2En6yhYb)
**[DONATE NOW](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan25.MP3Bzo&refcode=em250109-1-b&t=2&akid=9791%2E3935704%2En6yhYb)**
Concealed carry reciprocity is extremely dangerous. By allowing people to carry loaded, concealed firearms across state lines, law enforcement isn't able to enforce the laws of their state. This is just one of the reasons many law enforcement groups oppose it. With national concealed carry reciprocity, people could carry loaded concealed firearms in public, in every state—even when they’re in a state where they can’t legally purchase a firearm.
**_States that have weakened standards for concealed carry saw a 15% increase in violent crime. Republicans want that to happen nationwide._**
We fought a national concealed carry bill in 2017—and won. But this was no easy feat. Now it’s time for us to come together once again to defeat House Republicans and their attempts to flood our communities with more guns.
[**Please, donate to GIFFORDS PAC to help us in the crucial fight against concealed carry reciprocity.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan25.MP3Bzo&refcode=em250109-1-b&t=3&akid=9791%2E3935704%2En6yhYb)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Dr. Asif Mahmood
subject: Fire Victims Need Our Help!
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us14.campaign-archive.com/?e=7b1b739a89&u=306598b2f3a0f328de4c6676e&id=e8eff2192d)
---
| | | | |
# Supporting our Friends and Neighbors in Need.
---
| Dear Friends,
First and foremost, I want to extend my heartfelt gratitude to all of you—both near and far—for your generous and encouraging messages. Your willingness to help means the world to us during this difficult time. I am thankful that while the Eaton fire got dangerously close to my neighborhood, we were spared. However, many of my friends and colleagues have lost everything. I kindly ask that those who believe in the power of prayer send an extra thought for everyone in harm's way in Southern California and beyond. Your positive vibes are greatly appreciated.I also want to take a moment to express my profound gratitude to the firefighters and first responders who are working tirelessly around the clock to save lives and protect property. Their bravery and dedication are truly inspiring.As we navigate these challenging circumstances, I would like to bring a few important safety tips to your attention:
1\. Water Safety: Please avoid drinking tap water. Opt for bottled or boiled water instead to ensure your safety.2\. Stay Warm Safely: Instead of using gas stoves or wood-burning methods to heat your home, please use extra blankets to stay warm.3\. Car Safety: Do not run your car in a garage or enclosed space, even for charging devices. This poses serious safety risks.4\. Security First: Keep your doors closed and locked. Only listen to verified information from family, friends, and officials with proper identification. Scammers may try to take advantage of the situation.5\. Protect the Vulnerable: Prioritize the safety of children and the elderly, as they are the most vulnerable during emergencies.6\. Medical Assistance: If you need help but it’s not a life-threatening emergency, please visit urgent care or the ER instead of calling 911, as they are currently overwhelmed.7\. Air Quality Precautions: As a pulmonologist, I want to emphasize that the air quality is poor and expected to worsen over the next few days. Those with respiratory conditions (Asthma, COPD, Emphysema, etc.) should take extra precautions, wear masks outdoors, and keep inhalers and nebulizers readily available. Ensure access to power for those who require CPAP or BiPAP machines at night.8\. Emergency Preparedness: Have an emergency kit packed in your car, and make sure your exit routes are clear. Familiarize yourself with how to manually open garage doors in case of power loss.9\. Identification and Contact Information: Always carry your ID and a close contact number with you when leaving home, even if you’re traveling with someone else.10\. Support Those in Need: Many individuals have lost everything or have very little to begin with. I encourage you to consider supporting the Mission of Hope, the largest homeless shelter in our area. We are working to provide basic necessities to those who are not currently in their shelter. [**Hope The Mission**](https://drasifmahmood.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=306598b2f3a0f328de4c6676e&id=3302bb7461&e=7b1b739a89).
Thank you for your support, compassion, and understanding during this challenging time. Together, we can make a difference.
In Solidarity,
Asif
---

subject: Get ready, Michigan!

body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/5?t=1&akid=25%2E181023%2EWqhVy4)
Team,
Get ready, Michigan — to help kick off 2025, **I'm hitting the road to continue my Purpose Driven Community Conversations Tour!**
I started this tour at the end of 2024 to get in touch with how Michiganders are _really_ feeling about the future. I want to speak to people like you directly about their concerns and hopes for 2025, so _we can actually do something about them._
I can’t wait to get on the road, and I hope that you’ll start us off on the right foot by showing your support. **[Will you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you are able to so we can keep fighting for Michigan?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250109-1?refcode=em20250109-1&refcode2=25_181023_WqhVy4&akid=25%2E181023%2EWqhVy4)**

We’ll share updates and photos soon!
Thank you,
Jocelyn
* * *
Before you go... we need your help. Since her 2018 election, Secretary Benson has fought for free and fair elections. We can’t waste any time as we move full steam ahead to make crucial investments to expand our team, stay in touch with our supporters, and grow our campaign. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Laura * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. Gillen for NY PO Box 774 Rockville Centre, NY 11571 United States | = If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above.

| Peter,

Last week, our over 1,200 Emerge alums up and down the ballot were sworn in, including over 400 alums elected last cycle — now, they’re ready to represent their communities.

This is a milestone as we also grew our Congressional Caucus by 63% in the toughest election cycle. We’re proud of our over 1,200 alums up and down the ballot now serving in office across the country, but we have some serious victories to build on in 2025.

We are recruiting and training our new class of Democratic women to join forces and fight back against Trump and his allies. We need your support to start off 2025 strong and set a solid foundation for our work in the year ahead.
